college_info.college_name: Prasad V Potluri Siddhartha Institute of Technology: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements, Reviews

highlights.summary:
The registration deadline for AP EAPCET 2026 (without a late fee) has been extended to Mar 17, 2026, for Prasad V Potluri Siddhartha Institute of Technology admission to BTech and BPharma courses. The BTech exams are scheduled for May 12 to May 15, and on May 18, 2026, followed by the BPharma exam on May 19 and May 20, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

faqs.question: Is it worth to consider Prasad V Potluri Siddhartha Institute of Technology as a good Institute?
faqs.answer: Prasad V Potluri Siddhartha Institute of Technology is a reputed institute for MCA, B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in IT & Software, Engineering, Business & Management Studies. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. As per Shiksha verified reviews, Prasad V Potluri Siddhartha Institute of Technology has a rating of 4.1 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 4.1 on campuslife, 3.9 on placements, 4.2 on faculty and 4 on Infrastructure.

faqs.question: What is the median salary of B.E. / B.Tech course available at Prasad V Potluri Siddhartha Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: As per information available, Sapient College of Commerce and Management has recorded (aprx) INR 350,000 median salary to students for B.E. / B.Tech course during placements.

placements.overview: UG Degree (4 year) : In year 2017-18, for 4 year UG Degree, a total of 659 students were admitted at Prasad V Potluri Siddhartha Institute of Technology and 644 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 644 students 542 were placed with median salary of INR 350000 and 45 students opted for higher studies. A total of 622 students were admitted in year 2018-19 for 4 year UG degree at Prasad V Potluri Siddhartha Institute of Technologyand 626 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 626 students 531 were placed with median salary of INR 400000 and 76 students opted for higher studies. PG Degree (2 year) : In year 2019-20, for 2 year PG Degree, a total of 1 students were admitted at Prasad V Potluri Siddhartha Institute of Technology and 1 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 1 students 1 were placed with median salary of INR 108000. A total of 7 students were admitted in year 2020-21 for 2 year PG degree at Prasad V Potluri Siddhartha Institute of Technologyand 6 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 6 students 5 were placed with median salary of INR 250000.

faqs.question: Does Prasad V Potluri Siddhartha Institute of Technology provide good placement facilities?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Prasad V Potluri Siddhartha Institute of Technology offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. Prasad V Potluri Siddhartha Institute of Technology courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for Prasad V Potluri Siddhartha Institute of Technology courses stands around INR 1,20,000 to 4,20,000.

faqs.answer:
A:    Prasad V Potluri Siddhartha Institute of Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityMCACandidate must have passed Bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with Mathematics as one of the subject at Intermediate or Degree level with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute.
45% marks for BC categories.
Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible.
Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB.
Candidate who passed all the subjects of the three years of any Degree course in one sitting is not eligible for admission.B.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible.
Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis.
Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana.
Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023).
There is no upper age limit.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have passsed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant stream and obtained at least 50% marks (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from an AICTE/UGC
approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: I am absolutely satisfied with this college.

review_content.Placements: Most of the students got placements in our course. The highest package in our course is like 7LPA, and the lowest package is about 3LPA. Top recruiting companies in our department are like Hyundai, Medha Servo, TCS, etc. Most of the students got an internship in our course.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available in our department are good, Wi-Fi and classrooms are good. No well-stocked library in our college. The quality of the facilities in our hostel is good. The quality of the food available in our canteen is good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: My college life, the way I spent it, and things that I know about it.

review_content.Placements: Since the placement drive is in process, nearly 30-40% of students who are eligible have been selected for placements. In our college, the main recruitment is done from service-based companies like TCS, Accenture, Cognizant, Wipro, etc. Product-based companies like Amazon, Flipkart, etc., also hire students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostels are only provided for girls from the college side. There are many PGs at just a walkable distance from the college for boys. There is good availability of Wi-Fi. The library is present. It has basic games like shuttle, throwball, and basketball.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Review of my college, with honesty.

review_content.Placements: From 2023 to 2027, about 85% of students from the Information Technology branch are placed, with packages ranging from 3 to 12 LPA, and an average of ₹3.5 lpa. Top recruiters include TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Accenture, and HTC. Around 60% of students got internships with firms like TCS, Efftronics, and Hexaware. Common roles offered are software developer, data analyst, and testing engineer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our IT department has Wi-Fi-enabled labs and spacious classrooms with projectors. Students also have access to a well-stocked library. The hostel is clean, but the mess food is average. The canteen has a limited variety of food, and there are general medical facilities available. Additionally, there are sports grounds, courts, and indoor games for students.

highlights.summary: Admission is open to all courses for the academic year 2025-26. Interested candidates can check and apply through the official website of the university.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in Rabindranath Tagore University?
faqs.answer: Rabindranath Tagore University generally does not offer direct admissions for any of its courses. Students wishing to enrol in to the courses provided at the university need to ensure that they meet the admission criteria set of the same. For most of the RNTU Bhopal courses, admissions are entrance-based. Students need to appear for AJEE exam or provide valid scores secured in other exams to be eligible for admission. Students can connect with the admission desk of the university to learn more.

faqs.question: Is Rabindranath Tagore University good for placements?
faqs.answer:
Yes, Rabindranath Tagore University offers decent placements annually for courses like MCA, MBA, BBA, and BCA. As per the latest report, the the highest package offered during Rabindranath Tagore University placements 2025 stood at INR 18 LPA. college_info.intro: Rabindranath Tagore University courses include UG, PG, PhD, UG Diploma, PG Diploma in streams such as Agriculture, Humanities and Languages, Commerce, Education, Engineering and Technology, Law, Management, Medical Science, Science etc. The University offers BSc, MBA and UG Diploma with various specialisations in full-time mode. Ravindranath University Bhopal BSc is available in Nursing, Agriculture, Forensic Science, Biotechnology, Computer Science, Microbiology, Yoga etc. Similarly, RNTU MBA/ PGDM is offerered in Rural Development, Urban Management, Rural Management, Hospital Administration etc. The University gives admission on the basis of Class 12 qualification with 45% minimum aggregate. Majority of courses consider the AJEE scores or the scores/ percentile of NEET, CAT/ MAT or other respective entrance exams. overview_faqs.question: What is the total BA fee at Rabindranath Tagore University?
overview_faqs.answer: The total Rabindranath Tagore University BA fee vary across the BA specialisations offered at the university. For a BA in Journalism & Mass Communication, the total fee is INR 60,000. It is payable in three annual instalments of INR 20,000. For all other BA specialisations at RNTU Bhopal, the total fee is INR 36,000. The annual instalment for the three-year course comes down to INR 12,000. The mentioned fee is sourced from the official website of the university/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

overview_faqs.question: How much is the application fee for PhD at Rabindranath Tagore University?
overview_faqs.answer: The application fee for PhD programme at Rabindranath Tagore University is Rs 2,500.

overview_faqs.question: What is the total BTech fee at Rabindranath Tagore University?
overview_faqs.answer: Rabindranath Tagore University provides a four-year BE course in the full-time mode. The BE fee at RNTU Bhopal is INR 1.8 lakh for various specialisations. It is payable in annual instalments. The fee structure may also include other components, such as admission/registration fees, hostel fees, security deposits, etc. The mentioned fee is sourced from the official website of the university/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

overview_faqs.question: Does Rabindranath Tagore University have any collaborations?
overview_faqs.answer: For training and placement purposes, The Rabindranath Tagore University has signed MoUs with several organisations like Blue Prism India Private Limited, Rajiv Gandhi Diagnostic Centre, Media & Entertainment Skills Council (New Delhi), Neethi Lab, Kerala Medical Laboratory, Shriram Life Insurance Company, and Kamthi Motors LLP.

review_summary.college_name: Rabindranath Tagore University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Faculty in this college is also good, who teach well and tell the students to stay understanding.

content.Placements: Nice university in Bhopal. Known for its academic excellence and holistic approach. Very nice university in placement. There are many students in our college who are preparing for different courses. Recruiting for AWS, Atos global, Aisect limited, Agromaxx.
content.Infrastructure: Nice hostel and good food.
content.Faculty: Teachers at RNTU are helpful and qualified. Their teaching quality is good with a focus on practical. The course curriculum is relevant and industry-oriented. Semester exams are moderately difficult with a high pass percentage. My university is best. Rabindranath Tagore University, Bhopal, is India's first skill-based university with equal focus on both theoretical and practical learning. Keeping this in mind, the university management has established practical laboratories for all the courses that are conducted in every department.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Soil Science and Agricultural Chemistry - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Review of RNTU Bhopal academics, campus, and beyond.

content.Placements: Placements at RNTU Bhopal for the 2024-25 batch were quite impressive. 85% of students got placed with a package of 15 LPA. The university provides strong internship opportunities. Students get more than 400 internships in top companies. Overall, RNTU offers a good balance of academics.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels are decent with basic amenities. The mess food is hygienic but average in taste. Medical and sports facilities are available. RNTU Bhopal provides good infrastructure with smart classrooms, high-speed Wi-Fi, good labs, and a rich library for students.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I would like to suggest this college to every student I know for admission.

content.Placements: Of course, RNTU is one of the best, but I don't think it has the highest chance of placement. Fastly, but placement and internship from our college are actually given, and the percentage of students who got internships is 80-90%. Overall, a good college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good, and the hostel is also good. The security level is safe for students, but as we know, good food in the hostel is not expected. The facilities provided and hostel rooms are good, and overall RNTU is a good one.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is a very nice college and its facilities are very good.

content.Placements: Placements are also very good. Overall, in all departments, approximately 80% of students get placed. The lowest salary package in the B.E. CSE course ranges from 5-7 LPA. The highest package is 1.5 crores per annum in B.E. CSE. Top recruiting companies for our course are Amazon, Google, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Overall, the infrastructure of our college is very good. Hostels are very well-organised. There are several facilities for students like a gym, library, cricket or football ground, basketball court, badminton court, libraries, etc., and useful facilities are all included.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. LL.B. - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Average university only for degrees, not for studies.

content.Placements: In Rabindranath Tagore University, there are not much placements. But for sure there is a lot of support and effort put in by placement cells to get students placed especially in engineering and computer science. Companies like Tata, Wipro, Tech Mahindra, etc., visit every year for placements and the average CTC is 4 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Everything is fine except for network issues. University campus provides hostel guest house, canteen, auditorium, etc. The infrastructure is very good. The main problem is that it is not in Bhopal, it is in Raise. Take admission after knowing all the details.

admission_overview.college_name: Rabindranath Tagore University Admission 2025: Eligibility, Process, Date, Fee

admission_overview.title: Rabindranath Tagore University Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Rabindranath Tagore University admission 2025 is open. The university offers an online mode of application submission. Admission to all the courses at the university is offered basis of the entrance exam scores. To be eligible for admission, candidates are required to fulfil the eligibility and selection criteria set by the university. Given below is more updated information about Rabindranath Tagore University admission 2025, followed by course-wise eligibility, selection criteria and admission process:

eligibility_selection.title: Rabindranath Tagore University Eligibility & Selection Criteria 2025
eligibility_selection.description: Rabindranath Tagore University course admission is mainly entrance-based. The university offers a wide range of courses in full-time mode. The basic eligibility for all the UG, PG, and doctoral programmes at RNTU Bhopal is merit in the last qualifying examination. However, the selection of candidates for all the courses is basis the scores obtained by the candidates in the AISECT Joint Entrance Exam (AJEE), a university-level entrance exam. Besides this, the university may also accept the scores of national and state-level entrance exams for MBA. The table below lists the popular Rabindranath Tagore University courses along with their admission-related details like eligibility, accepted entrance exams, and fee:

courses_table.eligibility: Class 12 with 45% aggregate (40% for reserved categories) in the Science stream
Class 12 in a relevant stream
BSc with 50% aggregate
Bachelor’s degree with 50% aggregate
LLB with 55% aggregate
PG degree with a minimum aggregate of 55% in a relevant field from a recognised university
courses_table.selection_criteria: PhD Entrance Test/ NET/ GATE/ SLET

faqs.answer: Rabindranath Tagore University, shortlists students mainly based on entrance scores. The university accepts valid score secured in the AJEE conducted by AISECT Group of Institutions. It is an in-house test conducted by the GOI for admission to all five of its universities. However, students may get admitted on a merit basis. To know about the RNTU Bhopal admission chances, students can connect with the admission desk of the university.
faqs.question: Can I get into Rabindranath Tagore University without entrance exam?

admission_process.title: Rabindranath Tagore University Admission  Process 2025

paragraphs: Admission process of Rabindranath Tagore University starts with filling out the registration form. Candidates willing for admission to Rabindranath Tagore University courses must appear for the accepted entrance exam. The step-wise Rabindranath Tagore University admission process 2025 are below:
Application Process
For admission to various programme offered by Rabindranath Tagore University, candidates must fill out the admission form online by going through the official website of the university.
Selection Round

According to the selection criteria, the candidates must pass Class 12 for admission to UG courses with 45% aggregate and a graduation degree with 50% aggregate for admission to PG. Also, candidates must appear for the entrance exam accepted by the university. The university releases the shortlisted candidates’ list based on their performance in the entrance exam.
Final Seat Allotment
The university release a list of shortlisted candidates. To confirm the seats, students are supoose to pay the required fees.

courses_data.name: Rabindranath Tagore University B.E Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Rabindranath Tagore University offers an undergraduate degree inB.E(Bachelor of Engineering). The course is offered for a duration of four years, divided into eight semesters of six months each. Students can pursue the course across multiple specialisations, such asComputer Science & Engineering, Civil Engineering,Mechanical Engineering, and more. The basic eligibility requires students to pass Class 12 or equivalent from a recognised board. Students must have studied PCM in Class 12. Selection is entrance-based. Candidates need to appear for the AJEE exam. Find below key highlights forRabindranath Tagore University B.E admission:

faqs.question: Who is eligible for Rabindranath Tagore University B.E admission?
faqs.answer: Rabindranath Tagore University B.E admission is entrance-based. Students wishing to enrol in to the university need to make sure that they satisfy both the basic eligibility and selection criteria to get a seat. The admission criteria of the B.E course is as follows:Class 12 with Maths from a recognised board or equivalent diplomaAJEE examination

faqs.question: What are the B.E courses offered by Rabindranath Tagore University?
faqs.answer: At Rabindranath Tagore University, students are offered several B.E courses at the undergraduate level. These programmes are offered in full-time mode for a duration of four years. The admission criteria is same for all of the specialisations. Find below a list of B.E courses offered by the university:CSECSE in AI & MLCivil EngineeringMechanical EngineeringECEElectrical Electronics Engineering

faqs.question: What are the documents required for verification during BE admission at Rabindranath Tagore University?
faqs.answer: Rabindranath Tagore University BE admission process is incomplete without physical verification of the required documents. Once the candidates are shortlisted for admission, they must report to the campus along with the documents required to confirm their eligibility. Some of these documents are listed below:Class 10 MarksheetClass 12 MarksheetAadhar CardPassport Size PhotosCaste Certificate (if applicable)Migration/Transfer Certificate (if applicable)Any other document required by the universit

faqs.question: How can I apply for BCom admission at Rabindranath Tagore University?
faqs.answer: Rabindranath Tagore University BCom application process is conducted online as well as offline. Candidates willing to apply offline can visit the university's campus to obtain the application form. Alternatively, candidates can apply online through the university's official website. The application form must be submitted with an application fee of INR 500. The steps included in the online application process are presented in the infogaphic below:

faqs.question: How can I get admission to the Rabindranath Tagore University BCom course?
faqs.answer: Aspirants willing to take admission at Rabindranath Tagore University for a BCom must begin with the application process. The process can be completed online or offline. The university screens the received applications and qualifying candidates are called for the selection rounds, which may include a written entrance test, group discussion, interview, etc. The university may also provide direct admissions, subject to fulfilment of the preset criteria. The final step in the admission process it to report to the campus for document verification and submit the first instalment of the course fee.

placement_report.college_name: Rabindranath Tagore University Placements 2025: Highest Package, Average Package, Top Companies

placement_data.title: Rabindranath Tagore University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: Rabindranath Tagore University concluded the placements for the Class of 2025. As per the latest report, the highest package offered during Rabindranath Tagore University placements 2025 stood at INR 18 LPA . Further, over 600 recruiters participated in 2025 placements and offered handsome packages to the students of the 2025 batch. More than 6,000 students were placed during the 2025 placement drive. The top recruiters of Rabindranath Tagore University in 2025 included Toyota, Tech Mahindra, Paytm, Infosys, Wipro, Reliance Retail, IndusInd Bank, ICICI Bank, etc.
Rabindranath Tagore University (RNTU) Placements 2025 Highlights
Note : The placement year is not mentioned on the official website. Hence, the placement data mentioned above is assumed for the year 2025 .
About RNTU Placement Cell

Rabindranath Tagore University has a Training and Placement Department that provides placement assistance to all of its students. The placement process at Rabindranath Tagore University includes a comprehensive pre-placement talk, Skill assessment, Group Discussion, Technical and Panel interviews.

highlights.description: RNTU has been continuously recognised as one of the leading institutes by numerous national ranking agencies. The institute is ranked #151-200 in the University category, and #201-300 under Engineering by the NIRF 2025. The academic reputation, dedicated faculty, and well-laid infrastructure are some of the reasons of the institute's high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. The article below covers all the information around RNTU rankings:

rankings.highlight: 8th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Madhya Pradesh In 2025
2nd Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Madhya Pradesh In 2025

nirf.description:
Over the years, RNTU has earned commendable rankings across different domains in the NIRF 2025. This signifies the institution's esteemed reputation and proficiency in various aspects, assigning it an overall good score. It can be seen that the RNTU's rankings in 'University' category have displayed stability in trend as per the ranks of the previous years. In 2025, RNTU's rank is #151, the same as last year's rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
The rankings of the institute in the 'Engineering' category have displayed a stable trend when evaluated against previous year's rankings. In 2025, RNTU's rank is #201, the same as last year's rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.
Explore the RNTU latest rankings by other ranking bodies and their categories below:

In 2025, RNTU climbed 3 ranks to #40 rank in the 'State Private University' category by the Outlook ranking.

reviews.review_text: Avar University insists on a specific set of objectives to follow on campus for maintaining college decorum. Individual office rooms are arranged for placement offices, administrative offices, HODs, and PT incharges. Health care unit is also arranged for students' concerns.

reviews.review_heading: Consistent technical education.
reviews.review_text: Students get access to medical emergencies at any time. Classrooms are developed with needed tools. There are no sports hours in our schedule. Sometimes, canteens are very crowded. The hostel provides food at a specific time.

reviews.review_heading: A mini short college life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good, you can directly compare it with world-class infrastructure. The classrooms are very systematic and clean, and you will never be disappointed in terms of cleanliness and peacefulness. I think Wi-Fi will never work here, even if you have the password.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements, environment, and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: RNTU is the number 1 college in Bhopal city, so the infrastructure is very classic and attractive. We have good Wi-Fi connectivity. The campus has a good environment. There are high classrooms and a lab. Classrooms have good surroundings. Good facilities are provided. They have value for money. Overall, the hostel facility is good.

reviews.review_heading: One of the good private colleges in Bhopal.
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure in our college is nice.
There is a Wi-Fi facility available with high speed.
A decent library is there, as is a big computer lab with at least 200 systems.
Hostel is available for both Boys and Girls.
Gym facilities are also available in the hostel.
Mess food is above average.(Non-veg not allowed).
Fantastic canteen is there.
Sports and games facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Rabindranath Tagore University is the best in itself for placements.
reviews.review_text: RNTU hostels offer excellent facilities in the rooms, including daily cleaning, food, and Wi-Fi. Overall, the amenities provided by Rabindranath Tagore University are great, and I am thankful for all the support from the teachers, mentors, and principal.

reviews.review_heading: Rabindranath Tagore university.
reviews.review_text: The campus is good with neat classrooms, highly infrastructured buildings with all the facilities. All the students behave themselves to maintain the decorum of our college. There is a big spacious library, an open auditorium, and good transportation facilities available within the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Rabindranath Tagore University.
reviews.review_text: Faculty members and the infrastructure are totally fine. The faculty is very friendly with the students; they are flexible with them. The way of teaching is absolutely fine, and the infrastructure is really good, with all the facilities available in our course.

reviews.review_heading: Review of B.Com from the Rabindranath Tagore University.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and facilities are available at Rabindranath Tagore University. Wi-Fi, labs, library, canteens, classrooms, etc. facilities are available at this college. Hostel facilities at this college were also available for the students. The food available for students in the hostel was also good to eat.

paragraphs: The total Rabindranath Tagore University BA fee vary across the BA specialisations offered at the university. For a BA in Journalism & Mass Communication, the total fee is INR 60,000. It is payable in three annual instalments of INR 20,000. For all other BA specialisations at RNTU Bhopal, the total fee is INR 36,000. The annual instalment for the three-year course comes down to INR 12,000. The mentioned fee is sourced from the official website of the university/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

Rabindranath Tagore University provides a four-year BE course in the full-time mode. The BE fee at RNTU Bhopal is INR 1.8 lakh for various specialisations. It is payable in annual instalments. The fee structure may also include other components, such as admission/registration fees, hostel fees, security deposits, etc. The mentioned fee is sourced from the official website of the university/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.
91% and above

reviews_list.review_title: A review of SVCET by P. Yaswanth.

review_content.Placements: Approximately 75% of students choose the ECE branch, while only 20% opt for EBM. The EBM group has diverse and highly demanding sectors.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel is good, but we desire daily cleaning and maintenance, and we want to inform cleaners to maintain hygiene. Hostel facilities are also good, and if any health issues arise, they respond quickly. However, the food is not good and lacks hygiene, you can verify this online.
review_content.Faculty: Teaching is average, and we need to concentrate on their teaching time. We also need to focus on training and development, and participate in some events, because it will help in the future. The semester is also somewhat hard to clear, with 10 subjects per semester, 5 labs, and 5 theory.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: College placement was in 2015, average 50 to 75, and good placement has allotted at the college.

review_content.Placements: At SVCET Chittoor, placements vary by department and year, but generally, 30-50% of students get placed. The highest salary package offered is typically around 16 LPA, with the lowest being around 3 LPA - 4 LPA, and the average around 5 LPA - 6 LPA, according to Shiksha. Top recruiting companies include TCS, Tata, Infosys, Amazon, Cognizant, and Wipro.
review_content.Infrastructure: Campus also boasts a wide range of infrastructure, including a spacious food court, well-equipped labs, a central library, and various sports facilities. It has good van facilities and hostels are hygiene. It has good atmosphere and good facilities to learn.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: The college and faculty are good, with a great ambiance.

review_content.Placements: Amazon, Wipro, and many more companies hire students as internship candidates with good packages. Many companies offer training and placement to students. They provide jobs by monitoring them during the training period. Students get placed with good packages.
review_content.Infrastructure: The rooms are good with ventilation. Both South Indian and North Indian foods are available in the mess. Sports meets are conducted. Sports are during college fests, and students have a chance to play at the state or national level.

admission_process.title: Sri Venkateswara College of Engineering and Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Sri Venkateswara College of Engineering and Technology, Chittoor admissionis a blend of merit and entrance basis. The college offers courses, such as BTech, MTech MCA and MBA at the UG and PG levels. Apart from the degree courses, the college also offers diploma courses. To get admitted toSVCET Chittoor, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the college. The college is affiliated withJawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Ananthapuramu. The college offers more than 10 courses in the Engineering and Computer Application streams. The application process at Sri VCET is conducted online. Read the following article to know more aboutSri Venkateswara College of Engineering and Technologycourse admission2025.

Sri Venkateswara College of Engineering and Technologyadmission 2025is entrance-based. The mode of study for SVCET courses is full-time. To enrol for various course admissions, candidates must complete the last educational qualification set by the college. Read on to know more aboutSri Venkateswara College of Engineering and Technologycourse admission2025.
Particulars
SVCET  Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
How to apply?
Level of programmes offered

SVCET course admissionsare based on entrance exam scores. Candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements for the respective courses. To enroll in the UG courses offered at the college, students need to pass Class 12. Whereas, for PG admissions, students need to clear graduation in the relevant field. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection criteria forSri Venkateswara College of Engineering and Technology courses:
Class with a 50% aggregate with Mathematics, Physics & Chemistry as compulsory subjects
Merit/ Entrance-based + Counselling
BTech/BE with a 50% aggregate
Any degree with a 50% aggregate
APICETbased onICET rank
Any Degree with 50% aggregate with Mathematics Compulsory subject

Sri Venkateswara College of Engineering and Technology admission process includes registration and merit list preparation as per respective courses. Candidates must follow the below steps to get a seat in SVCET:
STEP 1: Application Process
Candidates are required to apply online at the institute's official website. Before applying, students are required to fulfil the admission criteria of the desired programme.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds

Students will be selected based on merit and entrance exam scores as per respective courses. Students are selected based on the entrance exams. The college accepts state and national-level exams to shortlist the students in addition to considering candidate's academic performance.
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation
Once selection rounds are over, the institute releases a merit list. To confirm the seat candidates are required to pay theSVCET admission feeat the admission receipt centre.

faqs.question: How to take admission in Sri Venkateswara College of Engineering and Technology?
faqs.answer: To apply for the various course at Sri Venkateswara College of Engineering and Technology, candidates need to meet the last educational qualification set by the institute. Students can check the detailed admission process below:STEP 1: Sri Venkateswara College of Engineering and Technology Application Process 2024Aspirants are required to apply online at the official website of Sri Venkateswara College of Engineering and Technology.STEP 2: Selection RoundsCandidates are selected based on entrance exam scores as per respective courses. Students are selected based on the entrance exam of Andhra Pradesh EAMCET, CBSE 12, BIEAP for BTech, GATE, Andhra Pradesh PGECET for M.Tech course, APICET for MBA and MCA course.STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission ConfirmationOnce selection rounds are over, the institute releases a merit list. To allot and confirm the seat candidates are required to pay the application fee at the admission receipt centre.

reviews.review_heading: In my opinion, it is okay, and the faculty members are also good.
reviews.review_text: There are good and decent facilities and infrastructure available in my college, like labs for different courses, separate classrooms for each section, and a library. I didn't know about the hostel at my college because I live in PGs near the college, but I have heard about the hostel from my friends, and they said it is okay.

reviews.review_heading: Better for placements and nice environment.
reviews.review_text: The college's infrastructure is considered good, with well-equipped labs and classrooms, though some students mention areas for improvement in hostel facilities. College provides decent infrastructure with good labs and classrooms, though the hostel and mess facilities have room for improvement. Peaceful environment. The campus life is vibrant, with a diverse crowd of students contributing to a lively and engaging environment.

reviews.review_heading: A review of SVCET by P. Yaswanth.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is good, but we desire daily cleaning and maintenance, and we want to inform cleaners to maintain hygiene. Hostel facilities are also good, and if any health issues arise, they respond quickly. However, the food is not good and lacks hygiene, you can verify this online.

reviews.review_heading: College placement was in 2015, average 50 to 75, and good placement has allotted at the college.
reviews.review_text: Campus also boasts a wide range of infrastructure, including a spacious food court, well-equipped labs, a central library, and various sports facilities. It has good van facilities and hostels are hygiene. It has good atmosphere and good facilities to learn.

reviews.review_heading: The college and faculty are good, with a great ambiance.
reviews.review_text: The rooms are good with ventilation. Both South Indian and North Indian foods are available in the mess. Sports meets are conducted. Sports are during college fests, and students have a chance to play at the state or national level.

reviews.review_heading: Moderately satisfied with the faculty. The college has provided good placements in 2025.
reviews.review_text: Our college is equipped with a library, laboratories, and classrooms. The quality of the hostel is average, and the food provided is occasionally good. We have a nice canteen on campus that offers a variety of foods, fruit juices, and beverages. Our college has its own hospital. We also host various sports and games competitions throughout the year.

reviews.review_heading: Everything is good but they make us to pay some extra money for some unwanted things.
reviews.review_text: Labs and nature are good, no proper maintenance of classrooms. College has good nature. There will be pleasant weather and inside the main block, there will be a garden. It will give you more peace but classroom maintenance is not good. There will be extracurricular activities and has nice playground.

reviews.review_heading: A great college with good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available in my department, such as Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and the library, are good. The food in the mess and canteen is excellent. Medical facilities are available 24 hours a day, and sports and games facilities in the college are well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements, infrastructure, and events. Faculty is average.
reviews.review_text: We have very good infrastructure and environment classrooms. We have very good facilities like classrooms, labs, library, playground, Wi-Fi, and well-computerized CP labs. The quality of food in hostel is decent and average and very good facilities in the hostel like the availability of canteen and medical facilities. Our college is very actively participated in games and sports.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college with average facilities.
reviews.review_text: All of the classrooms are equipped with a projector and the laboratory is also well-equipped with AC. The hostel sometimes has water problems and the rest is fine. The food quality in the hostel is poor. The classrooms are equipped with fans only and don't have AC.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure, environment, grounds, and surroundings.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good infrastructure and facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, a library, and playgrounds. I hear the mess provides above-average food, and there is a canteen. Our college is very active in sports, games, external activities, and cultural. Hosts lot of fests, games, and sports.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure, good faculty members, and good placements every year.
reviews.review_text: It has very decent and good facilities like libraries, labs, classrooms, Wi-Fi, etc. It has very good infrastructure and good facilities. It has very good campus grounds and nature. The hostel provides decent facilities and a variety of food of decent taste. It has water facilities, AC, and non-AC rooms. It has good sports and games facilities.

reviews.review_heading: It has a good infrastructure, a calm nature with facilities, and a ground.
reviews.review_text: We have very good infrastructure. It has Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. In college, we have ground facilities and a lot of cultural programs. The hostel provides a decent menu and food in the mess. The hostel also has a gym and very decent facilities.

reviews.review_heading: The college has a good campus, moderate classrooms, and experienced faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Colleges typically offer a range of facilities, including teaching and learning resources like classrooms, libraries, and labs. Support services like hostels, dining halls, and sports facilities. The quality and availability of these facilities, along with the expertise of faculty. Significantly influence the overall learning environment and student experience.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Talking about our college infrastructure and facility every department of the classroom is well organized. The facility that we are getting from lab is good and also there is a good internet connection. Having well well-organized library where we get all the material that we require. As we talk about our hostel environment, all we live like a family member. Our college is in South state so we are served with the south Indian food. Talking about sports and games all we played on the ground in the...

faqs.answer: A:    As per Shiksha verified reviews, Vidya Jyothi Institute of Technology has an impressive review rating of 3.97 by 308 students.
faqs.question: How is the placement facility at Vidya Jyothi Institute of Technology?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Vidya Jyothi Institute of Technology provides Full Time programs at the UG and PG levels. These courses are available in multiple streams like Engineering and Business & Management Studies, and have a fee structure of around INR 1,03,600 to 4,60,000. UG programs include B.E. / B.Tech. Further, the PG programs include M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM.

review_content.General: My department had decent Wi-Fi, well-maintained labs, and classrooms with projectors. The library was helpful for reference books and quiet study. The hostel facilities were average but manageable, with regular cleaning and basic amenities. Mess food was simple and sometimes repetitive, but the canteen offered better options. We had a small medical room for basic issues, and the campus had grounds for cricket, volleyball, and indoor games.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: You can go to this college only if your EAMCENT rank is low or if you are going for management seat.

review_content.Placements: 80%-90% of students got placed from this college. The highest package is around 24 LPA, the lowest package is around 2 LPA, and the average package in this college is around 6 LPA-7 LPA. Recruiting companies such as Microsoft, Accenture, Tata, etc. 35%-45% of students offered internship opportunities. CSE, ECE, EEE, and specializations in CSE are the top roles offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities in this college are quite impressive. For every course, there is a certified faculty. The Wi-Fi of the college provides good and fast internet to compile code faster. Labs look quite impressive and professional. Classrooms provide ventilation to each class. There are multiple libraries that students can access easily. The main disappointment is that there is no hostel in this college. Though they are building it now, it may be completed in the year 2027. Every year, they conduct a sports fest. We play with other colleges and also among ourselves.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Our college had the best faculty and staff, and there were many facilities as well.

review_content.Placements: Almost 70 percent of students from our course got placed in campus placements in top companies. The highest package was 5.5 LPA, the average package was 3 LPA, and the lowest package was 2.5 LPA. The top recruiting companies included Foxconn, COULRYT, and 24/7 AI. Approximately 53 percent of students completed their internships in companies like Software IT Solutions and Arky Technology Pvt. Ltd. The top roles were Network Planning Engineer and Electronic Design Engineer.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college was absolutely satisfying for students. Facilities were very reasonable. Facilities included AC labs, seminar halls, a library, free Wi-Fi around the entire campus, and other resources. Facilities provided by the hostel were also great for students, with good and neat rooms and tasty food available in the canteen and mess at reasonable prices. Games like cricket, volleyball, and basketball were played regularly in the college. The medical facilities were available throughout the day.

content.Placements: Almost 70 percent of students from our course got placed in campus placements in top companies. The highest package was 5.5 LPA, the average package was 3 LPA, and the lowest package was 2.5 LPA. The top recruiting companies included Foxconn, COULRYT, and 24/7 AI. Approximately 53 percent of students completed their internships in companies like Software IT Solutions and Arky Technology Pvt. Ltd. The top roles were Network Planning Engineer and Electronic Design Engineer.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college was absolutely satisfying for students. Facilities were very reasonable. Facilities included AC labs, seminar halls, a library, free Wi-Fi around the entire campus, and other resources. Facilities provided by the hostel were also great for students, with good and neat rooms and tasty food available in the canteen and mess at reasonable prices. Games like cricket, volleyball, and basketball were played regularly in the college. The medical facilities were available throughout the day.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I literally loved this college because of faculty members and staff.

content.Placements: The placements were excellent in our college from our course. Approximately 73 percent of the students got placed in the campus placements. The highest package was 7 LPA, the average package was 5 LPA, and the lowest package was 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies like TCS, Wipro, and Accenture participated. Approximately 67 percent of the students received their internship certificates from our course. The top roles included software development and code development.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and facilities were really satisfactory for students at reasonable prices. Facilities included separate blocks for different branches, AC classrooms, library, free Wi-Fi across the campus, auditorium, and seminar halls. The mess and canteen food were excellent with decent prices. Medical services were also good. Professional doctors available. Sports and games were conducted every weekend, with sports meets organized regularly.

cut_off.college_name: Vidya Jyothi Institute of Technology Cutoff 2025: Check TS ICET Round Wise Cutoff Ranks

description: Vidya Jyothi Institute of Technology cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to MBA programmes via the TSI ICET entrance examination result. Students should scroll down to this page to know the round, category, and year-wise cutoff for TSI ICET and other accepted exams. Refer to the pointers below for more updates:

Vidya Jyothi Institute of Technology TS EAMCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for the AI and HS quota. In the General category under the HS quota, the last round closing ranks ranged between 13284 and 42037 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering was the toughest to get admission into, considering its competitive cutoff rank. For other B.E. / B.Tech specialisations, use the

For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the top three most competitive branches were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering, B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) and B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science), with competitive TS EAMCET last round cutoff ranks of 13284, 14542 and 15886, respectively. These ranks are valid for the students belonging to the General HS quota.

For 2026 admission, candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important TS EAMCET dates. TS EAMCET is a state-level entrance test for admission to BE, B.Tech, BPharm, PharmD, B.Sc, B.FSc, and BVSc courses.

The TS EAMCET cutoff has been released for admission to Vidya Jyothi Institute of Technology. Candidates can view or download the consolidated year-wise and round-wise TS EAMCET cutoff lists in the form of PDF from the table below for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course.

Candidates can view the other specialisation options available for admission at multiple colleges accepting the TS EAMCET entrance exam. The comparison below is based on the last round cutoff rank of TS EAMCET for the General HS category students.

The Vidya Jyothi Institute of Technology MBA cutoff 2025 for the General HS category in the last round was 11465. In contrast, the cutoff in 2024 was 14019, and the 2023 cutoff was 3912 for the aforementioned course and category. According to this data, we can say that the competition for MBA has been fluctuating in the last 3 years.
Check the table below to know the year, round, category and quota-wise cutoff.

review_content.Placements: This course is very good because many companies provide internships. Students must score above 60% to participate in placement facilities. TCS, Accenture, etc., companies visit the college.

content.Placements: Course-wise placements for M.Tech were literally at a lower rate than B.Tech students. From the overall strength, around 70% of students get placed yearly. Apart from college placements, we have enormous scope in off-campus drives with a salary package of 4 LPA - 12 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: An unlimited quantity of food items were cooked and served in a higher quality considering students' hygiene. So the hosteller's should not worry about the food. They don't insist on any specific time to have food. Three members can share a single room in both girls' and boys' hostels. Necessary facilities for relaxing, studying, and entertaining were provided by the college.

individual_reviews.course: M.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: National Engineering College For Computer Science Engineering Course admission.

content.Placements: This course is very good because many companies provide internships. Students must score above 60% to participate in placement facilities. TCS, Accenture, etc., companies visit the college.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides quality infrastructure like fast Wi-Fi, bathrooms, labs, classrooms, a library, drinking water, etc. In this college, the hostel is very neat. It is of high quality. The college has a canteen. Its food is very tasty and healthy for students.
content.Faculty: Our teachers are very educated and qualified in Delhi University and other states. They are very knowledgeable and helpful. They solve any problem. This course is for 4-5 years. The passing mark is 42 which is very difficult.

individual_reviews.course: M.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Best college and has good facilities.

content.Placements: Around 85% of students got placed from our course. The highest salary package offered is 38 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 3.5 LPA-4 LPA. Recruiting companies are Dell, Infosys, HDFC, TCS, Amazon, and Capgemini. Around 78% of students secured internships.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is good and has all facilities. Architecture is modern with full ventilation. Wi-Fi is provided at high speed. Libraries are stocked with all books. Hostel is well-maintained, with good food and serves good food three times a day.. The facilities in a hostel are good.

individual_reviews.course: M.E. in Embedded Systems Technologies - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Review of ME-EST in National engineering college.

content.Placements: Course grades/percentages play a major role in choosing students for giving placement training. Students with lower grades won't be allowed to participate in all the sessions. I'm a topper student and got placed in Emertxe, an embedded-based company, with a starting salary of 19000 in a month.
content.Infrastructure: The green environment with all the required amenities. Our campus was fitted with all the safety measures like earthquake resistance and emergency cylinders. Facilities like lifts should be used by teachers and differently abled persons. Canteens are available with good quality of foods.

Further updates are provided below:

National Engineering College TNEA cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list for admission to the BTech course and its various branches. The cutoff was announced for the reserved and unreserved categories belonging to the All India quota.
For the General AI category, the overall cutoff ranged from 17036 to 65314. According to the last round, the most competitive specialisation was , with a cutoff of .

Students can view the National Engineering College BTech cutoff for 2025, as well as the cutoff details for 2024 and 2023 across various rounds, categories, and branches. For the General AI category, the most competitive branch for admission during the last round at National Engineering College was B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering, with a cutoff rank of 17036.

Getting an idea of previous years' cutoffs helps students better understand the cutoff trends and prepare for the upcoming exams accordingly. To assist in the same, below is a table provided where students can view or download the consolidated round and year-wise TNEA cutoff PDFs. reviews.review_text: The green environment with all the required amenities. Our campus was fitted with all the safety measures like earthquake resistance and emergency cylinders. Facilities like lifts should be used by teachers and differently abled persons. Canteens are available with good quality of foods.

reviews.review_heading: Your concepts will be very clear.
reviews.review_text: The canteen and mess are clean and provide satisfactory food. Hostel rooms and washrooms are also cleaned daily, and classrooms are equipped with AC. The library is large, and the labs are well-equipped. Basic medical help and a sports area are available.

reviews.review_heading: Curriculum is Pretty Nice.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is okay, not that bad at all. The classrooms are modern and well-designed, with good computer labs. Laptop training is provided and encouraged. We have good hostels with AC and attached washrooms for a comfortable stay, and the food is also healthy.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, satisfactory facilities are available at this college.
reviews.review_text: National Engineering College is having a good infrastructure for our course. The college has library, canteen, Wi-Fi, sports, etc. facilities for the students. Labs with all equipment available for the students. Food available at the college canteen can be improved. Various sports tournaments are conducted at this college as the college focuses on promoting sports activities.

reviews.review_heading: Review about National Engineering College.
reviews.review_text:
Wi-Fi has high-speed internet access available throughout the department and campus. 
Computer labs are equipped with the latest hardware and software to support a variety of programming and development tasks. Well-furnished rooms with options for single, double, or triple occupancy. Nutritious and balanced meals are provided three times a day.
Different cuisines are offered with a rotating menu.

reviews.review_heading: About my college journey.
reviews.review_text: Our college supports various undergraduate and postgraduate courses. The overall facilities available at our college were really good. I was amazed with the infrastructure of our college often. We have a large sports stadium, an open auditorium and close auditoriums too.

reviews.review_heading: National Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: We are served with hygienic and nutritious food. The food is available at all times on our campus. There are separate hostel facilities for boys and girls students, and there are certain restrictions on student movements outside the campus. They maintain a neat and healthy campus.

reviews.review_heading: National engineering college.
reviews.review_text: It’s a healthy, hygienic, and peaceful environment to pursue our higher education. We have friendly faculty members in our college, and they arrange all the medical facilities within our campus. They also provide all the necessary facilities for our students.

reviews.review_heading: Review of National Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: The National Engineering College has very constructive infrastructure. It has big, spacious classrooms with all the needed facilities like projectors, smart classes and so on. It's a peaceful and eco-friendly environment to do our best without any distractions.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college.
reviews.review_text: It is an excellent college. Wi-Fi is available. Our college provides a high-voltage lab. The hostel serves both vegetarian and non-vegetarian meals. Our college has good infrastructure. The atmosphere of the college is pleasant. Many books are available in the library.

reviews.review_heading: Very satisfied with good placements, infrastructure and faculty members .
reviews.review_text: In our department, we have Wi-Fi, three labs, department library and a seminar hall, elective hall. We also have an hall for placement and project discussion. In each lab, there will be more than 50 computers. We have a football ground, cricket ground with nets and hockey ground, basketball court, tennis court, shuttle court and throw ball, volleyball court. In our college, the quality of food provide by canteen and hostel mess are good.

reviews_list.review_title: Not satisfied. Faculty has zero knowledge, but placements are good. We have a decent infrastructure.

overview_faqs.question: Is it worth to consider Malla Reddy Engineering College as a good Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Malla Reddy Engineering College is a reputed institute for B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Engineering, Business & Management Studies. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. As per Shiksha verified reviews, Malla Reddy Engineering College has a rating of 4.1 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 4.3 on campuslife, 3.9 on placements, 4 on faculty and 4.2 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Malla Reddy Engineering College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: A good college average to moderate can join if you have a lot of interest in studies.

content.Placements: 20 percent of students got placed in our college from the ECE department because it is the correct department, and companies were demanding software skills, but from this year, even core branches will learn coding and industry-ready skills, so this will help us in the future for placements. The highest package in our college is 24 LPA, and the lowest is 4 LPA. Renault, Infosys, and Amazon are the top recruiting companies this year. 60 percent of the students got internships based on their calibre, and the above-mentioned companies hire them.
content.Infrastructure: I am not a hostler. I don't know about the hostel, but the infrastructure of our college is good. All of our classrooms got renovated this year to smart classes, digital boards, long benches, ethernet cables, and several labs library is good, they added books that are compatible with today's generation.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It's good on the whole but the quality of placements in the current year 2026 is satisfactory.

content.Placements: My college has a placement percentage of around 40% till now in my course. The highest package is 6 LPA, and the lowest is 2.4 LPA. One of the top recruiting companies that come to my college is Renault Nissan (a manufacturing company). Around 10% of students got internships, and the companies are Zepto, Thermopads, Zen Technologies, etc. The top role offered in my course is VLSI and embedded engineer at present.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure of my department are top-notch. They include good Wi-Fi, lab equipments, classrooms, clean washrooms, drinking water, and also an excellent library for learning. There is an issue regarding the campus hostels' food which is very unclean but now they offer quite good food only. The canteen, medical facilities, and sports are also top-notch.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Not satisfied. Faculty has zero knowledge, but placements are good. We have a decent infrastructure.

content.Placements: There is approximately 80% placements. The highest package is 25 LPA, the lowest package is 2 LPA, and the average package is 4-5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Amazon, Microsoft, TCS, and IBM. Only 2 students got internships: one at Vivnovation and the other at Life Guru organisation. Top roles offered are Software Developer and Data Scientist.
content.Infrastructure: There is decent infrastructure and no proper Wi-Fi, and there will be no signal. Computers in the lab don't work properly, and the AC does not work. No proper infrastructure. Only some work. In the hostel, the quality of food is okay, there are decent medical facilities, and there are no sports and games.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: MREC (MRDU) review: Strict faculty, strong skills and curriculum

content.Placements: Placements are pretty good, with the highest package as I know being 21 LPA from the IT department, and the AIML department has also received good placements this year while the college provides professional training and students from any branch can achieve any company.
content.Infrastructure: The new block for us (1st year) is the best, with good classrooms, high-speed Wi-Fi, well-equipped modern labs, a huge well-infrastructure library, good mess and canteen, though the playground is short and not good for cricket.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: The training program is very helpful.

content.Placements: Almost 85% are placed. The highest package is 96 LPA, the lowest package is 2.6 LPA, and the average package is 4.5 LPA. Amazon, Google, Infosys, Wipro, West Gold Resources, etc. Internships are based on students' interests. They can apply online, and written test exams are conducted on the college campus and off-campus.
content.Infrastructure: We have the best infrastructure in the whole of Telangana state. We have built-in Wi-Fi and smart screens in our class. We have a library with 10,000+ books, Wi-Fi, and a research area. The hostel is very well-maintained, and the food is very tasty. In the canteen, the staff is very hygienic and have good taste. We have NCC camps in our college and cricket matches.

admission_overview.college_name: Malla Reddy Engineering College Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

admission_process.title: Malla Reddy Engineering College Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Malla Reddy Engineering College admissions are based on merit. The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.Malla Reddy Engineering Collegeoffers courses at UG and PG levels. Some of the courses include B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 3,09,000 - 4,60,000. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 3 years - 4 years. PG courses are offered for 2 years.

reviews.review_heading: MREC (MRDU) review: Strict faculty, strong skills and curriculum

reviews.review_heading: The training program is very helpful.
reviews.review_text: We have the best infrastructure in the whole of Telangana state. We have built-in Wi-Fi and smart screens in our class. We have a library with 10,000+ books, Wi-Fi, and a research area. The hostel is very well-maintained, and the food is very tasty. In the canteen, the staff is very hygienic and have good taste. We have NCC camps in our college and cricket matches.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college with NAAC A+.
reviews.review_text: The college has digital classrooms, a well-equipped, very good auditorium, and an exceptional library. Very decent and good food is available in our hostel. Our college is collaborating with Google, and it is very useful for everyone because nowadays many students are using AI to solve problems and learn coding, so it is very useful with Google as Gemini AI.

reviews.review_heading: You will learn many things.
reviews.review_text: MREC College has well-equipped labs, smart classrooms, a library and campus Wi-Fi. Hostels are decent with basic facilities. Mess food is average, and a canteen is available. Medical aid, sports grounds and indoor games facilities are available. The food is also very good.

reviews.review_heading: Best college to recommend in the budget with professional experience.
reviews.review_text: The hostel building is very spacious and is a new building, with 4 blocks, each block has 4 floors. It's a 24-hour Wi-Fi connection, and the mess is neat and clean. Moreover, it has a spacious place outside. It also has gym facilities with a proper trainer. The taste is good in the canteen.

reviews.review_heading: A good campus where we are able to learn and acquire knowledge for our future.
reviews.review_text: We are comfortable with our department infrastructure, like labs, classrooms, and internships, as well as extracurricular activities and support from our course department. Facilities provided by our hostel are too good, with better food and also snacks according to the time. We can also play games we like during an allocated period of time.

reviews.review_heading: The good and bad things between.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided are very good when compared. The infrastructure is good, although Wi-Fi is not provided properly. Classrooms are good, and the library is very well maintained. They provide good food and medical facilities, but sometimes time is not given for games.

reviews.review_heading: Best infrastructure and good placements.
reviews.review_text: The best infrastructure is provided in college for both students and faculty. Computer labs are provided, and best electrical and communication labs are there. Every classroom has digital boards, and a library session is separately provided. Good quality in the hostel mess. Sports and games can be played in free time. There will be a separate session for sports.

reviews.review_heading: Good facilities in college.
reviews.review_text: It has good facilities of Wi-Fi and Internet in labs, classrooms, as well as the whole campus. The infrastructure is also very good. The quality of food in the hostel is medium, not very good and not so bad. Medical facilities are very good in our college, but they charge more money.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with good timings.
reviews.review_text: All labs are available. Food is okay in hostel. We have a huge cricket ground and many other sports too. It is a good college. It offers many courses, and there are also PG students.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with the structured plan of study and placement.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are very good, including classrooms, a library, and labs, but Wi-Fi is not provided in the classrooms. The atmosphere in the hostel is better, but the food quality in the mess needs improvement. The canteen food is the best. We also have a medical facility and an ambulance for emergencies. Coming to sports and games, we have many, but mostly, there are fewer events. The college mostly concentrates on studies and placements rather than other activities.

college_info.intro: DY Patil College of Engineering offers UG, PG, and PhD level courses in the streams of Engineering and Technology. BTech is offered at the UG level & MTech is offered at the PG level. BTech is one of the most popular programmes offered at DYPCOE Akurdi Pune. The college offers the BTech programme in over 8 major specialisations such as Computer Engineering, Electronics & Telecommunication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Artificial Intelligence & Data Science, etc. DYPCOE Akurdi BTech programme is a full-time programme, offered for a duration of four years. Multiple internships & placement opportunities are offered to the students. The career opportunities offered to DYPCOE Akurdi BTech graduates include Business Intelligence Analyst, Data Analyst, Software Developer, etc. Top companies like Amazon, Tech Mahindra, Capgemini, etc come for the placements to hire the students. fees_and_eligibility.overview: Offering a total of 22 courses at the UG and PG level, D.Y. Patil College of Engineering offers the respective courses in the stream of Engineering & Technology. The Institute offers BTech and MTech at the UG and PG level in full-time mode. The college offers the BTech programme in over 8 major specialisations such as Computer Engineering, Electronics & Telecommunication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Artificial Intelligence & Data Science, etc. Admission to the respective courses is offered based on valid scores of Class 12 and graduation. However, the final admission would require candidates to meet the cutoff criteria. DYPCOE total tuition fees ranges from, differing as per the specialisations.

faqs.answer: A:    The fee structure is different for different courses. It is based on the stream and duration of the courses. overview_faqs.question: Is DY Patil College of Engineering a good college?
overview_faqs.answer: DY Patil College of Engineering is a private institute located in Akrudi, Pune. It is affiliated with the Savitribai Phule Pune University. It has received the status of 'Autonomous Institute' and is accredited with an 'A+' Grade by NAAC & NBA. India Today has ranked it 63 under the 'Engineering' category in 2025 & 35 in the 'Engineering (Private)' category. The courses are offered at UG, PG, and PhD levels in the streams of Engineering and Technology. It is overall a good college with experienced faculty, good infrastructure & multiple placement opportunities.

review_summary.college_name: DYPCOE Akurdi Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2030
individual_reviews.title: Decent faculty, decent infra, decent placements.

content.Placements: As far as I know, if you study decently and avoid backlogs and all that stains on your academics, you are going to get placed here. The college has tie-ups with some really reputable companies like Tata, Mahindra, and all, and students do get placed with good packages.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available, of course, there are 2 libraries, labs are good, and classrooms are also decent. Some benches are small tho. There are two cafeterias, an indoor sports hall with two tt tables and some board games. Speaking about the quality, they were all just renovated months ago, but even before that, the quality was still good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college with good placements, top faculty members, and good infrastructure.

content.Placements: Around 70-80 percent of students get selected. I don't know about the highest package, but the average package offered ranges from 5.5-6 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our course are Cognizant, Infosys, Accenture, TCS, etc. Nearly 80 percent of students got internships, including paid and unpaid internships.

In the library, there are almost all books related to the engineering field. Facilities provided in the hostel are good. The mess is average. Medical facilities are available from the college itself. For sports, the college has its own ground. All sports equipment is present here.

admission_process.title: DY Patil Akurdi Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: DY Patil College of engineering admissions are entrance based. The shortlisting is depending on scores at the accepted entrance examination, and subsequent selection rounds/counselling. The admission process steps are explained below:
STEP 1: DY Patil College of Engineering Application Process 2025.

Admission DY Patil College of Engineering course, admission should visit its official site in order to apply online. The applicants should write the MHT CET/ JEE Main/ GATE entrance examination to apply to the BTech / MTech courses.
STEP 2: Release of Cutoff List

Once the application is processed, cutoff list of the courses is released by the institute. The cutoff list means the lowest possible score in the respective entrance exam a candidate has to reach to become eligible to get admission.
STEP 3: Counselling
Applicants must undergo CAP counselling (DTE Maharashtra) to be assigned a seat.
STEP 4: Confirmation of Admission.
Seats are then assigned to the skilled candidates after the selection rounds and counselling. The chosen students may also make the necessary fee to secure their seats.
For more information about DY Patil College of Engineering check out the below video:

faqs.question: Is it easy to get admission in DYPCOE?
faqs.answer: It can be challenging to seek admission at DY Patil College of Engineering, considering the cutoff marks for the respective entrance exams. The Institute offers M.Tech and BTech on the basis of valid scores on accepted entrance exams such as JEE Main, MHT CET and other equivalent national level exams. After qualifying the counselling round, candidates receive the final admission offer. Apart from this, candidates must secure a 45% in Class 12 and 50% in graduation, to qualify the initial stage.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to DY Patil COE, Pune for BTech?
faqs.answer: BTech admission at DY Patil College of Engineering is subject to CAP counselling conducted by DTE Maharashtra on the basis of valid scores in MHTCET/ JEE Main and GATE exams. The minimum eligibility criteria for BTech is to pass Class 12/ Diploma in Engineering and Technology with 50% aggregate (45% in case of Backward class & PwD candidates from Maharashtra) with Physics & Mathematics as compulsory subjects along with Chemistry or Biotechnology or Biology or Technical Vocational subjects. Those who are eligible and have a valid score in MHT CET/ JEE Main Paper- I can apply for CAP counselling on the official website of DTE Maharashtra for final seat allotment.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to DYPCOE?
faqs.answer: As per the official website of DY Patil College of Engineering, 20% of the seats are reserved for the college management. The students seeking admission to these seats are advised to contact the admission cell in charge for more details on this. If a student is not sure about the marks and admission via different rounds, it is better to take admission after the fourth round only or before the second round.

For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 35834 and 99038 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. highlights: 1,677 CDs, supplemented by 5,000+ NPTEL video lectures

hostel.description: The brand-new hostel at DYPCOE will offer a modern, comfortable, and engaging living experience for both boys and girls. It will feature spacious single and multiple-bedded rooms with attached washrooms, ensuring privacy and convenience. The hostel will be equipped with a variety of amenities, including a state-of-the-art Indoor Sports Complex, a fully-equipped gym, a Mini Shopping Arcade, and a large Dining Hall serving nutritious meals. Additionally, a quiet Reading Room and a cozy TV room will provide spaces for relaxation and study. With ample room for both individual and communal activities, this hostel is designed to cater to students' academic, social, and recreational needs, making it an ideal place for student life at DYPCOE.
facilities: 1,677 CDs, supplemented by 5,000+ NPTEL video lectures

data: Classrooms, Library, Sports Facilities, Hostels and more

library.description:
DYPCOE is having total 677.72 sqm. specious area for central Library. It consist 46,455 books with 13,823 titles, 174 book bank sets, 83 Indian Journals, 5,828 International Journals, 1,677 CDs and 5,000+ NPTEL Video Lectures (Phase I & II). Library have different sections like book stacking, periodicals, reference, PG Section, digital library with 10 nodes & well ventilated reading hall with capacity of 150+ students.
It has many services like Circulation Service, OPAC, Reference Service, Newspaper Clipping Service, access to e-journals, Library Website, CAS, SDI etc. Linkages with Libraries of renowned Institutes like Indian Institute of Technology, Bombay (IIT) and The Automotive Research Association of India (ARAI).
