reviews.review_heading: Decent faculty, decent infra, decent placements.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available, of course, there are 2 libraries, labs are good, and classrooms are also decent. Some benches are small tho. There are two cafeterias, an indoor sports hall with two tt tables and some board games. Speaking about the quality, they were all just renovated months ago, but even before that, the quality was still good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with good placements, top faculty members, and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The college is equipped with Wi-Fi. Classrooms are well-equipped with smart boards and comfortable benches. In the library, there are almost all books related to the engineering field. Facilities provided in the hostel are good. The mess is average. Medical facilities are available from the college itself. For sports, the college has its own ground. All sports equipment is present here.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with my college about the course, placements, faculty members, and events.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is so big and very beautiful. College is surrounded by so much greenery. The environment with teachers and other students is also good. In each lab, there is Wi-Fi. Almost all classrooms are digital. There is also a library so that you can read or gain knowledge from it. Hostel facilities are also pretty good. Since I am not a hosteller, I don't know much about it.

reviews.review_heading: The college provides good placements and supportive faculty.
reviews.review_text: DYPCOE Akurdi has a decent infrastructure with well-equipped classrooms, labs, and a library. Wi-Fi is available on campus. The hostel facilities are great, and the mess food is okay. It has basic medical facilities and decent sports grounds. Overall the college infrastructure is nice.

reviews.review_heading: Review of D.Y. Patil College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: The college has very good infrastructure with facilities like Wi-Fi, enough classrooms, a cafeteria, and a gym. Currently, the college doesn't have its own hostel, it is under construction and will be completed by July 2025. But, the quality of food in the college canteen is average.

reviews.review_heading: Review of D.Y. Patil College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities provided in the college are improving day by day. The college has one library and one reading room, with two campus cafeterias. There is also one smart store, which is helpful for students to buy stationery. A Xerox shop is available where students can get all the required materials for college activities. Wi-Fi networks are available for all students in every building. Additionally, projectors are present in every classroom, and the installation of smart boards...

reviews.review_heading: Average college with decent placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is old. Classrooms are also outdated. The Wi-Fi speed is also slow. The food of the college is average. The college has sports facilities like a playground. Events are organised in the college. Many games are also played.

reviews.review_heading: A good college for engineering.
reviews.review_text: DY Patil Educational Complex has one of the finest infrastructures in the entire state. With around 12 colleges in the complex, it becomes a great place for every student to be a part of. Almost every department has its own dedicated labs for related topics, which are fully functional and supervised by two lab assistants. There are around 40 classrooms in the college, and each department is allotted classrooms dedicated solely to its students to avoid any hassle.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with faculty members, though the campus placements are not .
reviews.review_text: All classrooms are having modern technology. Also, smart boards are available in the entire college. It has a hostel of its own, but it is very overpriced. Rather, you should live in a PG, which is way cheaper. The college shares its ground with Dy Patil School, and not many facilities are available. You are not allowed to use the sports ground without permission and are allowed only for fixed time and dates.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good vibes, environment, and a high-level education.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is average. There is a library with Wi-Fi and the labs are great. The campus is not that big but it is decent. It has a canteen with a lot of delicious stuff. There is a sports department which includes a gym, table tennis, and many other facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent infrastructure and highly educated staff.
reviews.review_text: Excellent infrastructure with spacious classrooms and corridors. They also have various clubs like sports, Kala Mandal, and NCC, which benefit us. There is also a huge and well-maintained library with an abundance of books. Hostel facility is not that good, but the canteen is clean.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of good faculties and good placement
reviews.review_text: There was a smart class room in our college, labs were highly maintained by faculties and assistants. Library were encouraging students to take boobs from them, reading room was highly maintained for students to study in good environment. Whole campus was covered with wifi.

reviews.review_heading: At the end, I want to say that college doesn’t matter; it depends on your skills.
reviews.review_text: The college doesn't have a hostel. It has a private hostel, but the fees for that hostel are very high. The infrastructure of the college is nice, and the labs are also in very good condition. The sports facility is not that good. All classrooms have AC and Wi-Fi. The fees for the hostel are 2,35,000.

reviews.review_heading: Review of D.Y. Patil College of Engineering, Akurdi.
reviews.review_text:
All the infrastructure of the college is nice and big; the sports complex is also very big, and the campus of the college is very large.
If we talk about the hostel, the hostel of college is also good, and it has all the facilities like a washing machine and induction.

reviews.review_heading: Great infrastructure and fest vibes!!
reviews.review_text: My college has the best infrastructure, aslo dyp is famous for its infrastructure. The monsoon season it dyp is just wow! The wifi facility is too good.In our college library not only have academic stuff but also self growth books also. We have a reading room in which the readers got the perfect place to read of their favourite books.

college_info.college_name: DYPCOE Akurdi Scholarship Details

paragraphs: DYPCOE offers courses at the UG and PG level with the durations varying from 2 years to 4 years. The Institute offers BTech and M.Tech in various specialisations in full-time mode on the basis of merit and accepted entrance exams. Candidates must secure valid scores in accepted entrance exams such as JEE Main and MHT CET. Furthermore, the Institute offers the respective courses with a tuition fees varying from INR 1.66 Lacs to INR 4.55 Lakh. Considering other private institutes, DYPCOE offers the respective courses at an affordable cost.

The fee structure is different for different courses. It is based on the stream and duration of the courses. Additional  fees like that of hostels can also be added in the yearly fee structure if one opts for it. As the admission cycle starts for any course, the college will give all the information about the fee structure on its official page.

DY Patil College of Engineering offers BTech in Information Technology for the duration of 4 years with an annual intake of 180 students. The Institute offers the respective course with a total tuition fees worth INR 4.55 lakh. Admission to the respective course is offered on the basis of 45% Class 12 aggregate in valid scores of MHT CET, JEE Main and others.
Engineering students receive INR 50,000 scholarship annually under the University Entry Scheme of Schneider Electric India Foundation.

reviews_list.review_title: Goldmine for hardworking students.

review_content.Placements: Around 90% of students are placed in the last year of 2024. 100-200 students can easily grab 10 LPA on campus if they do hard work. Top recruiting companies involved Goldman Sachs, De Shaw, Atlassian, Microsoft, and ZS Associates. There is no official data for on-campus internships, but students often easily crack internships in their 3rd or final year from off campus. Top roles include SDE, system engineer and data analyst.
review_content.Infrastructure: MAIT offers decent infrastructure for CSE students with reliable Wi-Fi in academic blocks, well-maintained computer labs equipped with usable systems, clean classrooms with projectors, and a quiet, resourceful library that's great for long study hours. The hostel facilities are average. Rooms are clean and basic, washrooms are maintained regularly, and hot water usually works fine. The mess food is manageable, but not something you'll look forward to every day, it's mostly repetitive but edible. The canteen is better than the mess, with more variety and better taste. Medical facilities are available on campus for basic needs.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied from the college.

review_content.Placements: 80% of students got placed on campus, the lowest package is 3.2 LPA, and the highest is 1.2 crore per annum in a US-based firm. Top recruiting companies are Microsoft, Amazon, Deloitte, Infosys, TCS, and ZS Associates. About 20% of students got internships. Top roles offered are Data Scientist, ML Engineer, and Software Developer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classes can be good, seats are like school, and they teach on whiteboards it's such an old method. Labs are good, we have good computers, and the library is also great; we have a separate building. However, the Ethernet speed is slow, around 10MB/s. Wi-Fi is present, but the speed is too slow. There are 6 canteens. The food is good, and the prices are also low. We have Nescafé, Amul, and local canteens. We have a sports ground, a badminton court, a basketball court, and a cricket practice net. It also has a hospital for emergencies.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Disappointed with the written work and Wi-Fi speed available inside the college premises.

review_content.Placements: 80 percent of students get placement. 1.34 off-campus is the highest, and 4 LPA is the lowest package. Infosys and TCS are the top recruiting companies. Samsung and other companies offer internships to almost all students. Software engineer roles are offered to most of the students who top.
review_content.Infrastructure: Very slow-speed Wi-Fi is provided, and the infrastructure of classrooms is also poor. The library is decent, and Ethernet is provided, but again, the speed is slow. The college provides necessary infrastructure, facilities, and equipment for engineering students, including clean, well-maintained classrooms with smart boards. Hostel facilities are available for male students only, accommodating about 186 students in single, double, or four-bed rooms.

review_summary.college_name: Maharaja Agrasen Institute of Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering (Advance Communication Technology) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It is an outstanding college as compared to other IPU colleges.

content.Placements: Placements were average. Around 45-50% of students got placed. The highest package was more than 20 LPA. Companies like TCS, Wipro, and Infosys visited. Internships were limited and mostly obtained through self-efforts. The college offers many roles in academics and sports also.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is quite good. Labs, classrooms, and the library are all well maintained. Students can use books from the library to avoid expenses and to buy books. Sports facilities are available. Several canteens are on campus. Medical facilities are available in case of emergency.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Not very satisfied because placements have been going down right after I joined.

content.Placements: As I am in the 2027 batch, no students are placed right now. Our batch has just started the 6th sem, and regarding internships, I have heard from seniors that companies come after the 6th semester for internships, and Visa has recently come to our campus for hiring interns, and we might get good placement in 2027.
content.Infrastructure: The college campus is good but not too big. It's average, we have a playing area, ground, and all basic facilities like Wi-Fi, a good library, and drinking water, and canteens are okay too, not very good, but they are good, and 1 doctor is always available on the campus. I personally have visited him.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Goldmine for hardworking students.

content.Placements: Around 90% of students are placed in the last year of 2024. 100-200 students can easily grab 10 LPA on campus if they do hard work. Top recruiting companies involved Goldman Sachs, De Shaw, Atlassian, Microsoft, and ZS Associates. There is no official data for on-campus internships, but students often easily crack internships in their 3rd or final year from off campus. Top roles include SDE, system engineer and data analyst.
content.Infrastructure: MAIT offers decent infrastructure for CSE students with reliable Wi-Fi in academic blocks, well-maintained computer labs equipped with usable systems, clean classrooms with projectors, and a quiet, resourceful library that's great for long study hours. The hostel facilities are average. Rooms are clean and basic, washrooms are maintained regularly, and hot water usually works fine. The mess food is manageable, but not something you'll look forward to every day, it's mostly repetitive but edible. The canteen is better than the mess, with more variety and better taste. Medical facilities are available on campus for basic needs.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied from the college.

content.Placements: 80% of students got placed on campus, the lowest package is 3.2 LPA, and the highest is 1.2 crore per annum in a US-based firm. Top recruiting companies are Microsoft, Amazon, Deloitte, Infosys, TCS, and ZS Associates. About 20% of students got internships. Top roles offered are Data Scientist, ML Engineer, and Software Developer.
content.Infrastructure: Classes can be good, seats are like school, and they teach on whiteboards it's such an old method. Labs are good, we have good computers, and the library is also great; we have a separate building. However, the Ethernet speed is slow, around 10MB/s. Wi-Fi is present, but the speed is too slow. There are 6 canteens. The food is good, and the prices are also low. We have Nescafé, Amul, and local canteens. We have a sports ground, a badminton court, a basketball court, and a cricket practice net. It also has a hospital for emergencies.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Disappointed with the written work and Wi-Fi speed available inside the college premises.

content.Placements: 80 percent of students get placement. 1.34 off-campus is the highest, and 4 LPA is the lowest package. Infosys and TCS are the top recruiting companies. Samsung and other companies offer internships to almost all students. Software engineer roles are offered to most of the students who top.
content.Infrastructure: Very slow-speed Wi-Fi is provided, and the infrastructure of classrooms is also poor. The library is decent, and Ethernet is provided, but again, the speed is slow. The college provides necessary infrastructure, facilities, and equipment for engineering students, including clean, well-maintained classrooms with smart boards. Hostel facilities are available for male students only, accommodating about 186 students in single, double, or four-bed rooms.

reviews.review_heading: It is an outstanding college as compared to other IPU colleges.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is quite good. Labs, classrooms, and the library are all well maintained. Students can use books from the library to avoid expenses and to buy books. Sports facilities are available. Several canteens are on campus. Medical facilities are available in case of emergency.

reviews.review_heading: Not very satisfied because placements have been going down right after I joined.
reviews.review_text: The college campus is good but not too big. It's average, we have a playing area, ground, and all basic facilities like Wi-Fi, a good library, and drinking water, and canteens are okay too, not very good, but they are good, and 1 doctor is always available on the campus. I personally have visited him.

reviews.review_heading: Goldmine for hardworking students.
reviews.review_text: MAIT offers decent infrastructure for CSE students with reliable Wi-Fi in academic blocks, well-maintained computer labs equipped with usable systems, clean classrooms with projectors, and a quiet, resourceful library that's great for long study hours. The hostel facilities are average. Rooms are clean and basic, washrooms are maintained regularly, and hot water usually works fine. The mess food is manageable, but not something you'll look forward to every day, it's mostly repetitive but edible....

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied from the college.
reviews.review_text: Classes can be good, seats are like school, and they teach on whiteboards it's such an old method. Labs are good, we have good computers, and the library is also great; we have a separate building. However, the Ethernet speed is slow, around 10MB/s. Wi-Fi is present, but the speed is too slow. There are 6 canteens. The food is good, and the prices are also low. We have Nescafé, Amul, and local canteens. We have a sports ground, a badminton court, a basketball court, and a cricket practice net. I...

reviews.review_heading: Disappointed with the written work and Wi-Fi speed available inside the college premises.
reviews.review_text: Very slow-speed Wi-Fi is provided, and the infrastructure of classrooms is also poor. The library is decent, and Ethernet is provided, but again, the speed is slow. The college provides necessary infrastructure, facilities, and equipment for engineering students, including clean, well-maintained classrooms with smart boards. Hostel facilities are available for male students only, accommodating about 186 students in single, double, or four-bed rooms.

reviews.review_heading: A decent college with supportive faculty provided the student is willing to put in effort.
reviews.review_text: Wi-fi is not only for students only for faculty members. Labs are okay, classrooms give a school type feel one block is as exception which is newly constructed and has been well designed. Auditorium is great one of the best as compared to any of the colleges in Delhi even IIT or many DU colleges cannot match the spaciousness of auditorium. Canteens too are a good part as there are around 5 to 6 of them which makes it diverse. Sports is okay not too good not too bad.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements in MAIT. Teachers are coordinating.
reviews.review_text: There are well equipped labs, classrooms, and a library with a strong Wi-Fi connection. Labs and classrooms are equipped with ACs. Classrooms are equipped with a monitor and are fully ventilated. Labs also have well mannered and trained assistants who help students with any sort of problem.

reviews.review_heading: My college is my choice, a good choice.
reviews.review_text: Faculty are good, and quite helpful, and they also help when help is needed. Lawns are also well-equipped, and Wi-Fi strength is good. However, sports facilities are below average, and there are no major events related to them. Hence, quite good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied with the college events.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is nice, but the availability of hostels is low. As I am a girl, the girls’ hostel isn't there on the campus. The boys' hostel is on the campus but it is too expensive, so I would suggest you take a PG. The classrooms are okay not that good, but decent enough.

reviews.review_heading: Strong placement, decent infrastructure, and average faculty members.
reviews.review_text: MAIT offers good infrastructure with Wi-Fi, spacious classrooms, computer labs, and a well-stocked library. Hostel facilities are average. Mess food is decent. Canteen is good. Sports facilities are available, and basic medical support is provided. It is a good college.

reviews.review_heading: Life in MAIT - From fests to studies.
reviews.review_text: Campus infrastructure is quite old but is in decent condition, and same for the hostel. Labs are not very big but have decent facilities. The lab faculty is very supportive and very helpful. Wi-Fi is very weak. Library is quite big and has a lot of very good books and journals which vary from engineering books to books for management studies. Quality of food in the canteen is great in taste and quality, and also at an affordable price. Sports and games are not very prominent in college, and curr...

reviews.review_heading: MAIT offers you everything exceptionally well, just go with the flow.
reviews.review_text: I am not enrolled in hostel but my friends say that rooms are spacious, clean, and fully furnished with ACs, beds, almirah, and study tables. They are highly raised about the mess food which is too good. There are sports for hostel students like tennis, badminton, and board games.

reviews.review_heading: Good exposure and great minds.
reviews.review_text:
Not a very good infrastructure of the hostel, it's a small hostel with like seats of max 100-200 students, it's average, a little overpriced, but people prefer the hostel too.
Food is decent, other facilities are decent too, not too fancy nor spacious. 
College infrastructure is also so old, but there is a new building for CSE and AI ML, and it is pretty new with new infrastructure, which is also decent.

reviews.review_heading: A very brief review of MAIT.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi does not work, and internet speed is very slow inside classrooms. I am not a hostel student but have heard that the mess food is pretty good. Sports facilities are very bad, and the ground is also very small. There is a badminton court but that is also paid.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the faculty, placements are decent, and good crowd, etc.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are just like school, with wooden desks and old whiteboards with no smart board. There are two ACs in each classroom, which is a good thing, but sometimes its not working. If we talk about, for example, labs, CSE labs, AI labs, Chemistry labs, then they are well maintained, and the facilities are pretty good in the labs.

likes.text: Many companies like Azcom, Deep Logic, Infosys, Accenture, Libsys, Wipro, ZS Associate, Mu Sigma, Polestar, Start Labs, etc., visit our campus for placements.
The campus placements at MAIT are obviously not overwhelming but a decent hard work during your college life would land you up in some great companies.

college_info.college_name: Maharaja Agrasen Institute of Technology Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Maharaja Agrasen Institute of Technology fees structure is inclusive of multiple components, such as tuition fee, hostel fee, admission fee, library fee, caution deposit, etc. Certain components need to be paid only once during admission, while the remaining are charged by Maharaja Agrasen Institute of Technology as per the institute's fee guidelines. Maharaja Agrasen Institute of Technology fee ranges between INR 3,26,600 and INR 5,52,800
For B.Tech the tution fees is 5.53 lakhs
At Maharaja Agrasen Institute of Technology (MAIT), the total tuition fees for B.E./B.Tech programs are around INR 5.53 Lakh, while MBA/PGDM programs cost approximately INR 3.27 Lakh.
Here's a more detailed breakdown of fees for various courses at MAIT:
B.E./B.Tech Programs
Total Tuition Fees: INR 5.53 Lakh
Courses Offered: MAIT offers a 4-year B.Tech programme in various specializations, including Computer Science and Technology, and Information Technology and Engineering.
Other Fees: Apart from tuition, there are refundable security fees

For UG courses at Maharaja Agrasen Institute of Technology (MAIT), the total tuition fee for a B.E./B.Tech programme is approximately INR 5.53 lakhs, with additional hostel fees ranging from INR 1,30,000 to INR 1,96,000.

Maharaja Agrasen Institute of Technology (MAIT) maintains different types of scholarship programs for the postgraduate scholars pursuing their MBA degrees. Merit-based awards are given to students scoring high in CAT, CMAT, or IPU CET entrance examinations, and they could get very good fee waivers.

The EWS scheme is followed by the institute, under which the students from the economically weaker sections get relief as per government provisions. The other scholarships available are the state-sponsored ones for Delhi residents or for students of reserved categories (SC/ST/OBC), according to eligibility.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Maharaja Surajmal Institute of Technology is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and Teaching & Education. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.E. / B.Tech and B.Ed. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include MBA/PGDM. The fee structure for the Maharaja Surajmal Institute of Technology programmes is around INR 4,68,800 to 5,38,200.

faqs.answer: A:    For admission to the MBA program at Maharaja Surajmal Institute of Technology,a few popular exams accepted by the institution for admission are:* IPU CET(Indraprastha University Common Entrance Test)* CAT(Common Admission Test)* CMAT(Common Management Admission Council)* CET(Common Entrance Test)*  GGSIPU CET( Guru Gobind Singh Indraprastha University Common Entrance Test ).• The highest package offered is 12.5LPA and the average salary for these graduates is (4.3-5) LPA.
faqs.question: What entrance exams are accepted by Maharaja Surajmal Institute of Technology for admission to MBA?

faqs.answer: A:    The application fee for the B.Tech program at Maharaja Surajmal Institute of Technology is Rs. 1000. MSIT offers a 4 years B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering course at the UG level. The course is ranked 237 as per NIRF 2024. The total tuition fee for this course is INR 468800 for entire duration of the course. Apart from the tuition fee, students are also required to pay hostel fee of INR 47000. The course offers admission to 180 students.
faqs.question: What is the application fee for the B.Tech. program at Maharaja Surajmal Institute of Technology?

faqs.answer: A:    Admissions to Maharaja Surajmal Institute of Technology are highly competitive, and the selection process varies depending on the program. Online registration for the online counseling process is required.Getting into Maharaja Surajmal Institute of Technology can be challenging.

reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college in Delhi-NCR with good placement records and a decent college life.

review_content.Placements: Placements are good here. We can get an average 5 LPA - 6 LPA if we have skills, which is good in terms of return on investment. The fee here is 6 LPA for the entire B.Tech duration (4 years). The highest package in 2024 was 50 LPA which was very good.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is basic here but it has all the basic needs. The hostel is also pretty average. The campus size is on the smaller side but the location (Janakpuri) is good. We can find everything nearby, and have ease of transport because metro station is also nearby.

Management is improving infrastructure day by day as per the changes required. I have seen drastic changes in infrastructure in terms of betterment during my 4 years.

review_summary.college_name: Maharaja Surajmal Institute of Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Second Shift) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Review of Maharaja Surajmal Institute of Technology.

content.Placements: A lot of students were placed last year in mass recruiting companies like HCL, Infosys, and TCS. The highest on campus was around 10 LPA, while the lowest and average are somewhere in the same range, 3 LPA. Students do get internships from companies (like the mass recruiting companies).
content.Infrastructure: The library (7/10), classrooms - school desks, and a few classes have ACs. All the labs are well-equipped and maintained (10/10). Wi-Fi facility is only in the boys' and girls' rooms. The food quality is mid in the canteen. There are zero sports and games facilities. Students can roam around, walk, sit, and play, but they have to bring sports stuff from their homes.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: An average college with good academics but boring campus life.

content.Placements: Placements are average at MSIT this year. We can expect the package to range from 4-5 LPA. More than 80 companies visit the college, but they are not willing to take students, maybe due to the recession. In the previous year, Google, Microsoft, and Amazon visited the college, but this year, not a single company visited the college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is average. Windows of classrooms are broken. Fans are not running. AC is installed but not working. When I talked to my friend about hostel facilities, he told me that rooms are not that spacious. There are 4 students in a room, which is too many. Food is not that good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college in Delhi-NCR with good placement records and a decent college life.

content.Placements: Placements are good here. We can get an average 5 LPA - 6 LPA if we have skills, which is good in terms of return on investment. The fee here is 6 LPA for the entire B.Tech duration (4 years). The highest package in 2024 was 50 LPA which was very good.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is basic here but it has all the basic needs. The hostel is also pretty average. The campus size is on the smaller side but the location (Janakpuri) is good. We can find everything nearby, and have ease of transport because metro station is also nearby.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering (Second Shift) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Review of MSIT of 2019 pass out of the ECE stream.

content.Placements: Overall placement is good for the CS and IT streams. For ECE, they call not too big companies. Small companies will come and will give small packages. ECE people have only hope of mass recruiters like Infosys and TCS. So, I advise not to be totally dependent on college for placements.
content.Infrastructure: The college is old, ancient brick structure-like building, but strong. They need further major upgradation. Overall, the infrastructure is good. Management is improving infrastructure day by day as per the changes required. I have seen drastic changes in infrastructure in terms of betterment during my 4 years.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: If you have a choice other than this, don't come to MSIT.

content.Placements: Current states of placement are just bad. The highest on-campus company was 17LPA. But keeping the feels, JEE Main rank, and current market scenario in account, then it might feel average. The average package is around 5 LPA-6LPA ( used to be 7LPA two years ago, college downfall).
content.Infrastructure: Too old and school vibes in college, the rooms do not have AC, and the ones with AC are just dead. The canteen is just built and sells just 4 things, which are often burnt or too plain. Sport Facility is just that, you have a ground, no equipment is provided, and you just get scolded. No Wi-Fi, and even data is very rare. The college strictly needs some renovation.

hostel_campus.college_name: Maharaja Surajmal Institute of Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Review of Maharaja Surajmal Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: The library (7/10), classrooms - school desks, and a few classes have ACs. All the labs are well-equipped and maintained (10/10). Wi-Fi facility is only in the boys' and girls' rooms. The food quality is mid in the canteen. There are zero sports and games facilities. Students can roam around, walk, sit, and play, but they have to bring sports stuff from their homes.

reviews.review_heading: An average college with good academics but boring campus life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average. Windows of classrooms are broken. Fans are not running. AC is installed but not working. When I talked to my friend about hostel facilities, he told me that rooms are not that spacious. There are 4 students in a room, which is too many. Food is not that good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college in Delhi-NCR with good placement records and a decent college life.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is basic here but it has all the basic needs. The hostel is also pretty average. The campus size is on the smaller side but the location (Janakpuri) is good. We can find everything nearby, and have ease of transport because metro station is also nearby.

reviews.review_heading: Review of MSIT of 2019 pass out of the ECE stream.
reviews.review_text: The college is old, ancient brick structure-like building, but strong. They need further major upgradation. Overall, the infrastructure is good. Management is improving infrastructure day by day as per the changes required. I have seen drastic changes in infrastructure in terms of betterment during my 4 years.

reviews.review_heading: If you have a choice other than this, don't come to MSIT.
reviews.review_text: Too old and school vibes in college, the rooms do not have AC, and the ones with AC are just dead. The canteen is just built and sells just 4 things, which are often burnt or too plain. Sport Facility is just that, you have a ground, no equipment is provided, and you just get scolded. No Wi-Fi, and even data is very rare. The college strictly needs some renovation.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of the poor infrastructure, no co curricular activities, and poor placements.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not available everywhere, and classes lack infrastructure. The benches are similar to school benches. AC is not available in all classes, and sometimes the lift is also not working. Hostel washrooms are not in good condition, and the quality of food is also below average in the mess and canteen. There is no medical facility on the campus, and sports facilities are also close to none.

reviews.review_heading: Campus size is too small, but placements and college are decent.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are old-school and there is no Wi-Fi. Labs are also old. The library is huge. The canteen is good. For sports, only a football ground is available. There is no AC in classrooms. The common room is always filled with people, and there are very limited sports opportunities in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Infra needs to get better. Rest college is good.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are in bad condition, no AC in classes, and the infrastructure is so bad that it's so hot there. Labs are decent, they have AC and Wi-Fi, a good library, and good infrastructure, so it's good. Mess food is bad, below-average canteen food is okay, but affordable.

reviews.review_heading: Decent college, just dissatisfied with the infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms don't have AC there, nor does Wi-Fi work, but labs are decent, they have AC and Wi-Fi working. The rest, the library is good too, well, infrastructure, books and AC, Wi-Fi, everything. Just the classroom is not good. About hostel food, it is really poor quality, canteen food is okay-okay, but it's affordable if it suits your taste buds.

reviews.review_heading: Decent and value-for-money college.
reviews.review_text: The campus is not so good. Wi-Fi, labs, and a library are available, but classrooms are more school-like with wooden benches and blackboards. The infrastructure could be better, and the hostel is also not very good. It is very unclean. The canteen is good, and there is a football ground on the campus for sports. Medical facilities are not present except for a medical room.

reviews.review_heading: MIST is simply the NIT of GSSIPU.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for the B.Tech building is quite dated; it's just a big block of brick. Classrooms are also awful, with half of them having fans, and the AC does not work at all. Hostel rooms are quite small, and you have to share them with one roommate.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is of a school type.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and the library are okay. Wi-Fi is available only in the library for students. The canteen is overused because of just 1 canteen. It has school-type benches. I am not in a hostel, but my friends say the mess food is okay, but rooms are small. Medical facilities are good. Sports and games are just for fun, as we can play for 1 hour. The ground is small.

reviews.review_heading: Maharaja Surajmal Institute of Technology is a good college.
reviews.review_text: The Maharaja Surajmal Institute of Technology definitely lacks in the infrastructure of hostels and labs, library, and classrooms because of its small size. Since it is located in prime Janakpuri, it does not have much space to offer. The Wi-Fi is usually slow, only a few classrooms have AC.

reviews.review_heading: Good academics and placement, strong connectivity, and campus life.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure at Maharaja Surajmal Institute of Technology are well-developed and supportive for technical education. The campus provides good Wi-Fi connectivity, an academic use department, labs, and modern classrooms equipped with updated computers, software tools, and internet access. The classrooms are spacious, well-ventilated, and equipped with smart boards and projects. The central library has a large collection of textbooks, reference books, journals, and access to on...

reviews.review_heading: Experience of a freshman.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not provided in the college except in the library. There is also a lack of mobile signal inside the campus due to its proximity to Tihar jail. Classrooms are outdated. The mess is like any other tier 2/3 college in India, and the hostel rooms are livable.

faqs.question: Are admission dates out for M.Tech admission at Zakir Husain College of Engineering and Technology?

answer.text: The college features a Training and Placement Office that sets up campus interviews for students and offers employment prospects. Several firms visit the campus each year for placements at Zakir Husain College of Engineering and Technology Aligarh, including TCS, Snap Deal, and Samsung. Companies are invited to the campus for the placement drive by the Training and Placement Office. The office makes ensuring that students receive the right instruction and develop the skill sets needed to satisfy industry standards. The placement process at Zakir Husain College of Engineering and Technology Aligarh entails inviting recruiting companies and providing them with pertinent information, scheduling pre-placement talks, shortlisting candidates based on their resumes, conducting final and technical interviews, and finally extending job offers to the selected students.

review_summary.college_name: Zakir Husain College of Engineering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good college with good infrastructure and facilities of AMU.

content.Placements: In branches like Computer Engineering and Artificial Intelligence, almost 70-80 per cent of students get placed in decent companies at decent packages of 6 to 18 LPA. The average is 7-8 LPA, while the median is also approximately the same, around 8-10 LPA. In other branches like Mechanical, Electrical, and Electronics, the placement ratio is 60-70 per cent, and the average is 6-8 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure of the college are good enough. Classrooms also have smart boards. Labs are fully working, and everything needed for experiments or project work is available. Wi-Fi works properly with high speed in hostels, but is a little weak in college. The college has its own book bank where students can take books and read in the reading lawn. Reading rooms are also available in all hostels. Maulana Azad Library is one of the largest libraries in Asia, just 2-3 hundred meters from the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: A good college with decent placements and nominal fees.

content.Placements: A good percentage of students were placed this year and last year too. The highest package in B.Tech AI was 18 LPA, and the average package was 8 LPA. The top roles in doing B. Tech in artificial intelligence are AI ML engineers or data enthusiasts, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is equipped with full network Wi-Fi coverage, and it is very widespread. The classrooms are equipped with high-quality labs. The hostels are very good and large in size, and are based on an old style. We have various games to play, like table tennis, chess, carrom, hockey, cricket, football, and there is a swimming pool in which we can dive.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Great university with job opportunities.

content.Placements: Almost 75 to 80% students are placed by our university. One crore is the highest package of our university, and 3 to 4 LPA is minimum package of our university, and 5 to 6 LPA is average package of our university. Almost 80 students are interning at kasimpur thermal power plant.
content.Infrastructure: Our course is best. Infrastructure of our university is excellent with greenery park and hostel facilities are too good, like food servicing, cleanliness, and rooms are with large space and personal cupboards. Provide Wi-Fi with good speed, and medical facilities are free and available quickly for students.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Best college in India for engineering

content.Placements: About 70% of students got placed. Highest package this year is 1.75cr. Lowest is about 25lakhs. After this course, you will have many jobs like quality manager or a parts designer. There are several companies offering internships in well-reputed companies like Narora Power Plant and thermal power plants.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is very neat and clean. Quality of food is also great with a tasty food. Canteen is also on every hostel. Wi-Fi facilities also provided with a good internet speed for watching online lectures. If one wants to study library is also built.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Their facilities are very good and their placement is also very good for everybody.

content.Placements: The placements are very good for our AMU students. Companies usually offer packages up to 20 LPA, only for diploma students. Many companies visit here for placements, and many students get jobs through this university. Overall, the placement is too good.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is good, and the hostel is good too. There is a canteen and dining hall for you, and there is a sports area also. There is turf for playing cricket and a football area. The dining fees are too low, and the food is very good, they provide healthy food.

admission_overview.description: Zakhir Hussain College of Engineering and Technology admission 2025 is open. The college offers various programmes, including BTech, MTech, and BArch. ZHCET considers the scores of the candidates in national-level or university-level entrance exams for the selection to the desired programmes. Admission to Zakhir Hussain College of Engineering and Technology is merit and entrance-based, depending on the course. The university accepts national entrance exam scores such as GATE, AMUEE and CUET. Zakhir Hussain College of Engineering and Technology courses are affiliated with Aligarh Muslim University.

students must download the application form from the official website of Zakhir Hussain College of Engineering and Technology. Besides, students can also apply online. placement_data.title: ZHCET Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: ZHCET placement report 2023 is not released. Earlier, the highest package offered during Zakir Husain College of Engineering and Technology placements 2022 stood at INR 16.8 LPA. Further, a total of 54 companies visited the campus during Zakir Husain College of Engineering and Technology placements 2022. The top recruiters during ZHCET placements 2022 included TCS, Wipro and Accenture.

faqs.question: Does ZHCET have good placements?
faqs.answer: The college features a Training and Placement Office that sets up campus interviews for students and offers employment prospects. Several firms visit the campus each year for placements at Zakir Husain College of Engineering and Technology Aligarh, including TCS, Snap Deal, and Samsung. Companies are invited to the campus for the placement drive by the Training and Placement Office. The office makes ensuring that students receive the right instruction and develop the skill sets needed to satisfy industry standards. The placement process at Zakir Husain College of Engineering and Technology Aligarh entails inviting recruiting companies and providing them with pertinent information, scheduling pre-placement talks, shortlisting candidates based on their resumes, conducting final and technical interviews, and finally extending job offers to the selected students.

faqs.question: Are pursuing UG courses at ZHCET expensive?
faqs.answer: ZHCET (Zakir Hussain college of Engineering and Technology) offers many UG courses such as BTech, BArch, Bachelor of Engineering and Bsc etc. The fee structure of the course, B.Tech - 85,991 INR (4 year), BArch - 92,450 ( 5 years) and Bachelor of Engineering - 1,58,180 (4 years) So, if we compare the fees of other Engineering Universities with ZHCET, then UG courses at ZHCET are not expensive.

The ZHCET course fee might comprise multiple components, such as tuition fees, hostel fees, security deposits, etc. The Diploma fees will be updated in this section as and when available.

average_package.complete_content:
ZHCET average package data is not released. However, according to AMU Engineering NIRF report 2023, the median package offered during ZHCET BTech and MTech placements 2022 stood at INR 5.5 LPA and INR 4.75 LPA, respectively. reviews_list.review_title: The college experience depends on a student's perspective and what a student expects from a college.

review_content.Placements: The institute is experiencing steady growth with a decent placement percentage. As per this year's official data, there have been 201 on-campus placement offers. The highest package till now is 83 LPA (offered by Atlassian). The average package is of nearly 10 LPA. Median package is nearly 9 LPA. Top recruiters are Infosys, which offers packages ranging from 3 LPA to 11 LPA. However, students also get offers from companies like Amazon and Microsoft. The training and placement cell provides various internship opportunities to students, which helps them gain experience. The major internship provider is Autodesk.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: IIIT Bhagalpur has great faculty, good coding culture, decent campus life, and growing facilities.

review_content.Placements: Our college has had good placement for the last 7 years. Our TNC is also working on it. Last year, our college signed an MoU with a Korean company. You can get a chance to study abroad from our college. In 2024, some of our seniors got placed in Texas, Microsoft, Google, Infosys, and many more.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our faculty is good and approachable. Labs, classroom, and Wi-Fi are all good. Our college has two hostels (Kautilya hostel for boys and Kadambini hostel for girls). We are getting an okay hostel facility. We have a good mess, offering hygienic food.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: It is a decent college with a supportive environment.

review_content.Placements: The placement percentage is around 70-90%. The highest package offered this year is 25 LPA for 1 student, and the lowest package is 6 LPA for students. The average package is 9.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our course are Infosys, Autodesk, Effigo, Amazon, Atlassian, ServiceNow, etc. Every student who applies for internships gets an offer, and if not from one, then from others.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is new and modern. Wi-Fi and LAN are available in hostels and computer labs. Libraries have all the necessary books. Classrooms have ACs. Labs are good, but some equipment is not available. We have two mess facilities in the college, and both are okay. No canteen is available till now, but expecting one this year. The doctor is available on alternate days. Sports are barely a minimum.

faqs.answer: BTech is the best course offered by IIIT Bhagalpur. At the undergraduate level, IIIT Bhagalpur offers a four-year BTech programme in four specialisations in full-time mode. These include Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechatronics and Automation Engineering and Mathematics & Computing. IIIT Bhagalpur admission to the flagship BTech course is completely entrance-based. Interested candidates are required to apply and appear for JEE Main. After qualifying for the exam, they are required to undergo JoSAA/ CSAB Counselling for final seat allotment.

admission_overview.college_name: IIIT Bhagalpur Admission 2025: Cutoff, Fees, Eligibility & Application

admission_overview.title: IIIT Bhagalpur Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: IIIT Bhagalpur admission 2025 is entrance-based. The college offers BTech, MTech, and PG Diploma programmes. The institute accepts EE Main scores and Central Seat Allocation Board (CSAB) counselling, for admission to BTech. For the MTech course, the institutes accept GATE and CCMT. However, candidates can get admission in MTech and PhD, based on merit, written tests, and interviews conducted by the Institute.

admission_process.title: IIIT Bhagalpur Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: IIIT Bhagalpur admission 2025is entrance-based for BTech, MTech, and PG Diploma programmes. The admission 2025 for BTech/MTech began with the registration process of GATE and BTech. Candidates must visit the official website of IIIT Bhagalpur to apply. The institute acceptsEE Mainscores and Central Seat Allocation Board (CSAB) counselling, for admission to BTech. For the MTech course, the institutes accept GATE and Centralized Counselling for MTech(CCMT). However, candidates without GATE/CCMT can score seats for MTech and PhD, based on good academic records, written tests, and interviews conducted by the Institute.

IIIT Bhagalpur offers three main courses BTech, MTech, and PhD under multiple specialisations. IIIT Bhagalpur offers undergraduate degree programmes in engineering in 3 branches and postgraduate in four branches.IIIT Bhagalpuris one of the20 new IIITsestablished under the Public-Private Partnership Scheme.
The institute is being mentored byIIT Guwahati. Check out the IIIT Bhagalpur admission highlights for 2025:

IIIT Bhagalpur admission is regulated by JEE Main/GATE scores followed by JoSAA/ CSAB/ CCMT/CCMN counselling for admission to its offered programmes. However, before applying for any of the mentioned exams/counselling, candidates must qualify for the eligibility criteria as per the course requirements. A course-wise split of IIIT Bhagalpur admission criteria and Selection criteria for the offered course is mentioned below:

IIIT Bhagalpur offers a limited number of seats for its courses. The seats for the flagship courses are reserved category-wise. The seat intake of BTech is in the majority compared to other courses offered at IIIT Bhagalpur. Find below the course-wise IIIT Bhagalpur seat intake for 2025:

The admission process for IIIT Bhagalpur is entirely based on the candidate's performance in the entrance exam, PI, written test, etc. Candidates are required to first qualify the eligibility criteria of the courses they are interested in. TheJEE Advanced 2025official website has launched with the new eligibility criteria. As per the official website, candidates can now attempt theJEE Advanced 2025 exama maximum of three times in three consecutive years.Find below the completedIIIT Bhagalpur admission process 2025:

Candidates seeking admission at IIIT Bhagalpur are required to complete the application form for the course-specific entrance exam. For, BTech and MTech candidates must visit the entrance exam's / counselling bodies official website to fill out the application form. However, for the PhD, certificate, PG Diploma, and MTech (without CCMT) application forms are available on the IIIT Bhagalpur's official website.

Selection for the cousres are made based on the entrance exam. For its flagship BTech course, IIIT Bhagalpur admits students with a valid JEE Main score. Candidates are allotted seats through JoSAA Counselling. Admission to MTech is through GATE, followed by CCMT Counselling. However, for PhD one must appear in the Institution entrance exam and PI. Further, selection for the non-GATE candidates is based on the Institution's written test and PI.
The cutoff for BTech and MTech courses is released by the respective counselling bodies. The shortlisted candidates are then required to pay the admission fee to confirm their seats.
How can I prepare for admission to IIIT Bhagalpur?

The right approach and a preparation plan for admission to BTech at IIIT Bhagalpur are all that are needed to ace JEE Main. While students who are serious about getting into an IIT start preparing from Class 11, a prep strategy for the exam is mentioned below:

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for MTech at IIIT Bhagalpur?
faqs.answer: MTech eligibility at IIIT Bhagalpur requires students to have valid GATE score in the relevant discipline. Students should have BTech degree in the relevant discipline with minimum of 60 percent marks or equivalent CGPA (55% for SC/ST candidates). Non-GATE students can apply through the institution's official website and appear for the written test and personal interview.

faqs.question: Is MTech free of cost at IIIT Bhagalpur?
faqs.answer: No,MTechis not free of cost at IIIT Bhagalpur. The total tuition fee for M.Tech is INR 2.5 lakh. If the students find this fee a little high, they can apply for the scholarships provided by the college. Some of the scholarships provided by the college is Central Sector Scholarship for College and University Students (MHRD, Govt. of India), Merit-cum-Means Scholarship for Students Belonging to Minority Communities. (Ministry of Minority Affairs, New Delhi), National Fellowship and Scholarship for

faqs.answer: IIIT Bhagalpur provides a two-year MTech programme in five specialisations: Signal Processing and Machine Learning, Electric Vehicle Technology, VLSI & Embedded Systems, Artificial Intelligence & Data Science, and Microwave & Communication Systems. For admission to the M.Tech programme, Candidates must appear for the GATE exam followed by CCMT counselling.

placement_report.college_name: IIIT Bhagalpur Placements 2025: Highest Package, Average Package, Top Recruiters

placement_data.title: IIIT Bhagalpur Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The overall highest and average package recorded during IIIT Bhagalpur placements 2025 was I NR 83 LPA and 10.35 LPA . The median package received was 9 LPA . A total of 201 offers were made in 2025. Top recruiters in recent included Amazon, Deloitte and Microsoft.

IIIT Bhagalpur has also released the branch-wise placement report. According to the report, highest package recorded in CSE, ECE and MEA branch during the placement drive 2025 was 83 LPA, 46 LPA and 38 LPA . The median package in these branches were between 9 LPA and 7 LPA (7 LPA in ECE and MEA).
2 international offer s were made during the placement drive 2025. 7 Core Companies visited. In addition, 27 companies made offer above INR 20 LPA .
The placement distribution of students placed with package above INR 20 LPA , 10 LPA and 6 LPA in 2025 was 12.26%, 18.4% and 43.55%. Core and other companies placement distribution was 25.79%.

description: IIIT Bhagalpur cutoff 2025 for BTech, MTech, and other courses are available on this page. Candidates preparing for the next academic session can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the IIIT Bhagalpur JEE Main cutoff 2025 along with other exams for different courses, rounds, and categories. Further exam-related updates are below:

In this section, candidates can view the last 8 years of IIIT Bhagalpur JEE Main cutoff ranks for various courses and categories by clicking on the download now links provided below to understand the past years' trends.

IIIT Bhagalpur JEE Main cutoff 2025 for the first and last rounds are tabulated below for the General AI category students. In the last round, the IIIT Bhagalpur CSE cutoff 2025 was 60253 in the General category belonging to the AI quota. For other core branch, such as ECE, the JEE Main last round closing ranks for admission was 80191, for the General category. The cutoff ranks for core BTech branches are usually on the lower side, indicating competitive cutoff rank for admission.

For the General AI category students, the IIIT Bhagalpur B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 60253 and 98141 in the last round. Considering the lowest cutoff ranks of 60253 and 68678, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering and B.Tech. in Mathematics and Computing were the top two most competitive branches for admission among the students belonging to the General category.

JEE Main is the accepting exam for admission to the BTech and other UG courses. Qualified candidates are then eligible for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling process for final seat allocation. In this section, aspirants can find out all the important JEE Main 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

JoSAA counselling 2025 is now over for admission to the Engineering courses offered at IIIT Bhagalpur. In 2025, the JoSAA counselling was conducted for up to six rounds. Further counselling rounds were conducted by CSAB to fill the vacant seats. Students who appeared for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds can refer to the table below to view or download the round- and year-wise JEE Main cutoff lists for BTech admission at IIIT Bhagalpur to understand the cutoff trends.

Tabulated below are the BTech specialisations available for admission based on the last round closing ranks of JEE Main. This will help students to make an informed decision to get the right college and specialisation for admission. The options below are available for students belonging to the General AI quota and are in the range of the most competitive BTech specialisation of IIIT Bhagalpur. To refine their searches, students can also use the provided filters.

As per the GATE cutoff 2025, the top two most challenging M.E./M.Tech specialisations were M.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science and M.Tech. in Electric Vehicle Technology with last round cutoff scores of 419 and 362, respectively, for the General AI quota. In the table below, candidates can view the branch-wise first and last round cutoff scores.

Tabulated below are the GATE CCMT last round cutoff scores for 2025, 2024 and 2023 across different rounds, categories and quotas. For the General AI quota, the last round cutoff scores varied between 350 and 419. While for the OBC category students, the final round cutoff scores were concluded between the range of 326 and 397 in the AI quota.

Candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important GATE 2026 dates to be eligible for admission to the ME/MTech course. GATE is the accepting exam, followed by the CCMT counselling process for admission.

Tabulated below are the GATE cutoff lists across different rounds and years for ME/MTech admission at IIIT Bhagalpur - Indian Institute of Information Technology. The consolidated cutoff list will help students understand the past years cutoff trends.

Considering the last round of IIIT Bhagalpur CCMT cutoff 2025, core M.E./M.Tech branches, including Artificial Intelligence and Data Science and Electric Vehicle Technology, witnessed higher cutoffs for admission, while branch such as VLSI and Embedded Systems had comparatively relaxed cutoff score for admission in the General category under the AI quota.

facilities: Laboratory: The laboratory has the facility to perform the assignments
Library: There are 3,000 books in the library and the readers have access to these books irrespective of their departments
Computer and Communication Centre: This centre is responsible for providing Electronics and Communication as well as Computation related facilities
Virtual Class Room: The virtual classroom for video conferencing is well-equipped with a projector, LED TV, amplifier, wireless, and others
Hostel: There are five boys' hostels and one girls' hostel on the campus

reviews.review_heading: Needs improvement, but hoping for a better future.
reviews.review_text: As our campus is recently made, it has all the basic infrastructure and facilities that should be provided, like LAN, air-conditioned classes, and a library. Recently, washing machines are ordered. All rooms have beds and a study table. The washrooms are decent and clean.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are well qualified. Placement record is good if you study you will get placed.
reviews.review_text: We have well-structured hostel and well-maintained as well. We have well quality food continuing mess, and you will not have any problem in hostel and mess. Hostel rooms are well maintained with two fans, 3 beds, 3 WLAN, study table, chair, and well-maintained bathrooms. We have well-maintained library. We have a very good sports culture.

reviews.review_heading: The college experience depends on a student's perspective and what a student expects from a college.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is newly built and comprises various facilities. Canteen facility is not present till now, but we hope that this will be looked into by management as well. At least all basic facilities like cricket ground, football ground, volleyball court, basketball court, badminton court, and table tennis court are there. There is a dispensary in the hostel as well, which is open day and night. Mess food is decent, and hostel rooms are spacious enough.

reviews.review_heading: IIIT Bhagalpur has great faculty, good coding culture, decent campus life, and growing facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our faculty is good and approachable. Labs, classroom, and Wi-Fi are all good. Our college has two hostels (Kautilya hostel for boys and Kadambini hostel for girls). We are getting an okay hostel facility. We have a good mess, offering hygienic food.

reviews.review_heading: It is a decent college with a supportive environment.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is new and modern. Wi-Fi and LAN are available in hostels and computer labs. Libraries have all the necessary books. Classrooms have ACs. Labs are good, but some equipment is not available. We have two mess facilities in the college, and both are okay. No canteen is available till now, but expecting one this year. The doctor is available on alternate days. Sports are barely a minimum.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good for all.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in the hostels and academic building and also in library, computer lab, and research lab. Electronics lab is also well organized, you can get almost all the necessary resources. Mess food is very good and also special food is served on occasions.

reviews.review_heading: Girls have good placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is new and in very good condition. The hostels are also in good condition. Sports and games are available. In the girls' hostel, the badminton court is currently not available, but in the boys' hostel, every game is available. Medical facilities are good. The quality of mess and canteen food is average.

reviews.review_heading: It is a growing college, but it needs more space.
reviews.review_text: As the campus is new, we have a new hostel building with a Ganga-facing balcony in each room. Each room consists of 3 beds, a chair, a study table, and an almirah. In the hostel building, Wi-Fi, LAN, a lift, and all the necessary things are available. The library and reading room are also available. Here, the administrative building, the academic building, the boys' hostel, the girls' hostel, and the director's house are available as completed in the first phase of construction. Still, 2 phases ...

reviews.review_heading: IIIT Bhagalpur College review.
reviews.review_text: There are 2 hostels (Girls: Kadambini Girls Hostel and Boys: Kautilya Boys Hostel). Hostels are 3-seater. LAN connection, table, B.Ed Wi-Fi, and balconies have been provided. Institute buildings have speakers, AC, fans, and projectors in a classroom with windows for fresh air. The library & computer center (named Vikramshilla Library) is the pride of the college.

reviews.review_heading: Indian Institute of Information Technology Bhagalpur: A big no in 2025.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good and attractive but it's just infrastructure only. The mess and hostel facilities are not up to mark. I can call it the worst. Even the internet service provided by the college is the worst. We have two libraries in the Diamond Building and two computer labs.

reviews.review_heading: I am a little bit satisfied.
reviews.review_text: We have classrooms, labs, and the symbol of our college, which is our computer lab and library building. The mess food is good, meaning it's eatable. I think cleanliness is maintained. Currently, there is no canteen in the college, but there are Domino's and Pizza Hut. There is a room for medical purposes, and an emergency hospital van is available. There are sports and games, but I am very disappointed that the college does not fully support these activities. Everything is managed by seniors (s...

reviews.review_heading: A short review of IIT, Bhagalpur.
reviews.review_text: College is good in terms of infrastructure. Hostel is new and well-furnished. 3 students share a room and the total hostel and MS fees are Rs. 38,000 for the odd semester and Rs. 36,000 for the even semester. Mess food is average and hostel is relatively newer compared to other NITs and IITs.

reviews.review_heading: As the College is in an Off Location, But Still Doing Best as It Was Built in 2017
reviews.review_text: As the college just got its campus, it is well maintained for now. It has Wi-Fi classrooms and a Wi-Fi library, but there aren't that many books. The college has only 1 boys' hostel and 1 girls' hostel, and both the hostels have great Wi-Fi facilities and LAN is also available. The campus has two messes as of now.

reviews.review_heading: Developing College, Moderate Placement, Fees are a Bit High
reviews.review_text: I have been staying in the college hostel for quite a while now, and it has been an overall positive experience. The rooms are three-seater, having 3 beds, 3 chairs, 3 tables, and 3 cupboards for each student. Student security is also well maintained, but it lacks two things: first, the washing machine facility, and second, the geyser facility, especially in winter.

reviews.review_heading: A Bright Future Ahead for this college.
reviews.review_text: It has a newly developed infrastructure with good classrooms, a computer center, and a library. The hostels are very good. Mess food is okay. More future buildings are yet to be constructed in the future phase. However, there is a shortage of hostels for boys. Hostel facility from the 3rd year is not certain.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: KL College of Engineering, KL Deemed to be University offers UG, PG and PhD courses in various specialisations. These courses are offered in full-time mode. The fees for various courses may vary based on the type and level of the program. Admission to these courses is based on entrance exams, namely KLEEE, JEE Main or AP EAMCET / Uni-GAUGE. KL College of Engineering is a constituent college of KL University Guntur.

faqs.answer: A:    To be considered for the KL College of Engineering BTech programme, candidates need to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria in order to gain admission. For admission, applicants must have passed Class 12 or equivalent exam pass with 60% aggregate in PCM stream from a recognised board. Additionally, the college accept KLEEE/ JEE-Main/ JEE-Advanced / State Level Engineering Entrance Exams across India, including EAMCET and Merit in Sports/Cultural Activities/ Uni-GAUGE scores. Those who are shortlisted are required to submit the relevant documents for verification to prove their eligibility.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for BTech at KL College of Engineering?

faqs.answer: A:    K L College of Engineering, now known as KL University, accepts several entrance exam scores for B.Tech admissions. These include: KLEEE (KL Engineering Entrance Examination) JEE-Main JEE-Advanced State Level Engineering Entrance Exams across India including EAMCET Uni-GAUGE score Candidates must also meet the eligibility criteria of having a Pass in 10+2 or equivalent examination with 60% and above in aggregate and 60% and above in Group subjects. Students with Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics (PCM) are eligible for all B.Tech programs including Bio-Technology, and students with Physics, Chemistry, and Biology (PCB) are eligible for B.Tech (Bio-Technology) and B.Pharmacy In addition you can contact the college directly for further information
faqs.question: What entrance exam scores are accepted by K L College of Engineering for admission B.Tech?

faqs.answer: A:    The cost of enrolling in a B.Tech program at K L College of Engineering can vary based on factors like engineering specialization admissions category (management or merit quota) and availability of financial aid, For the 2024 2025 academic year annual fees typically range from INR 1,50,000 to INR 2,50,000 for merit quota student Cost may be higher for management quota or JEE Main admitted students. Any additional information please check college review in our college website.
faqs.question: How much does B.Tech at K L College of Engineering cost?

faqs.answer: A:    The required minimal score is 55%. A minimum of fifty-five per cent of marks in a B.E./B.Tech (Chemical Engg./Leather Technology/Bio-Tech./Industrial Bio-Tech./Bio-Chemical Engg./Bio-Informatics) or B.Pharm. Or M.Sc.(Ag.)/M.V.Sc./M.Sc. In any discipline of Life Sciences is needed for admission to the M.Tech. Bio-Technology application. A GATE or PGECET scorecard is needed for admission to KL University's M.Tech application. For others, the university administers a front exam, with admission based on the merit rank of certified candidates. In addition contact your college seniors for accurate information

individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with good faculty.

individual_reviews.title: Great infrastructure, supportive faculty and strong placement opportunities at KL University.

content.Placements: I am from the B.Tech Computer Science & Engineering batch 2021 to 2025. 85 to 90 percent of students are placed, with packages ranging from 3 LPA to 25+ LPA, and average of around 6 to 7 LPA. admission_process.title: KL College of Engineering Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: KL College of Engineering admission 2025is open. The admission process includes merit in the qualifying examination, national level exams, orentrance examscores followed by a personal interview round conducted by the college. Koneru Lakshmaiah College of Engineering offersBTech and MTechin various specialisations. Applicants who want to be admitted toKL College of Engineeringmust appear for entrance exams conducted by the college for different courses. Want to know more about theKL College of Engineering admission process 2025read below:

KL College of Engineering admission isonline for UG and PG courses. The college offers afull-time mode of studyfor all the undergraduate and postgraduate programmes. The applicants seeking admission to KL College must fill out an online application form by visitingKL University's official website. KL College of Engineering offers severalUG and PG courses, admission to which is offered based on merit in the qualifying examination and scores in the entrance exam. KL College accepts the scores of various entrance exams likeKLEEE, KLECETand other national-level exams. The college offers BTech and MTech in various specialisations. The BTech specialisations includeArtificial Intelligence & Data Science,Bio-Technology,Civil Engineering,Computer Science & Engineering,Computer Science & Information Technology,Electrical & Electronics Engineering,Electronics & Communication Engineeringand many more. The MTech offers specialisations inBioTechnology,Structural Engineering,Construction Technology and Management,Geotechnical Engineering,Computer Science & Engineering, Cyber Security & Digital Forensics and many more. The candidates must meet the basic eligibility for the desired courses before applying for the course. The table below lists presents the eligibility and selection criteria forKL College of Engineering courses:

KL College of Engineering admission process 2025 isopen for all undergraduate and postgraduate courses. The admission is entrance and interview-based conduct by the college. Applicants must complete the admission process of KL College of Engineering for admission. Check below the KL College of Engineering admission process 2025:
Step 1: Application Process 2025

Candidates seeking admission to KL College of Engineering in any UG and PG courses need to apply on the official website ofKL University. The candidates have to register yourself for any courses by visiting the official website(www.kluniversity.in).
Step 2: Selection Rounds

Candidates need to qualify specified entrance exam along with a personal interview conducted by the college to fulfill the selection criteria of a particular course. The college conductsKLEEE for BTechadmission and also accepts national level exams i.e.,JEE Mains and JEE Advance, forBTech lateral entrycollege conducts theKLECETentrance exam and for all theMTechcourses they conductKL-PGECET.
Step 3: Counselling

If the candidates get selected in theentrance and interview rounds. The college offers the final seat to the candidates after the counselling. After counselling college allotted the final seats. Candidates have to pay a certain amount to lock their seats.

faqs.question: What should I do to get a direct admission in K L College of Engineering for B.Tech?
faqs.answer: The university offers direct admission to UG and PG courses based on the marks secured by the candidates in the previous qualifying examination. For B.Tech, the basic eligibility criteria are 10+2 from a recognized board with at least 60% marks in the related subject group. Students with Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics (PCM) are eligible for all B.Tech programs including Bio-Technology, and students with Physics, Chemistry, and Biology (PCB) are eligible for B.Tech (Bio-Technology) and B.Pharmacy In addition you can contact the college directly for further information

faqs.question: What is the selection process for B Tech and what is the minimum JEE percentile required?
faqs.answer: The following steps are involved in the B.Tech selection process at KL University:Eligibility: 10+2 or equivalent exam with 60% or higher in aggregate and 60% or higher in Group subjects.Process of selection: Uni-Gauge-E, JEE Main, and Andhra Pradesh EAMCETKL University Engineering's expected cutoff is:140 generalOBC (Other Backward Caste): 10095 percent are from the Scheduled Caste (SC).90 Schedule Tribes (ST)Some claim that a 90 percentile in JEE Mains is sufficient to gain admission to KL University.

faqs.question: Are admissions at KL College of Engineering, KL University, Guntur open?
faqs.answer: KL University accepts applications in both online and offline modes. Admission to all the courses is entrance exam-based, along with the performance of the candidates in the interview. The university allows the students whom ever qualified in KLEEE/ KLUBSAT JEE Main CAT/ XAT/ APICET etc. , for various courses. Candidates with valid JEE Main or Andhra Pradesh EAMCET Exam scores will be exempted from university-based entrance tests. Moreover, such applicants must satisfy the KL University EAMCET Cut off criteria. There is also a provision for KL University Direct admission.

placement_data.title: KL College of Engineering Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: KL College of Engineering has a dedicated Placement Cell at its campus that facilitates all placement-related activities and makes sure that all interested and eligible students get employed. For the past 12 years, KL University has been successful in employing all eligible and registered students through its offices spread across the country. An experienced team of 50-member work extensively to make the students job-ready.

The University also has a Career Preparation Training Department that aims to nurture the skills of students and make them all-round professionals. The department conducts thoughtful sessions including alumni discussions, Industry-expert talks, communication workshops, sector-specific mock interviews, practical problem-solving exercises, resume building, etc. The alumni network of KL College of Engineering is spread across the country, holding reputed positions of CEO, CXO, Directors, Managers , etc., in leading companies.
