hostel_campus.college_name: KL College of Engineering Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with good faculty.
reviews.review_text: Good facilities with Wi-Fi and excellent infrastructure in classrooms, labs, and library. All books are available in the library. We have excellent labs and lab faculty, who will teach you clearly with practical experience. We also have digital boards in every class.

reviews.review_heading: It is good for those who don’t want to waste money and time. This college is excellent.
reviews.review_text: It has good infrastructure and games. It is a 100-acre college, also known as the Greenary College. The college is full of green trees and gardens. This college has great nature and trees, and all games are available in the college, so don’t worry about games.

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, library, and auditorium are available. Hostels are good. The library is too good, and helpful books are available. The quality of food available in the canteen is worthless. The cost is high. The quality, quantity, and taste of the bad is too bad.

reviews.review_heading: Really good campus and with good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: We have all the top-notch facilities like Wi-Fi, furniture, food tables, classrooms with smart boards and highly qualified professionals. The hostels have very good infrastructure, a good environment and very good food. Also have both AC and non-AC facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Great infrastructure, supportive faculty and strong placement opportunities at KL University.
reviews.review_text: The CSE department has well equipped computer labs, smart classrooms, high speed Wi-Fi, and access to a central digital library with extensive learning resources. Hostels are well maintained with good security, medical facilities, sports infrastructure, and the mess and canteen provide hygienic and decent quality food.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement support and decent campus life, but it needs better faculty.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is great, every room has Wi-Fi, and there are many rooms, such as a game room, clubhouse, and study room. It even has a swimming pool, a library is great and really cool, it boosts the study morale, and also there are so many games you can play.

reviews.review_heading: The campus is good and large, but there are strict rules and almost no exposure.
reviews.review_text: The hostels are very good, and the infrastructure is also very good when compared to any other college, but the fuller utilisation of the infrastructure is still needed. There are clubs for exposure, but the clubs do not have a lot of infrastructure. There is Wi-Fi nearly everywhere, but do note that only an Airtel SIM works here, so get your sim card changed.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely dissatisfied with the hostel life.
reviews.review_text: The college hostel and the environment are too good. The hostel life is not that good because it is too strict. The food in the hostel is also not that good, and they will give us good food for 1or 2 days after the admission. Sports facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members and the infrastructure are good. Placements are satisfying.
reviews.review_text: The college has good labs, Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, and a well-stocked library. Hostel rooms are clean and basic, with decent mess food and medical help. Sports and indoor games facilities are available on campus. The hostel facilities are decent, and rooms are clean. Drinking water and electricity backup are available. The mess food is average but hygienic. The canteen offers better options.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with best placement record.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are well-ventilated and spacious. It has well-structured laboratories with a campus-wide range of Wi-Fi, ensuring connectivity throughout the college grounds. The food is good enough in the mess, and so are the canteens. That is all for this.

reviews.review_heading: Good university with best placements.
reviews.review_text: The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled with high-speed internet access, allowing students to work on projects, access online resources, and collaborative efficiently. Multiple well-equipped computer labs with the latest configurations and licensed software for programming, data analytics, cloud computing, networking, AI/ML, and cybersecurity. Specialized labs include AI & Machines learning lab, cloud and big data lab, red hat certified lab, IoT, & embedded systems lab.

reviews.review_heading: It’s too good college with all the facilities for students.
reviews.review_text: The campus provides all facilities such as washrooms, a library, modern labs, and a dedicated research center. There is also a startup hub that helps students work on new ideas. There are labs for computer science, biotech, and space-related clubs like cinematic, research, space, and startup clubs.

reviews.review_heading: Good college placements and faculty.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is excellent at KL University in Guntur. It had Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms, modern labs, a digital library, and smart-learning facilities. Hostels are well-maintained and provided clean rooms, 24/7 Wi-Fi, and good security. The mess food is decent and had multiple menu options. The canteen is clean and affordable. The campus also offered good medical services and sports facilities for both indoor and outdoor games.

reviews.review_heading: KL University is a  great place for learning and growth.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure was excellent at KL University in Guntur. It had Wi-Fi enabled classrooms, modern labs, a digital library, and smart-learning facilities. Hostels were well-maintained. Provided clean rooms. 24/7 Wi-Fi, and good security. The mess food was decent. It had multiple menu options. Canteen was clean and affordable. Campus also offered good medical services. Sports facilities for both indoor and outdoor games.

reviews.review_heading: The best place to learn, grow, and build your career in tech.
reviews.review_text: The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled with high-speed internet access, allowing students to work on projects, access online resources, and collaborate efficiently. Multiple well-equipped computer labs with the latest configurations and licensed software for programming, data analytics, cloud computing, networking, AI/ML, and cybersecurity. Specialized labs include AI & Machine learning lab, cloud and big data lab, red hat certified lab, IoT, & embedded systems lab.

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates can appear for a total 6 times in JEE Mains. The number of attempts is calculated from the year of passing class 12. For example, if a candidate have passed class 12 in 2023, he/she can appear in both attempts of 2023 as well of both attempts of JEE Main 2024 and 2025.If a candidate opts not to appear in the exam in a year/session, that attempt will forfeit. For example if a candidate who passed class 12 in 2023 but did not appear in JEE Mains in 2023, he/she will have four attempts remaining in 2024 and 2025.As candidates have a plenty of attempts (six), it is advised to prepare well for the exam and then appear in the exam. Appearing in the exam without proper preparation could effect the performance.
faqs.question: How many times can one appear for JEE Mains?

faqs.answer: A:    IPU CET cutoff is typically released after declaration of results. Once university announces results of entrance exam, it publishes cutoff marks or ranks on is official website. Candidates can check website or the university's admission portal for the cutoff information. The candidates who score above the cutoff are given admission to various programmes at the university.

review_summary.college_name: Bharati Vidyapeeth College of Engineering, Delhi Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: The college has good infrastructure and very helpful faculty.

content.Placements: The placements are good considering the recession and job market right now. Around 80-85% of the students got placed, with the highest package going up to 60 LPA and the average around 7-8 LPA. Faculty and the course are very placement-centric, and the college focuses on research and internship training.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is really good with new equipment. Every classroom is air-conditioned and has projectors. Wi-Fi is available for all the students on the campus, and you can gain access to it by submitting a simple form. There are other amenities such as a gym, table tennis, volleyball court, basketball court, and cricket pitch. The canteen in the college serves fresh food at affordable prices with good taste.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Really good opportunities.

content.Placements: If I talk about placements, companies do come here, it’s not like placements are NIL. But mainly, companies offer 3–4 LPA, which is way too less. Some companies offer higher salaries, but that too only goes up to 14 LPA, not more than that until now. Companies like TCS, Infosys, ZS, Samsung visit the campus, and some start-up companies too. More than 50 percent get placed for sure if relevant skills are there.
content.Infrastructure: This is the best part about this college, which I enjoy a lot personally. Wi-Fi is provided during labs, and otherwise you can buy Wi-Fi for personal use at Rs 140 for 4 years. The classrooms are fully air-conditioned and clean. The labs are good, but some of the computers and equipment in the Chemistry/Physics labs are old, which is still manageable. The library is small but neat, and you can study there, a wide range of books is available. The food is very tasty and delicious. We have a lot of options here, like 5–6 shops that offer hygienic food.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with my college, as I have no problem with my hostel room as well as my classrooms.

content.Placements: I am in the first year of my college, so I don't have that much knowledge, but if you are a dedicated student in the field of teaching, then surely you will get placement on campus as well as off campus. Companies visit our college. I am not sure, but TCS and Infosys take an average number of students from here.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is just amazing. Classrooms are so nice with smart boards and air conditioning. The library is also good; we can study there till 9 PM. I like my hostel room, and Wi-Fi facility is properly available in the hostel. Mess food is good not too good and not too bad.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It is a great college for new admissions. Faculty is good, and it has excellent infrastructure.

content.Placements: For the B.Tech computer science and engineering batch of 2023–2027, around 85 percent of students are successfully placed through the campus recruitment drive. The highest package offered is 64 LPA, while the average package is approximately 8 LPA – 9 LPA. Several reputed companies visit the campus, such as Infosys, TCS, Wipro, Accenture, and Capgemini, along with emerging startups like Zomato and Paytm. The prominent roles offered to students are software development engineer, data analyst, cloud engineer, cybersecurity analyst, and business analyst, reflecting the diverse opportunities available for graduates of this course.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Fully satisfied with this college.

content.Placements: In the 2023-24 placement season, BVCOE hosted over 50 recruiters and placed around 323-345 out of roughly 534 eligible students, achieving approximately a 67-89% placement rate. The median/average salary stands close to 6.5 LPA to 7.8 LPA, with top offers reaching as high as 64 LPA. Major recruiters include Amazon, TCS, Infosys, IBM, Cognizant, ZS Associate, EY, and Adani Group.
content.Infrastructure: The expensive, well, resource library houses over 46,000 books, hundreds of IEEE and science direct journals, plus a digital library and book bank. Practical learning is supported by labs across all disciplines including electronics, computers, chemistry Matlab, microprocessors, and power systems. Hostel facilities cater to outstation students, with an on-campus girls hostel offering AC rooms in 2 and 3 seater formats. It has mess, purified water, study furniture, and 24X7 CCTV security.

faqs.question: How many times can one appear for JEE Mains?
faqs.answer: Candidates can appear for a total 6 times in JEE Mains. The number of attempts is calculated from the year of passing class 12. For example, if a candidate have passed class 12 in 2023, he/she can appear in both attempts of 2023 as well of both attempts of JEE Main 2024 and 2025.If a candidate opts not to appear in the exam in a year/session, that attempt will forfeit. For example if a candidate who passed class 12 in 2023 but did not appear in JEE Mains in 2023, he/she will have four attempts r

description: Bharati Vidyapeeth College of Engineering, Delhi cutoff 2025 is finally out for aspirants seeking admission to the BTech and Integrated BTech courses. The JoSAA Round 1 seat allotment result 2025 has been released as opening and closing ranks across different categories belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates can scroll down to this page to view the Bharati Vidyapeeth College of Engineering, Delhi JEE Main cutoff 2025 for various specialisations and categories. A few more updates are below:

Bharati Vidyapeeth College of Engineering, Delhi cutoff 2025 was released via GGSIPU entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 79459 and 117932 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 79459, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 65760.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 79459.
For more categories, rounds and quotas, candidates must use the provided filters.
Some of the important dates related to JEE Main 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.
The cutoff PDFs below can be downloaded to view the cutoff details of the last three years for multiple rounds. This will help students understand the past years' cutoff trends.

To make an informed decision students must compare different colleges accepting JEE Main for admission. The given below comparison data is based on the JEE Main last round cutoff data. The cutoff is for the General AI category.

Bharati Vidyapeeth College of Engineering, Delhi Cutoff 2023 was concluded after Round 2 for admission to BTech courses. Talking about the last three years' cutoff, Bharati Vidyapeeth College of Engineering, Delhi IPU CET cutoff 2023 for B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering closed at 53659 while in 2022, it closed at 40559 and 42573 in 2021. So, analysing the past year's trends, the above-mentioned course remained the most popular course at Bharati Vidyapeeth College of Engineering, Delhi

The library is well-equipped but doesn't have many options for fiction and novel lovers. The college has only a girls' hostel, which is quite average, based on what I’ve heard from my friends. Our college canteen offers a lot of food options in addition to the two mess facilities available. The food quality is good. The medical fac...

reviews.review_heading: A college with good infrastructure and curriculum.

It would be their personal Wi-Fi with their ID and password. Our classrooms have projectors installed for virtual learning and presentations. Also in terms of the hostel, we only have a girls' hostel. There is no boys' hostel is in the premises. There is a huge library which is open till 9 PM. We also have five canteens with very hygienic and yu...

reviews.review_heading: The college is located in a very good location, having facilities and hangout areas nearby.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available at the minimal cost of 50 INR per year, and labs are fully furnished with all the latest equipment. All classes are air-conditioned and have projectors. The library is well maintained and has a book bank facility for every semester.

reviews.review_heading: College was overall good. Canteen was best from all colleges comes under GGSIPU.
reviews.review_text: The 1st year fees was approximately 175000 and 2nd year 153900 3rd year 145000 4th year 140000, there is a facility of girls hostel only in the college. The girls hostel was very secured and some ladies and gents gaurd were always there for the girls safety.

reviews.review_heading: GENERAL REVIEW BY SECOND-YEAR STUDENT (IT’S GOOD ACTUALLY)
reviews.review_text: THE INFRASTRUCTURE OF THE COLLEGE IS GOOD. EACH ROOM IS EQUIPPED WITH AIR CONDITIONING AND A PROJECTOR. THE COLLEGE BUILDING IS WIFI-ENABLED. LABS ARE WELL-EQUIPPED WITH NEW EQUIPMENT. THE LIBRARY IS BIG AND COMFORTABLE WITH AIR CONDITIONING AND STRICT LIBRARY DECORUM. ALMOST EVERY STUDENT IS SEEN STUDYING THERE DURING EXAMS.

reviews.review_heading: Faculties are great, and placements are good for students with a technical background.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is excellent, and Wi-Fi facilities are provided on campus. Labs are well-equipped with the latest technologies, and classrooms are also good, having A.C. and projector facilities. Hostels are available for girls only, and the canteen offers good food at reasonable rates. Sports are allowed but only after 3 PM.

reviews.review_heading: One of the Top college of IP University-BVCOE Delhi
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Bharati Vidyapeeth college of engineering is compact, covering an area of 8 acres. Despite its size,the campus is efficiently utilized. The campus is fully air conditioned, conveniently located adjacent to the Paschim Vihar(Metro Station).

reviews.review_heading: Faculty is very cooperative.
reviews.review_text: The labs and classrooms are fully air-conditioned, and the food in the canteen is nice. Most of the sports are played here. The labs have very well-functioning computers, and the library is nice for studying and making good networks. Wi-Fi is available throughout the college, and medical facilities are there.

reviews.review_heading: An honest review of BVCOE.
reviews.review_text: When it comes to facilities, our college is the best having fully air conditioned rooms, well-equipped classrooms, good Wi-Fi connection and a well-equipped library. Right now, the hostel is only available for girls. We have a big mess in our college and a separate area for canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Decent college life with good placements.
reviews.review_text: Not too good, but 3–4 stars are justifiable. As I've been since 2021 and our first year was completely in online mode, they've been building the new building for the past 3–4 years, and it is irritating for the students as half of the ground is occupied.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Strong placements, supportive community, and a vibrant campus life.

review_content.Placements: Model Engineering College (MEC), Thrikkakara, records strong placements, with around 75% of B.Tech students placed in 2025 and CSE/ECE achieving 100%. The highest package reached 44 LPA, with a median of 6.3 LPA. Recruiters include Amazon, Google, IBM, Intel, Deloitte, Cognizant, Oracle, Bosch, and Jio. Internships are offered every semester, supported by the alumni network and industry links. Roles span software engineering, development, core engineering, analyst, and consulting positions.
review_content.Infrastructure: At Model Engineering College (MEC), Thrikkakara, students enjoy a vibrant campus with SMART classrooms, well-equipped labs, a central library full of books and digital resources, and fast Wi-Fi everywhere. Sports lovers have space for football, basketball, badminton, and more. The boys' hostel is on campus, the girls' hostel is nearby, and both offer comfortable rooms with tasty veg and non-veg meals. There's also a health center for quick medical help. Life here isn't just about academics. Events like the tech fest, Excel, active student clubs, and cultural activities make campus life lively and well-rounded.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Biomedical Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Good placements, small campus.

review_content.Placements: Placements are pretty good at Model Engineering College compared to other engineering colleges. Electronics and biomedical have low placements compared to other departments. The highest placements in core EBE companies are 20 Lacs per annum, according to my knowledge.
review_content.Infrastructure: Model Engineering College has a small campus compared to other engineering colleges. The college has both ladies' hostel and gents' hostel. The college has Wi-Fi, and the labs are also good at the Model Engineering College. A better hands-on experience is provided through labs.

overview_faqs.question: Is MEC Kochi good for M.Tech?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, MEC Kochi is good for MTech. The fees here are comparatively low as compared to other institutes. You can get a good placement here at about INR 5 to 6 LPA on average. The CSE branch here is the most popular branch that provides the highest package of INR 30 LPA. You get a chance of acquiring the leadership skill. As many types of technical events are also organized in this college.

review_summary.college_name: MEC Kochi Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Really nice college if you are looking for placements.

content.Placements: About 80-85 percent of students are placed, and in the Computer Science branch about 95 percent of students are placed. Top recruiting companies like Google, Intel, etc., taking students from this college, which has branches like Electronics and Communication, Computer Science, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The college has free Wi-Fi, a library, an Idea Lab, and a canteen which is nice, along with football, basketball, volleyball, etc. Teams, MEC has an Idea Lab where we can do our own projects and assignments, and in addition, we have Fab Lab facilities too.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Above average placements, bad infrastructure, and strong alumni network.

content.Placements: 78.88 percent of students are placed in 2025 through campus placements. UST Global, Redbus, Litmus7 Systems Consulting, and KeyValue are some of the top recruiting companies. Information about top roles is not available. The highest package is 32 LPA, and the lowest is 3 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: College is very old and small. We have only 2 academic blocks for 7 departments. Wi-Fi is available but very slow. Classrooms are old and lack smart facilities. Library does have all the necessary books. Mens' hostel is very old and needs maintenance. Ladies' hostel is quite new. The mess available in both hostels is better than the mess in most private hostels. Canteen is run by Kudambashree. The food is cheap and average. Medical facilities are not good but there is a good government. Health center is within walking distance. We have one football ground, basketball court, and volleyball court.

admission_process.title: MEC Kochi Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: MEC Kochi admission criteriais entrance-based. Candidates are selected based on scores in the accepted examination. Mentioned below is the step-by-step admission process:
STEP 1: Model Engineering College Application Process 2025

Candidates seeking admission in MTech need to fill out the form on the official website of DTE Kerala. Besides, aspirants applying for BTech must fill out theKEAM application form. As not mentioned on the official website, it is not confirmed whether aspirants have to fill out the form on the MEC portal. Candidates must contact the admission office for more details.
STEP 2: Shortlisting of Students

The applications are further shortlisted based on scores in the accepted exam.MEC Kochi cutoff listshall indicate the required minimum score for selection. Candidates with a score equal to or more than the cutoff become eligible for admission. The college accepts KEAM for BTech and GATE for MTech programmes.
STEP 3: Counselling & Admission Confirmation
The selected students have to further report for document verification. Further, candidates are required to pay some amount from the total fee for seat confirmation.
Check:Top Engineering Colleges in Kochi

There are multiple components included in theModel Engineering College fees, such as tuition fees, caution deposits, admission fees, and more. Some of the fee components are refundable such as caution deposit. While some have to be paid annually /semesterly, such as tuition fees. faqs.answer: Candidates need to pass BTech degree in relevant stream with at least 60% aggregate to apply for MEC Kochi M.Tech programme. placement_data.title: MEC Kochi Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: A total of 273 offers were made during MEC Kochi placements 2023. Further, leading recruiters such as Cognizant, Deloitte and EY visited the campus during MEC Kochi placements 2023. In addition, the number of offers made for CSE , EBE , ECE and EEE branch in 2023 were 106, 38, 97 and 32 , respectively. Earlier, 416 offers were made during the 2022 placement session. CSE emerged as the top branch with the highest number of offers received. Further, the highest package offered was above INR 32 LPA . ZOHO Corporation, Schneider Electric, Rockwell Automation, and many other renowned companies participated in Model Engineering College placements 2022.

faqs.question: Which branch is best in B.Tech at MEC Kochi ?
faqs.answer: In my opinion and according to stats, BTech CSE is the best branch in MEC Kochi. Placement is the highest in this branch over all other branches. A total of 416 offers were made and mostly in B.tech CSE branch. The average package in this branch is INR 7 LPA. The highest package offered is INR 35 LPA. You can choose this branch. Top companies that visited the campus were ZOHO Corporation, Schneider Electric, Rockwell Automation and many more.

hostel_campus.college_name: MEC Kochi Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description:
Government Model Engineering College has a very good Hostel for boys with capacity of 80 students in each floor.
College has a clean and good hostel mess for the students along with a canteen inside the hostel premises.

Government Model Engineering College has a very good Hostel for boys with capacity of 80 students in each floor.
College has a clean and good hostel mess for the students along with a canteen inside the hostel premises.

reviews.review_heading: Really nice college if you are looking for placements.
reviews.review_text: The college has free Wi-Fi, a library, an Idea Lab, and a canteen which is nice, along with football, basketball, volleyball, etc. Teams, MEC has an Idea Lab where we can do our own projects and assignments, and in addition, we have Fab Lab facilities too.

reviews.review_heading: Above average placements, bad infrastructure, and strong alumni network.
reviews.review_text: College is very old and small. We have only 2 academic blocks for 7 departments. Wi-Fi is available but very slow. Classrooms are old and lack smart facilities. Library does have all the necessary books. Mens' hostel is very old and needs maintenance. Ladies' hostel is quite new. The mess available in both hostels is better than the mess in most private hostels. Canteen is run by Kudambashree. The food is cheap and average. Medical facilities are not good but there is a good government. Health c...

reviews.review_heading: Strong placements, supportive community, and a vibrant campus life.
reviews.review_text: At Model Engineering College (MEC), Thrikkakara, students enjoy a vibrant campus with SMART classrooms, well-equipped labs, a central library full of books and digital resources, and fast Wi-Fi everywhere. Sports lovers have space for football, basketball, badminton, and more. The boys' hostel is on campus, the girls' hostel is nearby, and both offer comfortable rooms with tasty veg and non-veg meals. There's also a health center for quick medical help. Life here isn't just about academics. Even...

reviews.review_heading: Good placements, small campus.
reviews.review_text: Model Engineering College has a small campus compared to other engineering colleges. The college has both ladies' hostel and gents' hostel. The college has Wi-Fi, and the labs are also good at the Model Engineering College. A better hands-on experience is provided through labs.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent college with placements and skill development but has some infrastructure constraints.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is not that big compared to other colleges but now new buildings are being built. College provides a hostel inside the college campus and ladies' hostel near college. Canteen facility is good. Sports and games are also great. Usually college annual sports meet Chakravyuh, and arts fest Layatharang happens in the even semester.

reviews.review_heading: It's a good choice for college in Kochi.
reviews.review_text: Good academic infrastructure, but a bad hostel experience for girls. Food and accommodation are not that good for college ladies hostel. Library is abundant. One thing that is lacking is lack of space, not much recreational space available in college.

reviews.review_heading: No campus life but hope that placement is there.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is kind of small with only 3 academic blocks. There's Wi-Fi in every corner of the college. We have a small library, an amphitheater, a very small volleyball court, and a huge ground. We also have ample parking spots for both students and faculty members.

reviews.review_heading: It is a small campus with better placement.
reviews.review_text: The campus is very small. We only have 3 academic blocks. The library is very small and lacks many facilities. The college bathroom is below average. Since the campus is very small, it's super easy to interact with students from other branches. We have a small amphitheatre as well as a very small internal auditorium.

reviews.review_heading: Is mec worth the hype or not?
reviews.review_text: All the classrooms are well-equipped with good seating and projectors. MEC also has well-equipped labs. Hostels in MEC are usually not so good, with low food and living quality. MEC offers a great range of sports facilities for students interested in sports, and it also has 50-plus clubs comprising all domains like arts, sports, tech, management, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Nice college life with good and lots of memories and happily satisfied.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is great, it is not like vast areas. It is a building where all the departments can connect with each other. There is also a gym in the hostel and mess is good. The quality of food is excellent. Similar to academics, sports and games are also pretty good.

reviews.review_heading: The college infrastructure is not good enough. Facilities and placements are very satisfactory.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not that good. It has a small area. Wi-Fi is available. 6-7 labs are there. The hostel facilities are good. The mess food is very nice. Medical facilities are not available. Sports and arts are conducted each year, but it does not give that much importance.

reviews.review_heading: Even though the infrastructure is not up to the mark. The placements in MEC are worth joining.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of MEC is not upto the mark. It is not vast like normal colleges. It's more like a high school changed to a college. A new building block and computer lab are finished this year, so it's satisfactory. Also, the classrooms and library can undergo few renovations.

reviews.review_heading: It is a small campus, only placement is good.
reviews.review_text: The college campus only includes three buildings. The third one is under construction. We have a small library and a canteen that can contain only less than 80 people at a time, but it has affordable food. There is no place to hang out in the college. We have a huge ground, an internal auditorium, an external auditorium, and an amphitheatre.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of the excellent placement, faculty and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Even though our college is small, it provides better infrastructure facilities. We have high internet speed, highly equipped labs, and a well-stocked library. We also have a fab lab and an idea lab for advanced projects. We have a centralized internal auditorium where workshops and seminars are conducted. Our college is a calm and clean space which provides a composed mindset for everyone to learn.

reviews.review_heading: Model Engineering college .
reviews.review_text: The campus area is really small. Wi-Fi facility is available in the college. In our electronics department, labs are not that good. Equipment is really old. There is a large library available on the campus. Men's hostel and ladies' hostel are provided by the college. The quality of food in the canteen is really worth the price.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about MEC Kochi - Government Model Engineering College

likes.text: Companies like Deloitte, Bosch, Nvidia, deshaw, nutanix, Amazon, Oracle, Synopsys, ansys, Qualcomm, Sam sung have come for recruitment.
We have a very good placement record, all thanks to the well functioning placement cell and also due to the quality faculty and students.

college_info.college_name: MEC Kochi Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Established in 1989, Government Model Engineering College is known for its teaching methodology. The institute has over 100 faculty members, 1500 students and 50 supporting staff. MEC Kochi is affiliated to APJ Abdul Kalam Technological University and offers B.Tech, M.Tech and Ph.D programmes. MEC Kochi has been ranked 91 for Engineering. The full time fee of this UG Course is around INR 3 Lacs and it offers an average package INR 6.60 Lacs .

Yes, MEC Kochi provides scholarships to M.Tech students. The institute also offers stipend to candidates belonging to SC/ ST category. Scholarship is offered to students with a valid GATE score as per AICTE norms for a total period of 24 months. Besides, candidates can also apply for the scholarships offered by the State Government.

The application fee for KEAM is as follows: Engineering only/ B.Pharma only/both: General: INR 875 and SC: INR 375. Architecture only/Medical & Allied only/both: General: INR 625 and SC: INR 250. Both the streams: General: INR 1125 and SC: INR 500.

The total tuition fee for MEC Kochi M.Tech is INR 1 lakh. This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Candidates need to pay the course fee at the time of admission to confirm their seat in the college. Students paying the fee for M.Tech can expect average package ranging between INR 3.5 lakh and INR 6.2 lakh.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Anaesthesia and Operation Theatre Technology - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely recommended for students who need college life and a better education.

review_content.Placements: Almost 80% of students get placed. In our seniors, the highest package is 8 LPA for the total course, and I got it for 7 LPA. Almost 5 companies recruit students. The college has a hospital, so students get internships for free and also get an amount incentive for the internship. I am studying Anesthesia and Operation Theatre Technology and many other allied courses offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: Everything we need is there in the hospital. Facilities are so nice. Every medical facility has because it is a super specialty hospital with 500+ beds. For students, there is a huge, spacious, air-conditioned library where we can study, and in the library every book we need to study. Labs and classrooms are also air-conditioned with a pleasant ambience for studying. The hostel offers multiple types of rooms that are 3-sharing, 2-sharing, 4-sharing, and premium. The hostel food is also tasty and clean.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E in Information Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied with faculty members and good placements.

review_content.Placements: I took the course information science engineering, as I know my seniors about 70% of them were placed from our college. The highest package is around 25 LPA. 45% of students got internships. Roles offered are data analyst, data scientist, etc. I am loving the campus life.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available in all the classrooms, labs, and hostels. The quality of hostel food is not bad. But we get good food in the canteen. Medical facilities are awesome. Sports and games are fun. I just love the food chain and coffee. We have around 4 canteens on our campus.

content.Infrastructure: The college has good infrastructure for our course. It has well-equipped classrooms, labs, and Wi-Fi that support learning. The hostel is clean and safe. It provides proper food, water, and electricity. Overall, it provides a comfortable stay and study environment.

individual_reviews.title: A good college with placement and solid infrastructure, but needs a little improvement in mess food.

content.Placements: 90% of students are placed during the 2025 campus selection process. The highest package offered is 7-8 LPA, and the lowest is 2 LPA. The majority of students are offered a package ranging from 3 to 6 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Amazon, Deloitte, Oracle, IBM, and many more. The institution helps us obtain internships in many companies.
content.Infrastructure: The college has the best computer labs, study areas, smart classrooms, conference rooms, and it is a Wi-Fi-enabled campus with a digital library. The hostel rooms are 2 or 3 sharing. The mess food is hygienic and tasty, but not many options given. There is a hospital on campus with 24 hour medical facility. Students can use their free time for sports or extracurricular activities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Anaesthesia and Operation Theatre Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely recommended for students who need college life and a better education.

content.Placements: Almost 80% of students get placed. In our seniors, the highest package is 8 LPA for the total course, and I got it for 7 LPA. Almost 5 companies recruit students. The college has a hospital, so students get internships for free and also get an amount incentive for the internship. I am studying Anesthesia and Operation Theatre Technology and many other allied courses offered.
content.Infrastructure: Everything we need is there in the hospital. Facilities are so nice. Every medical facility has because it is a super specialty hospital with 500+ beds. For students, there is a huge, spacious, air-conditioned library where we can study, and in the library every book we need to study. Labs and classrooms are also air-conditioned with a pleasant ambience for studying. The hostel offers multiple types of rooms that are 3-sharing, 2-sharing, 4-sharing, and premium. The hostel food is also tasty and clean.

individual_reviews.course: B.E in Information Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with faculty members and good placements.

content.Placements: I took the course information science engineering, as I know my seniors about 70% of them were placed from our college. The highest package is around 25 LPA. 45% of students got internships. Roles offered are data analyst, data scientist, etc. I am loving the campus life.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available in all the classrooms, labs, and hostels. The quality of hostel food is not bad. But we get good food in the canteen. Medical facilities are awesome. Sports and games are fun. I just love the food chain and coffee. We have around 4 canteens on our campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.E in CSE (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: This is an average college.

content.Placements: Yes, according to our seniors, placements are for those who score well. The highest package was 25 LPA, and the lowest was 3-3.5 LPA. Companies include Blinkit, Zomato, AWS, and Infosys. Actually, the real placement percentage is 20-25%. Roles, as per our seniors, include background designer and some other higher posts if they score well.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel room is kind of good, but the food is the worst, as it's Kerala style, and I am from Karnataka, so I am not adjusted to it. Classrooms are updated right now, and they also provide a digital library. Sports are conducted only once a year, and there is a grand event in May called Samskruthi, which is conducted for three days in a row.

admission_overview.title: East Point Group of Institutions Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: East Point Group of Institutions offers a number of courses at the UG, PG and Diploma level. The courses are offered in the multiple domains of Engineering, Management, etc. The courses are offered in affiliation with RGUHS, VTU and BNU. EPGI admissions are both merit-based or entrance exam-based. The mode of application at EPGI is completely online. For entrance-based admissions, EPGI accepts valid scores of various state/ national-level entrance exams such as KCET, JEE Main, PGCET, MAT, CAT, etc., for respective courses. The duration of most UG courses is three to four years while the duration of most PG courses is two years. Diploma courses extend up to two years.

admission_process.title: East Point Group of Institutions Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: East Point Group of Institutions admissions consist of a number of rounds. It includes fulfilling the minimum eligibility criteria, applying online and qualifying for the selection rounds for respective courses. More details around EPGI admission process are as follows:
Step 1: Application Process

To apply for UG & PG courses at EPGI, candidates must visit the official website of the institute and fill an online application for their desired programme. Check below the step-wise application process for EPGI admission 2026:
Image source: Official website
Step 2: Selection Criteria

EPGI admissions are both merit and entrance-based. For admission to courses such as BBA, BCom, BCA, etc., candidates are admitted based on their merit of the last qualifying exams. However, for admission to courses such as BTech, MBA, etc., the college offers entrance-based admissions.
Step 3: Final Admission
Once all the selection rounds are completed, the selected candidates will be notified. Further, the selected candidates must pay a certain amount of fee and get the academic documents verified.

faqs.question: What is the basic eligibility for BTech at the East Point Group of Institutions?
faqs.answer: To apply for admission to BTech at EPGI, it's mandatory to pass Class 12 with a minimum of 45% aggregate in Physics, Mathematics, and English along with Chemistry/ Biotechnology / Biology / Computer / Electronics subjects as per the basic eligibility for BE/ BTech at East Point Group of Institutions. Candidates belonging to SC/ST and Category-1 (Karnataka only) need a minimum of 40% aggregate to be eligible for the course. The final selection is done based on a valid score of either KCET or JEE

faqs.question: Are direct admissions available at East Point Group of Institutions?

faqs.question: How can students apply for admission to various courses at East Point Group of Institutions?

Then, select the needed course and pay the application fee. Fill out and submit the application form with all the needed details.

faqs.question: Can I take admission in East Point Group of Institutions, without JEE in B.Tech?
faqs.answer: Yes, candidates who have completed their class 12 with Science stream can opt for degree in BTech without JEE Main or any other entrance exam scores. Generally, some seats in private institutes are allotted on a merit basis, and the management tent quota is based on several factors determined by the colleges. Eligibility for B.Tech is candidates must pass in 10+2 with 45% in Physics, Chemistry, Biology and English.Max age: 35 & Min age: 17.

faqs.question: What is the percentage required for East Point Group of Institutions?
faqs.answer: East Point Group of Institutions facilitates students with anonlinemode of application for admissions.East Point Group of Institutionsoffers courses such as BSc, BTech, etc., at the UG level. Apart from the UG courses, the college also provides UG Diploma and certificate courses. Further, the college offers admissions to students to its various courses based on merit. Candidates seeking admission to the UG-level programmes at East Point Group of Institutions must be Class 12 passed from a recognised board in any discipline.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement with supportive faculty and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure for our course. It has well-equipped classrooms, labs, and Wi-Fi that support learning. The hostel is clean and safe. It provides proper food, water, and electricity. Overall, it provides a comfortable stay and study environment.

reviews.review_heading: A good college with placement and solid infrastructure, but needs a little improvement in mess food.
reviews.review_text: The college has the best computer labs, study areas, smart classrooms, conference rooms, and it is a Wi-Fi-enabled campus with a digital library. The hostel rooms are 2 or 3 sharing. The mess food is hygienic and tasty, but not many options given. There is a hospital on campus with 24 hour medical facility. Students can use their free time for sports or extracurricular activities.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely recommended for students who need college life and a better education.
reviews.review_text: Everything we need is there in the hospital. Facilities are so nice. Every medical facility has because it is a super specialty hospital with 500+ beds. For students, there is a huge, spacious, air-conditioned library where we can study, and in the library every book we need to study. Labs and classrooms are also air-conditioned with a pleasant ambience for studying. The hostel offers multiple types of rooms that are 3-sharing, 2-sharing, 4-sharing, and premium. The hostel food is also tasty and...

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with faculty members and good placements.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in all the classrooms, labs, and hostels. The quality of hostel food is not bad. But we get good food in the canteen. Medical facilities are awesome. Sports and games are fun. I just love the food chain and coffee. We have around 4 canteens on our campus.

reviews.review_heading: This is an average college.
reviews.review_text: The hostel room is kind of good, but the food is the worst, as it's Kerala style, and I am from Karnataka, so I am not adjusted to it. Classrooms are updated right now, and they also provide a digital library. Sports are conducted only once a year, and there is a grand event in May called Samskruthi, which is conducted for three days in a row.

reviews.review_heading: Superb college, excellent faculty members, and plenty of job opportunities.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good. The building and classrooms are spacious. The food quality is good. You can get North and South Indian food at mess. The hostel fee is around Rs 75,000 per annum including food, laundry and hostel room which is also well maintained.

reviews.review_heading: East Point is a better platform for corporate field jobs.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of East Point is better than any college in India. East Point has numerous well-designed labs, library and computers. Classrooms are well furnished and attached with digital screens and high-speed internet Wi-Fi connectivity. The college has a hospital with 24/7 service and physiotherapy and all medical facilities are available. The hostel facility is good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides the best education, which is worth the .oney.
reviews.review_text: The campus is fully Wi-Fi enabled with good speed. The classrooms are well furnished and the good environment to study. The college has a good and big library. Students can get good knowledge from them. Medical facilities are available 24/7 and sports meets are organised to encourage student sports.

reviews.review_heading: Very good college to learn.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is good and is available in both colleges. There are many labs, and labs work well. Classrooms are good. Digital screens are attached to each classroom. There is a big library, and textbooks and novels are available in the library. Medical facilities are good. A hospital is available 24X7. There are grounds to play any sports, and all the required kits are available.

reviews.review_heading: The faculty and college infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text: The campus is beautiful, and the rules and regulations are very good. The infrastructure is excellent, and the hostel fees are very reasonable. Wi-Fi is available everywhere on campus, including the classrooms. The library is very good for studying without any disturbance, and the college even has its own hospital with 24/7 service.

reviews.review_heading: Pradeep's review of East Point Group of Institutions.
reviews.review_text:
There are many blocks in the college. 
The Wi-Fi is very slow, little to not working, and working borderline classrooms are 2/5; there's one screen that is never used, and the chairs are cheap. The library is fine, the best thing in the college; probably they even have a digital library, and they practice a scan and register system, which is really cool.
Now when it comes to hostel food, the hostel food is fine but the seating arrangement is awful and never has enough space or is not that clean;...

reviews.review_heading: The college has great facilities.
reviews.review_text: For coming to the college, buses are available for day scholars. The library is the best on campus and it is filled with many books. Wi-Fi is also available throughout the campus. The best hostel with excellent rooms available. Rooms are well maintained and a medical facility is also available.

reviews.review_heading: A good and well disciplined college.
reviews.review_text: WiFi is available throughout the campus. Lab facilities are very good. Students in our college have the freedom to learn various aspects. Classrooms are neat and tidy, and there is a central library where we can find many knowledgeable books. Hostels are good, and food as well. All classrooms have digital screens for lectures. The campus is filled with green trees and gardens with no pollution or noise. It is a very good place to learn. The college has a hospital and transport facility.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for B.Tech in Bangalore.
reviews.review_text: We have high-speed Wi-Fi in our college, and multiple routers cover the entire campus. We have high-class laboratories and well-structured classrooms. We have a central library, which has a huge collection of books. We do have a digital library with high-speed internet. The college has boys and girls hostels inside the campus. Rooms are excellent for premium sharing. There is a classic look in the hostel rooms. Food is good with all kinds of options. All the wardens in the hostel are retired mil...

reviews.review_heading: Our college is the best.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for this course in our college were very good. There are so many labs and classrooms There is free Wi-Fi and a library. Facilities in the hostel are good. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is good. The college was huge, with 100 acres of green campus, and no pollution or noise in the college. The college is an absolute choice for the students. The college too has transport, a hostel, a huge library, a huge playground, and a digital ...

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Change the approach towards education.

review_content.Placements: There is such a low percentage of placements. Out of 750 students, only 100–120 get placed, with most jobs offered by TCS. The highest package is 9 LPA offered by TCS, and the lowest is 2 LPA offered by Cognizant. Internships are mostly namesake, provided by training institutions rather than legitimate companies. The top internship is offered to only one student by Texas Instruments, with a stipend of Rs. 45,000 per month.
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs are very old-school not much quality and upgrades. Equipment is transferred from here to there. I understand that some old tools are necessary for learning basics, but completely driving into them alone is the route to irrelevant. The hostel food is decent, and rooms are also very mid-level. The canteen is managed by a private family and is very much better for that price. The medical facilities are well. Sports are a hit or miss, while good training and coaching are provided, but for normal students to try their luck there is not much encouragement. Wi-Fi facility is bad.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: A brief review of JNNCE, Shimoga.

review_content.Placements: After the 6th semester, students are eligible to participate in placements. More than 60% of students get placed. Most startups come for hiring. Every year, TCS conducts mass hiring, in which they hire students in bulk. Students from technical branches get placed more.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure-wise, college is good. Every branch has its building and separate labs. The campus is large and full of greenery. A cricket ground, throwball court, and indoor game facilities are present. The canteen is also present inside campus.

overview_faqs.answer: JNNCE - Jawaharlal Nehru National College of Engineering is a well-known institution for B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, MCA courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha's verified reviews, JNNCE - Jawaharlal Nehru National College of Engineering has a rating of 3.81 on the basis of Shiksha-verified reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 4.18 on Campus Life, 3.1 on Placements, 3.97 on Faculty and 3.98 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: JNNCE Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Very nice courses with better placements.

content.Placements: Most of the students are placed in better companies which help them to build their career. The students are placed in roles like data scientist, full-stack web developer, programmatic AI program, front-end developer, back-end developer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has very good infrastructure with high-speed internet connection. It has proper labs with the latest technology equipment. Classrooms are very well maintained which helps for interactive sessions for the better understanding of the classes which helps us to concentrate.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It's a good college for placements.

content.Placements: As a developer, software engineer, and associate engineer, many positions were offered by the college. Non-teaching roles were also provided in this college, which was a great experience. The percentage of students was 60%. The highest package offered was 10 LPA, and the lowest was 2.5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The food, canteen, games, and sports were the best. In college, we had labs for practice, classrooms, a library, and a doubt section. Many facilities were provided by the college to students. In the hostel, the food quality was very good and very hygienic. The hostel was well maintained and good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Change the approach towards education.

content.Placements: There is such a low percentage of placements. Out of 750 students, only 100–120 get placed, with most jobs offered by TCS. The highest package is 9 LPA offered by TCS, and the lowest is 2 LPA offered by Cognizant. Internships are mostly namesake, provided by training institutions rather than legitimate companies. The top internship is offered to only one student by Texas Instruments, with a stipend of Rs. 45,000 per month.
content.Infrastructure: Labs are very old-school not much quality and upgrades. Equipment is transferred from here to there. I understand that some old tools are necessary for learning basics, but completely driving into them alone is the route to irrelevant. The hostel food is decent, and rooms are also very mid-level. The canteen is managed by a private family and is very much better for that price. The medical facilities are well. Sports are a hit or miss, while good training and coaching are provided, but for normal students to try their luck there is not much encouragement. Wi-Fi facility is bad.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: A brief review of JNNCE, Shimoga.

content.Placements: After the 6th semester, students are eligible to participate in placements. More than 60% of students get placed. Most startups come for hiring. Every year, TCS conducts mass hiring, in which they hire students in bulk. Students from technical branches get placed more.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure-wise, college is good. Every branch has its building and separate labs. The campus is large and full of greenery. A cricket ground, throwball court, and indoor game facilities are present. The canteen is also present inside campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Electronics and Telecommunication, our branch, is very straightforward and clear, so it depends.

content.Placements: It depends on the department they are studying in. In my department, as I've observed, the strength was around 60+, and among them, 15-16 members got their placements. The highest package was from TCS at 12 LPA, some received 6 LPA, and the lowest was around 2.4 LPA. Almost 40-50 percent of the students got their placements. Top roles included field engineer, team leads, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available in our department are good. All equipment, including technical equipment for the lab, is well-organized, in good condition, and works efficiently. There are minimal errors while conducting experiments with the lab equipment. There are enough computers for students to use, and the library is very spacious and large, with the capacity to accommodate 100-150 students at once. We have an in-college canteen, which is a bit overpriced these days, but the food is good.

faqs.question: What has been the cutoff trend for Information Technology at Jawaharlal Nehru National College of Engineering in last few years?
faqs.answer: The cutoff trend for BTech at JNNCE - Jawaharlal Nehru National College of Engineering has been increasing in the recent years. In 2022, the closing rank for BTech. under the general category for all India quota was 50670. In 2023, it increased to 65636. Likewise, the cut off ranks have changed from 50670 to 65636 for OBC 50670 to 65636 for SC 50670 to 65636 for ST 50670 to 65636 for EWS50670 to 65636 for PWD. This trend is likely to continue in the coming years, as the demand for engineering education in India continues to grow. Similar cut off trend can be seen for female candidates under all categories however the ranks are slightly different.

description: JNNCE cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to several UG & PG courses. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the course, exam, round and category-wise cutoff details. Further exam-related updates are below:

JNNCE Karnataka PGCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. For admission to the MBA/PGDM course, the last round cutoff rank was 30829 in the General AI category. For the HS quota, the last round cutoff for the same course stood at 20667 in the General category. Comparing both the quotas, it is clear that the cutoff rank was less competitive for admission to the General AI category students as compared to the HS quota.

Karnataka PGCET is the accepting exam for MBA/PGDM admission at JNNCE. In 2025, the last round cutoff for MBA/PGDM admission was 30829 in the General category under the AI quota. In 2024, the cutoff rank for the same course was 9396, while in 2023, it was 14044.

faqs.question: Q: How many seats are available for various courses offered at Guru Nanak Dev Engineering College?

faqs.answer: Guru Nanak Dev Engineering College has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityM.E./M.TechCandidates must have passed B.E./ B.Tech. in any Branch of Engineering with atleast 50% (45% in case of candidate belonging to reserved category) marks in aggregate. In case seats haven't been filled under respective categories, admission shall be considered on the basis of Inter-se-merit in the qualifying examination. OR AMIE/ AMIETE/ AMACSE graduates including graduates from other Govt. recognised professional bodies equivalent to AMIE with 55% or above marks in their exams in such body shall be eligible with the condition that the branch adopted at graduation level must be same as the specialisation applied for. All those students who were enrolled with various Profession Bodies/Institutions, which were duly recognised by MHRD with permanent recognition upto 31/05/2013, stand recognized. In addition to above, two years experience after B.Tech. is mandatory.MCACandidates who have completed M.Sc. in IT/ CS with mathematics as a course at 10+2, Graduation level or PG level are eligible to apply.B.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed Diploma in engineering or B.Sc. (non-medical) from a recognised university.B.ArchCandidate who have passed 10+3 Diploma Examination with Mathematics as compulsory subject with at least 50% marks in aggregate from a recognised Institute/ University can also apply. Candidates appearing for 10+3 Diploma with Mathematics in the current year may also provisionally appear for NATA-2023.MBA/PGDMCandidates must have passed Bachelors Degree of minimum three year duration in any disciplineand must have obtained above mentioned marks (45% marks in case of candidates belonging to reserve category) from the University recognised by the University Grants Commission (UGC). In case seats haven't been filled under respective categories, admission shall be considered on the basis of Inter-se-merit in the qualifying examination

overview_faqs.answer: Guru Nanak Dev Engineering College is a reputed institute for M.E./M.Tech, PG Diploma, Ph.D., MCA, B.Tech, B.Arch, MBA/PGDM. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Engineering, IT & Software, Architecture & Planning, Business & Management Studies. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Guru Nanak Dev Engineering College has a review rating of 3.9 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 4 on campuslife, 3.7 on placements, 4 on faculty and 4.1 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: GNDEC Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good college with supportive faculty and fair exams.

content.Placements: I am studying B.Tech CSE at Guru Nanak Dev Engineering College, Ludhiana, and this is my honest review of placements. The college provides decent placement opportunities, especially for CSE students. Companies like TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Capgemini, and some startups visit every year. The training and placement cell conducts aptitude classes, mock interviews, and coding sessions, which help during the placement drive. Students who focus on skills like DSA, programming, and communication usually secure good offers. The average package is reasonable for freshers, and a few students get higher packages based on their performance. Overall, placements are good if students stay consistent and prepare well.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the hostel faculty.

content.Placements: Nearly 85% of the B.Tech IT batch at GNDEC were placed in this course. The highest package offered was 10-11 LPA, the lowest was 3.5-4.5 LPA, and the average was 4.75-6 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Amazon, IBM, Just Dial, Accenture, Samsung, Infosys, etc. More than 70 students got internships.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available for my course/department are quite good. We have access to high-speed Wi-Fi throughout the campus, which is very helpful for programmming. In hostel, the quality of facilities is satisfactory. Rooms are of a decent size with proper lighting and furniture.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the college's infrastructure and faculty.

content.Placements: In our session, 80% of students got placement in local as well as MNCs. The highest package was 8 LPA, and the lowest is around 4.5 LPA. Many other students got internships from recruiting companies. The placement cell is very active in handling all these activities.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has very good infrastructure with well-equipped labs having various software and hardware. In every department, there is a departmental library, and a central library, which is common for all departments, is also available. There is a Wi-Fi facility throughout the whole campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Very good and in our college chances of placement is very high.

content.Placements: Nearly 70% of students choose this course. The lowest average package is 20,000 to 2 LPA after this course. We can apply for government jobs. Companies are more than one and at least very good, and roles given by the college are more than one and also interesting.
content.Infrastructure: Yes, in our college, Wi-Fi facilities and the library are very good, with AC labs and classrooms. The quality of the mess is also good, but the canteen is not very good. Sports and games are at the state level, and there is also a dispensary for medical problems. Medicine is also free.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Really nice faculty and atmosphere.

content.Placements: 80% of students in my course were placed, and the average package offered is 6 LPA. Recruiting companies include Infosys, Airtel, etc. Nearly 90% of students got internships in my course. Roles offered include software engineer.
content.Infrastructure: The college has good facilities and infrastructure, including well-equipped labs, good classrooms, and a pleasant library environment. Hostel facilities are also good, with good food and 24-hour medical facilities. There are provisions for all kinds of sports and games.

paragraphs: GNDEC admissionsare completely merit-based. The institute offers 44 programmes.GNDECoffers courses across various specialisations and aspirants need to apply for courses through its official website. GNDEC admission is done based on scores of exams like GATE, CMAT, and NATA. The university offers over 44 courses at UG, PG and Doctorate levels in field, such as Engineering, Business and Management Studies, IT and Software and Architecture and Planning. Read more details around GNDEC admission in the following article.
At UG, PG and Doctorate level, B.E. / B.Tech, B.Arch, MBA/PGDM, etc. are among the top courses offered at GNDEC.

hostel.description: The Institute provides three hostel for boys and one hostel for girls with total accomodation of about 1200 students, with all the basic amenities and services for the students. CCTV camera facility and power back up supply is also available.

library.description: The central library opens at 8:00 am to 10:00 pm on weekdays and 9:00 am to 5:00 pm on saturday. It has a collection of more than 93,109 books, 20,675 titles ,online books, print journals ,online journals and back volume journals. Library collection can also be accessed through Web OPAC at any terminal on the campus network. It is also connected with DELNET for inter library loan and document delivery services.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with supportive faculty and fair exams.
reviews.review_text: I am studying B.Tech CSE at Guru Nanak Dev Engineering College, Ludhiana, and this is my honest review. The college provides a good learning environment with experienced and supportive faculty. Classrooms are clean, labs are well-equipped, and the library is peaceful with a good collection of books. Campus Wi-Fi works fine, and the atmosphere is safe. Hostel facilities are decent. Rooms are comfortable, and security is strict. Mess food is average but manageable, and cleanliness is maintained re...

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the hostel faculty.
reviews.review_text:
The facilities and infrastructure available for my course/department are quite good. We have access to high-speed Wi-Fi throughout the campus, which is very helpful for programmming. 
In hostel, the quality of facilities is satisfactory. Rooms are of a decent size with proper lighting and furniture.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college's infrastructure and faculty.
reviews.review_text: Our college has very good infrastructure with well-equipped labs having various software and hardware. In every department, there is a departmental library, and a central library, which is common for all departments, is also available. There is a Wi-Fi facility throughout the whole campus.

reviews.review_heading: Very good and in our college chances of placement is very high.
reviews.review_text: Yes, in our college, Wi-Fi facilities and the library are very good, with AC labs and classrooms. The quality of the mess is also good, but the canteen is not very good. Sports and games are at the state level, and there is also a dispensary for medical problems. Medicine is also free.

reviews.review_heading: Really nice faculty and atmosphere.
reviews.review_text: The college has good facilities and infrastructure, including well-equipped labs, good classrooms, and a pleasant library environment. Hostel facilities are also good, with good food and 24-hour medical facilities. There are provisions for all kinds of sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: I am quite satisfied because of facility campus and environment of college etc.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite decent. The hostel is well-furnished and clean. The mess food is tasty, healthy, and offers a nice menu. Hostel Wi-Fi has a good range, but campus Wi-Fi is comparatively slower. Overall, campus buildings are well-maintained, seating areas are good, and classrooms are suitable for learning.

reviews.review_heading: College didn't met the expectations I had before taking admission here.
reviews.review_text: There are many labs, 3 boys’ hostels, and 1 girls’ hostel. There are different departments. Hostels are clean, and every year hostel rooms are allocated based on the year of study. Clean water coolers are provided, but the water is still a bit dirty, so we need to take care of ourselves.

reviews.review_heading: Best Faculty, Better Placements and Excellent Cultural Committee and Extra Ciruculam Supporting .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of GNDEC is excellent, though maintenance could be improved in some areas. The CS/IT labs are equipped with PCs featuring i5 processors (13th Gen). The college has more than a hundred computers and a server room. Additionally, there are well-equipped labs for ME, CE, and other departments.

reviews.review_heading: The college is one of the best college in Punjab for pursuing core branches.
reviews.review_text: The college has decent infrastructure and facilities, which are value for money. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. Hostels are pretty good, with attached washrooms in the first year, and the mess food is also good. The grounds and sports equipment are well-maintained, and the college excels in sports.

reviews.review_heading: The college faculty is very friendly. The environment of the college is very open.
reviews.review_text: The college has various labs, including hardware, DBMS, WD, OS, and PL labs, all of which are equipped with Wi-Fi and high-tech PCs. The classrooms are well maintained, although there are some hygiene issues due to a lack of proper soap facilities in the washrooms.

reviews.review_heading: Strong foundation, needs growth.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure, including Wi-Fi throughout the campus, air-conditioned labs with computers, clean classrooms with projector screens, a quiet and air-conditioned library, and good medical facilities. The hostel food is not that great, but the canteens are good. They also have games that are fabulous.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Guru Nanak Dev Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is quite good and above average. Infrastructure of labs and classrooms is quite good. Overall, campus is very well maintained. Courses are also quite good.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements in 2023. Budget-friendly college with a good facility in Bachelor and Masters course
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is quite good. There is a proper department for the library. Hostel management is good. The quality of food is regularly inspected by a food inspector. Students are provided with IDs to access Wi-Fi. There are dedicated labs for each course with attendants to manage them. fees_and_eligibility.overview: AMC College Bangalore offers UG and PG courses across various specialisations such as Engineering, Management, and others. The modes of AMC Engineering College course admissions are online and offline. Admission to various courses is based on merit and entrance exam scores. At the UG level, the college offers three to four-year B.E/BTech in 11 specialisations. At the PG level, the college offers two-year MBA, MCA, and MTech courses to students. Aspiring candidates must qualify for the eligibility criteria set by the institute for the desired course. Below mentioned are some of the and :

faqs.answer: A:    The cost of an MBA at AMC college is approximately INR 4.2 lakh.  Fees are to be paid when the seat is finalised. Fees may also include various components that are non-refundable at most times. To get full MBA fee details, you can fill in the AMC college enquiry form available on the official website.
faqs.question: What is the cost of MBA at AMC Engineering College?

faqs.answer: A:    AMCEC Bangalore admission is offered in UG, PG and PhD degree. One has to clear a certain entrance examination to get into this college. The college offers a degree of Bachelor of Engineering in various streams like Mechanical Engineering,  Civil,  Computer Science,  Electronics and Communication,  Artificial Intelligence,  Aeronautical,  Electrical and Electronics,  Information Science and Mechatronics. When it comes to AMC Bangalore admission for a post-graduate degree, it offers MBA in specializations such as Marketing,  Finance and Human Resource Management; MTech in Computer Science, Machine Design, Digital Electronics and Communications, VLSI Design and Embedded System, Computer Network Engineering and Power Systems. One can also choose MCA and MCA lateral entry. AMC Bangalore admissions for BE take place on the basis of the Karnataka common entrance test (KCET),  JEE Main and COMEDK followed by a counselling process. For AMC Bangalore admission in M.Tech programmes, one has to score in GATE and Karnataka PGCET. After that selection will be done on the basis of the merit list according to the selection of the specialisation by the student. But in the case of MCA and MCA lateral entry, the selection is decided by the merit list made on the basis of the previous qualifying exam given by the student. AMC Bangalore admission to MBA programmes happens on the basis of scores obtained in KMAT,  CAT,  MAT,  XAT,  CMAT and ATMA.

MBA & MCA courses are offered at postgraduate level.
