admission_overview.college_name: AMC Engineering College Admission 2025: Eligibility, Application Process, Fee, Dates

admission_process.title: AMC Engineering College Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: AMC Engineering College admissionisopen.It offers Engineering, Science, and Management courses at the UG, PG and PhD levels. Admission to all the courses is done basis national or state level entrance exam. It provides courses in affiliation withVTUBelagavi. the programmes are offered in full-time and regular modes.

AMC Engineering College course admissionis entrance-based. Students should meet the admission criteria as per the guidelines issued by the college. The eligibility for UG courses is a pass in Class 12 while for PG courses, students should have completed their graduation degree. AMCEC shortlists students based on several parameters, including entrance exam, group discussion, and personal interview. The selection process is followed by institute-level counselling for seat allotment. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection criteria forAMC Engineering College courses:
Class 12 with 45% aggregate in PCM for GM students and above 40% aggregate for SC/ ST students
UG degree with a minimum aggregate of 50% from a recognised university
UG degree in any stream with a minimum aggregate of 50% from a recognised university
UG degree with a 50% aggregate from a recognised university

AMC Engineering College admission is a multi-step process starting with the application, followed by selection round, and then counselling and admission confirmation. Students should meet the eligibility criteria before applying for the course. They should have a valid score in the national or state-level entrance exam. Refer to the pointers below to know the admission process:
1. AMCEC Application Process
Visit the official website and select the programme. Fill the online application form with all the listed details. Then submit the form.
2. AMCEC Selection Process

The application forms will be scrutinised, and the selection will be made based on the eligibility criteria. Selected candidates will be invited for a counselling interview. Candidates can choose any options for the interview process, which are one-on-one, online, or telephonic. Additionally, candidates must also appear for the entrance exam, personal interview, and group discussion as per the programme requirements.
3. Merit-list and Counselling

Wait for the merit list to be announced by the college. The merit list will be based on the entrance exam scores and other criteria such as cutoffs, academic performance, work experience, etc. Attend the counselling process and follow the guidelines provided by the college. The counselling process will involve document verification, seat allotment, fee payment, etc.
4. Seat offer

Once the application process and interviews are completed, the college admissions official sends an admission offer to the candidates. The candidate must accept the offer by confirming it and paying the course fees.

faqs.question: Is AMC good for engineering?
faqs.answer: Meerut Institute of Engineering & Technology (MIET) is a reputable institution that Meerut provides a higher level of education of quality.It was founded in 1997 and it is under the management and governance of the City Educational and Social Welfare Society.The institute is located in the Dr. APJ Abdul Kalam University- AKTU (previously Uttar Pradesh Technical University) and provides a course that is accredited by the All India Council of Technical Education-AICTE, New Delhi.It has the NAAC accreditation of a B+ Grade.The National Board of Accreditation (NBA) is also accredited by MIET.The AMC Engineering College has a good placement record.The college has a good record in placement as well and students have been placed successfully in top companies. 90 percent of the students have been placed at AMC Engineering College and the highest package is 50 LPA.

description: AMCEC Bengaluru cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to several UG & PG courses. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the course, exam, round and category-wise cutoff details. Further exam-related updates are below:

AMCEC Bengaluru Karnataka PGCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. For admission to the MBA/PGDM course, the last round cutoff rank was 24669 in the General AI category. For the HS quota, the last round cutoff for the same course stood at 17472 in the General category. Comparing both the quotas, it is clear that the cutoff rank was less competitive for admission to the General AI category students as compared to the HS quota.

Karnataka PGCET is the accepting exam for MBA/PGDM admission at AMCEC Bengaluru. In 2025, the last round cutoff for MBA/PGDM admission was 24669 in the General category under the AI quota. In 2024, the cutoff rank for the same course was 10186, while in 2023, it was 14240.
For more categories, rounds, and quotas, candidates can use the provided filters to view the cutoffs.
Candidates preparing for 2026 admission can refer to the table below to view some of the important dates related to Karnataka PGCET 2026.

AMCEC Bengaluru accepts Karnataka PGCET entrance exam scores for admission to the MBA/PGDM courses. Candidates can refer to the table below to check out the consolidated year-wise Karnataka PGCET cutoff lists.

As per the KCET last-round cutoff 2025 for B.E. / B.Tech admission, B.E. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning has the lowest cutoff rank of 42593.5 for the General AI quota. The lower cutoff rank indicates strong competition for admission.
For other categories, rounds and quotas, use the filter options below:
According to the AMCEC Bengaluru B.E. / B.Tech Cutoff 2025, the closing rank for B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering stood at 62066 among the students belonging to the General AI quota.

For the HS quota, the cutoff rank for the same specialisation was 87495. Comparing both the quotas, the last round cutoff rank for General AI category students was more competitive for admission than the HS quota students.

hostel_campus.college_name: AMC Engineering College Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty members and decent placements.
reviews.review_text: Campus has Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, well-equipped labs, and a good library. Hostels are clean with basic amenities. Mess food is decent, and the canteen is affordable. Medical help is available. Sports facilities include cricket, basketball, and indoor games.

reviews.review_heading: AMC Engineering College, Bengaluru.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure in AMC is good. Campus size is 52 acres. Campus is fully cleaned also the campus is green. This college is situated in a new area of Bengaluru. Classrooms are also good and library contains more than 80,000 books from which we can get any books related to our branch. Wi-Fi facilities are also available but sometimes it doesn't work. Hostel rooms are good but food is not up to the mark. Canteen has many types of North Indian/South Indian foods. Medical facilities are there in case ...

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with campus placement.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure is available, and the boys' hostel is good. Wi-Fi will not be provided by our college. Classrooms are average, with no projectors, fans, or light facilities. Hostel food is not good, and the canteen is not clean and properly maintained. But the infrastructure is average.

reviews.review_heading: If you want to have fun and have no aim in life please join to AMC ENGINEERING COLLEGE.
reviews.review_text: The college campus was huge. The canteen, labs, and classroom were very spacious and well-maintained. Sports and cultural activities are good apart from that there are no such extracurricular activities but the library, and labs are good and huge. The classrooms are also fine.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied due to placement situations in college as compared to other colleges.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available on campus as well as in the hostel. Labs are available for all circuit and non-circuit branches. The quality of food is below average, as you can expect from any hostel mess or PG. The library has a lot of books, which has been a lot of help during semester-end examinations.

reviews.review_heading: College is average, but if there are not many options, it is better.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is average. Only hostel has Wi-Fi, but the Wi-Fi is very bad. Sometimes there is no internet, and when there is, the speed is very slow. Food in the hostel is very bad. Rooms are okay. They provide 2, 3, and single-sharing rooms, divided into special and normal rooms. Special rooms have an attached bathroom and fan, while normal rooms have a common bathroom and no fan. Laundering is provided in both room types, which can be used once per week. Fees range from 1.1 lakh to 1.7 lakh ...

reviews.review_heading: A very mediocre and average college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are outdated, but infrastructure is fine. Hostel is above average, but food is very subpar. Warden and authorities support students a lot if anything happens. Wi-Fi is provided to every student in the hostel, but it sometimes works and sometimes doesn't.

reviews.review_heading: They are providing affordable education, quality of teaching skills, and infrastructure 55 acres
reviews.review_text: Hostel is good, and 4 times meals they are providing. Hostel is located inside the campus for both girls and boys. But have to follow some rules and restrictions, which are necessary for the decorum of the campus. As a hosteller, you will have more fun in campus.

reviews.review_heading: AMC - For a brighter future.
reviews.review_text: When the topic comes to infrastructure, AMC Engineering College has one of the best infrastructures. The main building is based on ancient architecture. The college provides an environment in which students can focus on their studies and excel in several other activities. There is Wi-Fi (but it is not accessible to students), various labs (each lab has its own purpose), and a library that is well-equipped with several books and magazines. I have not joined the hostel, but the quality of the food...

reviews.review_heading: A student's perspective on AMCEC
reviews.review_text: Our campus is very serene and beautiful. The classrooms are spacious with multiple labs in the building. We also have a library where you can borrow books as well as read and study in the library. We have multiple departments for different specializations with skilled faculty in every department.

reviews.review_heading: My review was genuine and I am satisfied because of faculty, good placements and good infrastructure
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was very good and good facilities are available at our college. The Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms were very good facilities. I am a day scholar so I don't have any idea about the hostel facilities or the sports facilities available at our college.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, but not too good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, and labs and classrooms are good. The food was also at a reasonable price in the canteen. The hostel fee is more than expected, and the food is average. Wi-Fi is not available in college, but the library is there. Overall, it is a good place to study.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with college. Infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text:
Faculty members are also good they guide you in every step. Infrastructure like labs are also good, good environment, classrooms are also big not conjusted, library also consists all types of books
Hostel facility is also good, sports events are also conducted college has indoor games facility.

reviews.review_heading: AMC engineering college review.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is so big to see. It has separate labs in the college and they provide Wi-Fi facilities for everyone in the college. There are so many big classrooms. Hostel facilities are good, but the food is not at all good. The food in the hostel is not good. We can play volleyball, tennis and cricket at the college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good education.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was very good for studies. Our campus was Wi-Fi enabled. Laboratories were well-equipped. Computers were also available in the laboratory. Classrooms are well-maintained. There was a decent library and several books were available. Hostel facilities were very good. Canteen was available in this college. Medical facilities were also provided. All sports activities were conducted in this college.

reviews_list.review_title: Good college to experience.

review_content.Placements: Students in my course are placed according to their interests if they want to pursue their studies further. They can, and if they want placement, they can take the TPP subject for Rs. 4,000 or Rs. 5,000 for being placed. The average package is, I think, 4 LPA to 5 LPA. The best thing about our department is that we can also sit in pharmacy placements and in marketing placements, which gives us a chance. They provide internships that are paid, in college only, and unpaid, also that are linked to organisations like PBTI, thank you.
review_content.Infrastructure: Department's infrastructure and facilities are good, there is Wi-Fi, labs are there, classrooms for different sections are there, library is there, on other hand, the food in hostel is average, infrastructure is good, canteen is good, medical facilities are good, sports and games are genuinely good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Average and budget-friendly option with normal placements.

review_content.Placements: 50-60% of students were placed, and the lowest package was 3.5 LPA, whereas the highest package went to 18-20 LPA. Companies like EPAM, PhysicsWallah, Watchguard, TCS, Cognizant, FICO, Deloitte, Accenture, KPIT, LG, Namma Yatri and DBS were the recruiting companies. Top roles offered were Quality Analyst, Software Developer, and Data Analyst, and there were not many internships that were offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is just average, classrooms are pretty much normal, and there is no Wi-fi. The library is also not that big and has just basic course-related books. Labs are also not that highly developed. The boys' hostel is good, but in the girls' hostel, many problems do occur, and the mess food is not that good, but they do have variety, and food is provided on time. Basic medical facilities are available on campus, and there is an arrangement of sports too. Also, a plus point is that the hostel does have a gym, and the campus is quite beautiful and peaceful in the evening.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Chandigarh Group of Colleges, Landran

review_content.Placements: Placement is good. About 65 percent of last semester's students got placed. The average package is about 5–6 LPA. Placement drives are continuing. Students from Chandigarh Engineering College also go to Chandigarh University during placement drives, as they have joint placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The entire campus is Wi-Fi connected, and the classrooms are big enough. They have proper fans, lighting, and exhaust fans. Every classroom has a projector and a whiteboard. Hostel food is average, sometimes good, and sometimes bad. Non-veg food is available on selected days in the hostel mess. Medical services are available 24/7 with an ambulance for emergencies. Grounds for football, volleyball, basketball, and badminton are available.

The boys' hostel is good, but in the girls' hostel, many problems do occur, and the mess food is not that good, but they do have variety, and food is provided on time. Also, a plus point is that the hostel does have a gym, and the campus is quite beautiful and peaceful in the evening.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Review of Chandigarh Group of Colleges, Landran

content.Placements: Placement is good. About 65 percent of last semester's students got placed. The average package is about 5–6 LPA. Placement drives are continuing. Students from Chandigarh Engineering College also go to Chandigarh University during placement drives, as they have joint placements.
content.Infrastructure: The entire campus is Wi-Fi connected, and the classrooms are big enough. They have proper fans, lighting, and exhaust fans. Every classroom has a projector and a whiteboard. Hostel food is average, sometimes good, and sometimes bad. Non-veg food is available on selected days in the hostel mess. Medical services are available 24/7 with an ambulance for emergencies. Grounds for football, volleyball, basketball, and badminton are available.

admission_overview.title: Chandigarh Group of Colleges Landran Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: CGC Landran admissions are offered mainly on the basis of academic merit in the last qualifying exam. CGC Landran offers courses at the undergraduate, postgraduate, and diploma levels. These are offered in the fields of Engineering, Business Management, Computer Applications, Pharmacy, Science, Commerce, and more. Students can apply both online or offline. The online process can be completed at the website of the college. For offline process, students can walk-in to the campus of CGC Landran. The college may accept national-level exams for admission to certain courses.

eligibility_selection.title: Chandigarh Group of Colleges Landran Eligibility & Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: CGC Landran course admissions are offered based on admission criteria of each programme. The selection criteria at CGC Landran is a mix of merit and national-based entrance exam scores. For selective courses, such as BTech, students may need to appear for counselling. Check below the eligibility and selection criteria for popular CGC Landran courses:

Confirmation of Admissions

placement_report.college_name: CGC Landran Placements 2025: Highest Package, Average Package & Top Companies

placement_data.title: CGC Landran Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: CGC Landran recorded an impressive placement record for the Class of 2025. More than 1300 companies participated and presented more than 10000 job offers to the sudents of the batch 2025. The overall highest package offered during CGC Landran placements 2025 stood at INR 54 LPA . Some of the top recruiters of CGC Landran in 2025 include Amazon, Infosys, IBM, Cognizant, Deloitte, Microsoft, etc. The highest package secured by the BCom (Hons) batch 2025 was INR 17.03 LPA.

Engineering was initially the main degree among the CGC Landran courses, but as time passed, more and more courses were added to the curriculum, including MTech, BTech, MBA, and MCA. In 2021, Chandigarh Group of Colleges Landran received the 4th Education Leadership Award and Excellence in Innovation & Research in WIEF, Start-Up India, and IALM. CGC Landran has effectively assisted students in reaching their desired CGC Landran placement goals since the inception of the placement cell in 2001.

hostel_campus.college_name: CGC Landran Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Hostels have semi furnished rooms with attached washrooms and well-furnished common rooms with TV with DTH connection. Hostel also has air cooler facility within the rooms of hostel. Other facilities include separate gym for girls and boys, well equipped reading room, 24 hour security, laundry service, music room, wi-fi, 24x7 power supply and hygienic mess facility with vegetarian meals.

library.description: CGC library is well equipped with over 40, 000 books on varied subjects.It has a memberships of 10 e-journals and has125 web-based courses through NPTEL. It also has 136 video courses prepared by the faculty of IITs and other leading institutions of India that are taught over the internet. The library subscribes to national and international subject journals, national and regional dailies.It can accommodate around 300 students at a time. The library maintains a separate “Book Bank” collection exclusively for the meritorious students. The central library has a collection of 20582 titles and subscribes to 200+ journals, magazines & periodicals.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Tennis Court, Volley Ball Courts, Table Tennis Tables

cafeteria.description: Canteen can conveniently accommodate 500 students at a time. The canteen and cafeteria is well equipped with modern furniture and electrical automatic cooking and storing facilities, which provides hot lunch, snacks and beverages both to the students and staff at reasonable rates. The college also has Cafe Coffee Day and Subway.

hostel.description: Hostels have semi furnished rooms with attached washrooms and well-furnished common rooms with TV with DTH connection. Hostel also has air cooler facility within the rooms of hostel. Other facilities include separate gym for girls and boys, well equipped reading room, 24 hour security, laundry service, music room, wi-fi, 24x7 power supply and hygienic mess facility with vegetarian meals.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Tennis Court, Volley Ball Courts, Table Tennis Tables

facilities: Machine Room and a Central Instrumentation Room.
labs.description: Available Facilities: Civil Engineering Lab, Chemistry Lab, Computer Lab, Electrical Lab, Electronics Lab, Mechanical Lab, Medical Lab, Physics Lab, Fluid Mechanics & Fluid Machinery Lab, Engineering Materials and Metallurgy Lab, Analog and Integrated Circuit Lab, Controls Lab, Instrumentation Lab, Refrigeration & Air Conditioning Lab, Advanced Training Kitchen, Training Bar, Advance Training Restaurant, Machine Room and a Central Instrumentation Room., Communication Skills Lab, Microprocessor Lab, Theory of Machines Lab

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Chandigarh Engineering College, Chandigarh Group of Colleges, LandranReviewed on 12 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, Good teachers.
reviews.review_text: The labs and Wi-Fi are actually great, and the library has every book I? Ve needed. Hostel life is okay rooms are decent, but mess food is definitely hit-or-miss. Canteen snacks and the sports complex are the real highlights here. Solid experience, enjoying.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, a good college for your career development.
reviews.review_text: A good infrastructure with good services and environment, hostel food is a bit bad, but overall facilities are good, safe for girls, strict guards at the gate don't allow outsiders in college. The canteens are available for day scholars and students. Overall have a good infrastructure. Labs are available for better understanding, and students can experience real-time experiences in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Good college to experience.
reviews.review_text: Department's infrastructure and facilities are good, there is Wi-Fi, labs are there, classrooms for different sections are there, library is there, on other hand, the food in hostel is average, infrastructure is good, canteen is good, medical facilities are good, sports and games are genuinely good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Chandigarh Engineering College, Chandigarh Group of Colleges, LandranReviewed on 11 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Average and budget-friendly option with normal placements.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is just average, classrooms are pretty much normal, and there is no Wi-fi. The library is also not that big and has just basic course-related books. Labs are also not that highly developed. The boys' hostel is good, but in the girls' hostel, many problems do occur, and the mess food is not that good, but they do have variety, and food is provided on time. Basic medical facilities are available on campus, and there is an arrangement of sports too. Also, a plus point is that the hos...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Chandigarh Engineering College, Chandigarh Group of Colleges, LandranReviewed on 9 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Review of Chandigarh Group of Colleges, Landran
reviews.review_text: The entire campus is Wi-Fi connected, and the classrooms are big enough. They have proper fans, lighting, and exhaust fans. Every classroom has a projector and a whiteboard. Hostel food is average, sometimes good, and sometimes bad. Non-veg food is available on selected days in the hostel mess. Medical services are available 24/7 with an ambulance for emergencies. Grounds for football, volleyball, basketball, and badminton are available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Chandigarh Engineering College, Chandigarh Group of Colleges, LandranReviewed on 19 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good for CSE students but needs some improvement.
reviews.review_text: Our CSE department has high speed Wi-Fi advanced labs smart classrooms and a well stocked library. Hostel facilities are comfortable mess food is decent canteen is clean and students get proper medical support along with good sports and gym facilities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Chandigarh Engineering College, Chandigarh Group of Colleges, LandranReviewed on 10 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: A good Wi-Fi connection is provided. Mess food is good. All facilities were provided in good condition, and they kept both healthy and junk food. Medical facilities are available. Sports and games are also provided for both hostellers and day scholars.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Chandigarh Engineering College, Chandigarh Group of Colleges, LandranReviewed on 26 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college is above average in the private university segment.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is wonderful. In recent years, the infrastructure of the college is maintained very well. Regular construction and small changes make it much better than other colleges. Labs are fully functional and air-conditioned. Air conditioning is missing in classrooms, but still, the classrooms are well-ventilated.

reviews.review_heading: The fee is minimal, but according to their placements, there are some bad things.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite good, but the hostel food is very bad. Labs are okay. The library is good. There is no Wi-Fi for students' self-study.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good facilities that help us in making our careers and improving our skills.
reviews.review_text: We have a good infrastructure at our college, good and large classrooms, labs with all facilities, a food court with a vast menu, a library with all subject-related books, and competitive books related to the course. Our college also introduces various sports events like volleyball, cricket, badminton, etc.

reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our courses are very good. The labs have provided Wi-Fi,  AC, and classroom infrastructure, which is also well and good. The quality of facilities in our hostel is excellent, and the quality of food is good in taste.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available everywhere. All labs are available. All classrooms are good, neat, and clean. Library is good and all books are available. Our classroom is very good. And I love my college. I recommend choosing this college.

fees_and_eligibility.overview:
JK LU offers UG and PG programmes in various specialisations, such as Engineering and Technology, Design, etc. At the UG level, the university offers BTech, BBA, and BDes courses, and at the PG level, MTech and MDes. Additionally, the university also offers PhD courses to interested students.

JK Lakshmipat University offers BTech in multiple specialisations through the Institute of Engineering and Technology (IET), which are The BTech programme includes various opportunities for semester exchanges at prestigious IIITs, IITs, and other leading global institutions, enriching students’ academic and cultural experiences. IET also offers programme to its' students. Refer to the table below to know the courses offered by JK Lakshmipat University with their respective eligibility and :

faqs.answer: A:    The total first year fee for JK Lakshmipat University BDes is INR 3.45 lakh. The total fee for first year includes various components such as caution deposit, admission fee, etc. Admission and caution deposit are paid only once in the start. Students need to pay the academic fee annually.
faqs.question: What is the fee for BDes at JK Lakshmipat University?

faqs.answer: A:    JK Lakshmipat University provides double and triple occupancy hostels. Students can choose between an AC and a Non-AC hostel room. The JKLU hostel fees for the academic year 2025-26 are tabulated below:ParticularsDouble OccupancyTriple Occupancy ACNON-ACACNON-ACHostel Fee (per annum; in INR)84,00068,00073,50060,000Utility Charges (per annum; in INR)33,00018,00027,50015,000Mess Advance (per annum; in INR) (to be adjusted as per actual)58,00058,00058,00058,000TOTAL (per annum; in INR)1.75 Lakh1.44 Lakh1.59 Lakh1.33 LakhNOTE: The mentioned fees are sourced from the official website of the university/sanctioning body. They are still subject to change and hence, are indicative.
faqs.question: What is the hostel fee at JK Lakshmipat University?

faqs.answer: A:    A minimum of Class 12 is required to apply for a UG course at JK Lakshmipat University. The university offers BTech, BDes and BBA programmes at the UG level. The minimum aggregate required for each UG programme is 60%. Hence, aspirants with 70% or more in Class 12 can get admission provided they also meet the selection requirements. The university considers CUET-UG or merit-based assessment conducted by JKLU for admission to BTech and BBA programmes. JKLU DET is required for admission to BDes programme.
faqs.question: Can I get into JK Lakshmipat University - JKLU with 70% in Class 12?

faqs.answer: A:    JK Lakshmipat University has specified the eligibility requirements that M.Tech aspirants must fulfil in order to secure admission at the university. Further, they must hold the documents supporting their eligibility at the time of admission. Candidates can find below the JK Lakshmipat University M.Tech eligibility criteria:A minimum aggregate of 60% or a CGPA of 6.0 out of 10 in the qualifying degree examination (BE/BTech/MCA/MSc/equivalent with relevant subjects) from a recognised universityIf the qualifying degree is not in an allied discipline, candidates must demonstrate basic proficiency in Computer Science or pass the GATE in an allied area
faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for M.Tech at JK Lakshmipat University?

reviews_list.review_title: Awesome review of JK Lakshmipati University by Gaurav Yadav.

review_content.Placements: I am pursuing a Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science with AI (B.Tech in CS with AI). This course is designed by highly qualified faculty and is focused on future applications. You need a CGPA of 7 or above to qualify for internships in many companies through my college. The college also offers semester exchange.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is a big library, badminton court, cricket ground, basketball court, volleyball ground, and other indoor game facilities. Wi-Fi is available for all students, whether day scholars or hostellers. Classrooms are well-designed with AC, and there are many labs as well.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: All over, the faculty, education curriculum, and policies are good.

review_content.Placements: The placement ratio they talked about on the day of admission was not real tbh, as I joined the campus I came to know the real ratio of placements here. Many of the counselors claim fake placement figures just make admissions. Don't believe in the on-campus placements shown by them.
review_content.Infrastructure: All over the infrastructure of the college building is very good but in terms of the laundry services and sports play area, it isn't up to mark. The campus also provides Wi-Fi services which are available in the range of campus area only and all the classrooms have well-working digital boards.

course_faqs.question: Are there any scholarships for M.Tech students at JK Lakshmipat University?
course_faqs.answer: Yes, JK Lakshmipat University (JKLU) offers scholarships to eligible and deserving M.Tech students under two categories. GATE-qualified candidates are eligible for a scholarship of INR 12,400 per month. Non-GATE-qualified candidates are eligible to a TA-ship if the university finds them deserving.In addition to the course-specific scholarships, M.Tech students can avail themselves of the “Other Scholarships” if they meet the respective criteria. These scholarships are offered to SC/ST candidates

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for BDes at JK Lakshmipat University?
overview_faqs.answer: The total first year fee for JK Lakshmipat University BDes is INR 3.45 lakh. The total fee for first year includes various components such as caution deposit, admission fee, etc. Admission and caution deposit are paid only once in the start. Students need to pay the academic fee annually.

overview_faqs.question: What is the hostel fee at JK Lakshmipat University?
overview_faqs.answer: JK Lakshmipat University provides double and triple occupancy hostels. Students can choose between an AC and a Non-AC hostel room. The JKLU hostel fees for the academic year 2025-26 are tabulated below:ParticularsDouble OccupancyTriple Occupancy ACNON-ACACNON-ACHostel Fee (per annum; in INR)84,00068,00073,50060,000Utility Charges (per annum; in INR)33,00018,00027,50015,000Mess Advance (per annum; in INR) (to be adjusted as per actual)58,00058,00058,00058,000TOTAL (per annum; in INR)1.75 Lakh1.44 Lakh1.59 Lakh1.33 LakhNOTE: The mentioned fees are sourced from the official website of the university/sanctioning body. They are still subject to change and hence, are indicative.

overview_faqs.question: What is the JKLU M.Tech fee structure?
overview_faqs.answer: JKLU Jaipur M.Tech fee structure includes the course-specific fees and the hostel fees. The hostel fees ranges from INR 1.33 LPA to INR 1.75 LPA. The course-specific fees included in the fee structure of MTech at JKLU are tabulated below:Tuition FeeAdmission Fee (One-time)Caution Deposit (One-time)INR 3.6 LakhINR 5,000INR 10,000NOTE: The mentioned fee is sourced from the official website of the university/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

overview_faqs.question: How much is the BTech fee at JK Lakshmipat University?
overview_faqs.answer: The total first-year fee for JK Lakshmipat University four-year BTech course is INR 2.75 lakh. This fee includes an admission fee of INR 5,000 and a refundable caution deposit of INR 10,000. This fee excludes hostel charges. Aspirants wishing to opt for hostel facility need to pay additional charges.

review_summary.college_name: JK Lakshmipat University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The best college and variety of extracurricular activities are conducted.

content.Placements: The highest package of B.Tech CSE students of batch 2025 is 22.5 LPA and the lowest package is 4.5 LPA with an average of 8.5 LPA (this data is for on-campus placements). Top recruiters are IBM, TCS, Phonepe, Infosys, JK Organization, Nike, and many more. More than 75% of students got internships at various companies with a good stipend from prominent recruiters. More than 90% of students got placed after completion of their course. The top roles offered in B.Tech vary from company to company. In simple terms, placement-wise JKLU is a good option.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Our college is improving very fast, so I recommend joining our college, and you will enjoy your life

content.Placements: Mostly students get placed, but at a very low package, because the JK organisation is taking students from our college. Few good students get a package above 10 LPA. Highest salary package is 34 LPA. Lowest salary package is 5 LPA. Average salary package is nearly 5 LPA. Most of the startup companies are interested in our college. At least 70-80% of students get internships.
content.Infrastructure: Classroom has AC. We have a good Wi-Fi facility everywhere. Other facilities are also very good, as compared to the money they are charging. Mess also has some special food. Best food is chilli potato and Maggi. Sports facilities are also improving very fast. Nowadays, we also have a clinic inside.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Awesome review of JK Lakshmipati University by Gaurav Yadav.

content.Placements: I am pursuing a Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science with AI (B.Tech in CS with AI). This course is designed by highly qualified faculty and is focused on future applications. You need a CGPA of 7 or above to qualify for internships in many companies through my college. The college also offers semester exchange.
content.Infrastructure: There is a big library, badminton court, cricket ground, basketball court, volleyball ground, and other indoor game facilities. Wi-Fi is available for all students, whether day scholars or hostellers. Classrooms are well-designed with AC, and there are many labs as well.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: All over, the faculty, education curriculum, and policies are good.

content.Placements: The placement ratio they talked about on the day of admission was not real tbh, as I joined the campus I came to know the real ratio of placements here. Many of the counselors claim fake placement figures just make admissions. Don't believe in the on-campus placements shown by them.
content.Infrastructure: All over the infrastructure of the college building is very good but in terms of the laundry services and sports play area, it isn't up to mark. The campus also provides Wi-Fi services which are available in the range of campus area only and all the classrooms have well-working digital boards.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Review of JK Lakshmipat University.

content.Placements: This is an engineering college, so students who get above 75 percent can only get admission to this college. The highest package of our college last year was 22 LPA, the lowest package was 6 LPA, and the average package was between 7-14 LPA. The top recruiting companies are TCS, JK Group of Industries, Infosys, and many more.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is attractive. It looks cool. Facilities given by the college are fantastic, as they provide all the necessary facilities. Classrooms are good, and there are labs in the college. There is a separate block for the library.

admission_overview.college_name: JK Lakshmipat University Admission 2025: Application Process, Eligibility, Courses & Fee

admission_process.title: JKLU Admission process 2025

paragraphs: JKLU admissionto courses is both merit and entrance-based. The university offers programmes at the undergraduate, postgraduate and doctoral levels in various streams such as Engineering, Management, Design, etc. Some of these programmes are offered via various institutes of the university, such as the Institute of Engineering and Technology, which offers BTech and MTech. Interested candidates can apply for the preferred course on the official website of the university. The university conductsJKLU DETfor admission to Design courses. Besides,JKLUalso conducts merit-based assessments for candidates. Read the following article to learn all about the courses and the admission criteria for JKLU.

The university considers entrance exam scores and the merit of the candidates in the qualifying exam for admission. Candidates must fulfil the eligibility criteria to apply for a course at JKLU. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12, whereas graduation is required for PG programmes. Students may have to provide valid entrance exam scores if required. Below areJK Lakshmipat University coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Common Eligibility
Selection Criteria
Class 12 with at least 60% aggregate in English, Maths,Physics, andChemistry
A minimum of 60% aggregate in Mathematics in Class 12
Applicants must attain a minimum aggregate of 60% in Class 12 acrossEnglishand three chosen subjects
JKLU DET + Portoflio Review + PI
At least 60% aggregate in BE/ BTech
GATE/ Merit-based

Aspirants seeking admission to the university have to pass selection rounds specific to each programme. The university conducts entrance-test for admission to a some courses. Candidates willing to read in detail about the JKLU admission process can check below:
Step 1: Application Process

Candidates seeking admission to the JKLU courses are required to register their candidature on the official website of the university and then fill out the complete application form. Prospective candidates must check their eligibility before applying to the course.
Step 2: Entrance Exam

Admission to all JKLU courses is both merit and entrance-based. The university conducts JKLU DET for admission to BDes and MDes programmes. JKLU may also consider scores obtained in CUET-UG and GATE scores for admission to specific programmes if applicable.
Step 3: Other Selection Rounds
After shortlisting candidates based on entrance exam scores, the selected candidates are called for the Personal Interaction Round (PCI) or PI & Portfolio Round (PR) for Design aspirants.
Step 4: Results and Admission
Selected candidates are informed about their admission. To accept the offer, candidates need to pay theJKLU feeand submit the original copies of the documents for verification.
For more information about JK Lakshmipat University check out the below video:

courses_data.name: JKLU BTech Admission 2025
courses_data.description: JK Lakshmipat University offers a four-year BTech programme divided into four semesters. The university offers BTech inComputer Science and Engineering,Computer Science & Artificial IntelligenceandComputer & Communication Engineering. Besides, the university also offers lateral entry to the BTech programme. The selection for BTech course is based on CUET score or merit-based assessment conducted by the university. Candidates after completing Class 12 can apply for BTech.

faqs.question: What all BTech specialisations are offered by JK Lakshmipat University?
faqs.answer: JK Lakshmipat University offers a four-year BTech programme divided into four semesters. Candidates after completing Class 12 can apply for BTech. The university offers BTech in the below specialisations:Computer Science and EngineeringComputer Science & Artificial IntelligenceComputer & Communication Engineering

faqs.question: What are the eligibility criteria for admission to the BTech programme at JK Lakshmipat University?
faqs.answer: JK Lakshmipat University is subject to the fulfilment of the eligibility criteria specified by the university. Candidates who have completed Class 12 with at least 60% aggregate in English, Maths, Physics, and Chemistry are eligible to apply for JK Lakshmipat University BTech admission. Further, they must have scored a minimum of 60% in Mathematics in Class 12. Students appearing for final examination of Class 12 may also apply. However, their admission will be provisional, unless they fulfil th

faqs.question: How much is the BTech fee at JK Lakshmipat University?
faqs.answer: The total first-year fee for JK Lakshmipat University four-year BTech course isINR 2.75 lakh. This fee includes an admission fee of INR 5,000 and a refundable caution deposit of INR 10,000. This fee excludes hostel charges. Aspirants wishing to opt for hostel facility need to pay additional charges.

faqs.question: What is the admission process of JK Lakshmipat University?
faqs.answer: The mode of JK Lakshmipat University course admissions is online. Admission to various courses is based on merit, a personal interview round, and scores of entrance tests. The accepted entrance exams are CUET,UCEED, and others. Candidates willing to get admission to any courses must apply online on the official website of JK Lakshmipat University. Candidates applying through CUET must first register for the exam. Then, appear for the exam and take part in the counselling round. With a valid scor

courses_data.name: JKLU BDes Admission 2025
courses_data.description: JKLU BDes is a four-year course spread across eight semesters. Candidates who have completed their class 12 in any stream with a minimum of 60% aggregate are eligible to apply for the course. Admission to JKLU BDes is entrance-based. The university conducts a Design Entrance Test to shortlist candidates for admission.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in BDes at JK Lakshmipat University?
faqs.answer: JK Lakshmipat University conducts JKLU Design Entrance Test (DET) for admission to BDes programme. The test is conducted for 90 minutes and includes two sections. The paper is of a total of 100 marks. Once the candidates have appeared for the entrance exam, they are further called for portfolio review and interview rounds for final admission.

faqs.question: What is the fee for BDes at JK Lakshmipat University?
faqs.answer: The total first year fee for JK Lakshmipat University BDes isINR 3.45 lakh. The total fee for first year includes various components such as caution deposit, admission fee, etc. Admission and caution deposit are paid only once in the start. Students need to pay the academic fee annually.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for BDes programme at JK Lakshmipat University?
faqs.answer: Candidates must pass Class 12 with English and three selected subjects with a minimium of 60% aggregate to apply for JK Lakshmipat University BDes course. Aspirants must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission. Besides, the university conducts JKLU DET to select candidates for BDes programme.

faqs.question: What is the hostel fee at JK Lakshmipat University?
faqs.answer: JK Lakshmipat University provides double and triple occupancy hostels. Students can choose between an AC and a Non-AC hostel room. courses_data.name: JKLU MDes Admission 2025
courses_data.description: JK Lakshmipat University offers a two-year MDes programme divided into four semesters. The university conducts an entrance exam for admission to MDes course. Aspirants who have completed bachelor's degree or equivalent in any discipline from a recognised university with a minimum of 60% aggregate or equivalent CGPA can apply for MDes.

faqs.question: Does JK Lakshmipat University offer MDes?
faqs.answer: Yes, JK Lakshmipat University offers a two-year MDes programme spread across four semesters. The university conducts JKLU DET for admission to MDes course. Candidates who have completed bachelor's degree or equivalent in any discipline from a recognised university with a minimum of 60% aggregate or equivalent CGPA can apply for MDes.

faqs.question: Is entrance exam required for MDes at JK Lakshmipat University?
faqs.answer: Yes, JK Lakshmipat University conducts JKLU DET for admission to MDes programme. DET is a written test of 100 marks conducted for a duration of 90 minutes. The paper has two sections. Candidates are evulated logical reasoning, general knowledge, and visual sensibilities. The paper also includes subjective questions where candidates are evaluated based on their creative abilities.

faqs.question: How can I get a seat in JKLU?
faqs.answer: JK Lakshmipat University offers seats in UG, PG and PhD courses based on entrance exam scores. The university conducts JKLU DET for admission to BDes and MDes programmes. JKLU also accepts CUET-UG and GATE scores for admission to specific programmes. The university also conducts merit-based assessment for a seat in BBA and BTech programmes. Selected candidates are further called for personal interview or personal interaction rounds. Once selected, aspirants need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the university.

faqs.question: Can I join JK Lakshmipat University - JKLU without UCEED?
faqs.answer: The answer to this question depends on the course opted by the candidates. UCEED is a design entrance test and is required for BDes programme. JK Lakshmipat University conducts JKLU Design Entrance Test (DET) at national-level for admission to BDes programme. Hence, aspirants can take admission in BDes without UCEED score.

faqs.question: Can I get into JK Lakshmipat University - JKLU with 70% in Class 12?
faqs.answer: A minimum of Class 12 is required to apply for a UG course at JK Lakshmipat University. The university offers BTech, BDes and BBA programmes at the UG level. The minimum aggregate required for each UG programme is 60%. Hence, aspirants with 70% or more in Class 12 can get admission provided they also meet the selection requirements. The university considers CUET-UG or merit-based assessment conducted by JKLU for admission to BTech and BBA programmes. JKLU DET is required for admission to BDes programme.

faqs.question: Can I join JK Lakshmipat University - JKLU directly?
faqs.answer: JK Lakshmipat University offers admission to courses based on national or university-level entrance exams. The university conducts merit-based assessment for admission to a few courses. Candidates applying for admission must check the course-specific eligibility and selection requirements. The university considers JKLU DET for design courses, GATE for M.Tech and CUET for BTech and BBA programmes. Selected candidates have to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the university.

placement_data.title: JKLU Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: The University concluded the 2024 placements with a 100% placement rate for Engineering and Management courses. The overall highest package offered during JKLU placements 2024 was INR 22.50 LPA and the average package stood at INR 6.95 LPA. The 2024 placement data for BBA and BTech courses has also been released. As per the report, 100% of BBA students were paced. The highest package for BBA and BTech stood at INR 6.10 LPA and INR 22.50 LPA, respectively.

hostel_campus.college_name: JK Lakshmipat University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: There are separate hostel facilities for boys and girls. the rooms are spacious and well furnished. The hostels have sports and other recreational facilities, such as Dish TV, common room for interaction, etc. There is round-the-clock internet connectivity in the entire campus, including the hostel rooms.

library.description: The Learning Resource Center of JK Lakshmipati University houses in a Multistorey Building and has a collection of books, journals and other reading materials in the area of Management, Engineering, Humanities and Social Sciences and allied subjects taught in the University. reviews.review_heading: The best college and variety of extracurricular activities are conducted.
reviews.review_text: On campus, Wi-Fi is available 24/7. The library is open from 8:30 AM to 1:00 AM and the printout facility is in the library which is accessible only from 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM (Monday-Saturday). Hostels are fully furnished with the facility of indoor games such as table tennis, carrom, billiards, and various board games, and the hostel gate is closed from 2:00 AM to 5:00 AM. In our college, there is every outdoor sport with the best suitable facilities including cricket, basketball, football, volle...

reviews.review_heading: Our college is improving very fast, so I recommend joining our college, and you will enjoy your life
reviews.review_text: Classroom has AC. We have a good Wi-Fi facility everywhere. Other facilities are also very good, as compared to the money they are charging. Mess also has some special food. Best food is chilli potato and Maggi. Sports facilities are also improving very fast. Nowadays, we also have a clinic inside.

reviews.review_heading: Awesome review of JK Lakshmipati University by Gaurav Yadav.
reviews.review_text: There is a big library, badminton court, cricket ground, basketball court, volleyball ground, and other indoor game facilities. Wi-Fi is available for all students, whether day scholars or hostellers. Classrooms are well-designed with AC, and there are many labs as well.

reviews.review_heading: All over, the faculty, education curriculum, and policies are good.
reviews.review_text: All over the infrastructure of the college building is very good but in terms of the laundry services and sports play area, it isn't up to mark. The campus also provides Wi-Fi services which are available in the range of campus area only and all the classrooms have well-working digital boards.

reviews.review_heading: Review of JK Lakshmipat University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is attractive. It looks cool. Facilities given by the college are fantastic, as they provide all the necessary facilities. Classrooms are good, and there are labs in the college. There is a separate block for the library.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the faculty members and the curriculum is also good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is top-notch. The main focus is kept on the infrastructure. All classrooms are AC and equipped with the latest smart boards. We have a full Wi-Fi-enabled campus. Library is a bit small, but it does the job. Labs are also good. Hostels are best, we have both AC and non-AC options. Mess food is also sometimes very good but sometimes too bad but overall, its good. Canteen is also very affordable. Sports culture is not that good on the campus due to less support from authorities b...

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college building is old, but it is in good condition. The library, classrooms, and labs are well-equipped. The library is well-managed. The whole campus is Wi-Fi-enabled. Hostels are the best as they are clean, and all the facilities are provided. The mess food is also good in comparison to other messes.

reviews.review_heading: Most Honest Review of JKLU.
reviews.review_text: Facilities offered are top-notch as the whole campus has Wi-Fi for everyone. Classrooms are literally like just expected in a college. The library has all kinds of books, ranging from novels of all sorts to course books for all courses. Hostels are available for one, two, or three occupancy with AC or non-AC preference. Mess food is okayish, but compared to other colleges, I think our mess food is better. The canteen is now just great with cheap prices, and we have vending machines. Sports facil...

reviews.review_heading: JKLU - My Honest Opinion about the University.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and Infrastructure are great. Fully air conditioned classrooms and buildings, Wi-Fi available around all parts of campus, Library has a wide collection of books, journals and magazines, and All the classrooms have a projector, microphones, whiteboards and comfortable seats. Hostel is very well-maintained considering wear and tears. Mess food is surprisingly of good quality and follows a menu schedule. Cafeteria has a wide range of items and dishes. There is a general store inside the ...

reviews.review_heading: Number of seats is 250 only, so that they can place all students they have in their jobs.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good compared to other colleges in Jaipur, except Manipal University. It was quite good, they provided all the basic needs and a game to the hostler. The campus area was under Wi-Fi connection. The hostels were separate for girls and boys. The sports were quite good.

reviews.review_heading: Real and True Review of a Good College.
reviews.review_text: For my course, all facilities are good. There are AC classrooms and labs, and all study books are available in the library. Wi-Fi is accessible throughout the campus. The hostel facilities are very good, with two-seater and three-seater rooms available, including both non-AC and AC options. While the hostel facilities are great, the food is just okay, and the medical facilities are not good. The sports and games facilities are also average.

reviews.review_heading: Very good for study purposes; faculty are very good and interactive.
reviews.review_text: For my course, the facilities are awesome; there are AC classrooms, labs, and a library. There is a good Wi-Fi network available, and all the books related to the course and other novels are available at the library. The hostel facility is very good, the mess food is okay, and the canteen facility is below average as it is often closed. Medical facilities are very bad as the doctor is often not there, and sports and games facilities are average.

reviews.review_heading: I am neutral to this college, the experience and faculty is good .
reviews.review_text: The facilities in our college is pretty good. Wi-Fi is available in every class, corridors and in every room of the hostel. The classrooms are very spacious and well ventilated. The food which the college provides is okish, and they change the menu every Monday. The medical facilities and the canteen is open till 7:30 pm.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with faculty, average placements, nice management of facilities and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided by the campus are way better than those at other campuses in terms of food, technical facilities, and library, but it may lack in terms of infrastructure as the university is not that vast to explore. Even the transportation facility can be improved.

reviews.review_heading: Well-rounded campus life at JKLU.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi access is available throughout the campus; we have specialized labs with all the machinery, tools, and software; we have smart classrooms; and we have a well-stocked library. We have double-sharing rooms in our hostels with all the basic amenities. Mess food is better than many of the colleges mess; they maintain a regular menu cycle that includes a balanced diet. We have a health center here with a first-aid facility and a visiting doctor. Facilities for outdoor and indoor games are provi...

college_info.college_name: JK Lakshmipat University Scholarship Details

paragraphs: JK Lakshmipat University awards various scholarships to students as financial assistance. The eligible UG and PG students are awarded the scholarships. If a student qualifies for more than one available scholarship, only the scholarship with the highest value will be given to the student, as one cannot combine multiple scholarships. Scholarships are exclusively applicable to the academic fee. The below-mentioned are the JK Lakshmipat University scholarship details:
Scholarships for the BBA applicants are awarded based on merit, specifically through CUET scores or Class 12 results.
Applicants will be awarded scholarships through their Class 12th scores or performance in the JK-DET and portfolio round.
or
*Specified subjects include three subjects chosen by the applicant and English. However, a subject with internal marks of 50% or even higher will not be considered for admissions.
Scholarships are available for full-time MTech students. For GATE Qualified Students, it is INR 12,400 per month and for Non-GATE Students, TA Ship for deserving candidates.
In addition to these scholarships, there are various other scholarships available for students. Some of them are mentioned below:
Download the JK Lakshmipat University (JKLU) Scholarships Brochure
